entry.content: 题目大意   p个人,m只猫,n座山，告诉每座山距离前一座山的距离，和每只猫在哪座山上，等待时间. 所有人一开始都在一号山，每单位时间挪动距离为1，求如何安排这些人的出发时间使得所有的猫的等待时间总和最少？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 200010;ll n,sum[maxn],m,p,dsum[maxn],h[maxn],t[maxn],a[maxn],f[maxn],g[maxn],head,tail,q[maxn];ll k(ll x){ return -x;}ll b(ll x){ return sum[x] + g[x];}ll y(ll i,ll x){ return k(i) * a[x] + b(i);}bool check(ll y1,ll y2,ll y3){ ll temp1 = (k(y1) - k(y3)) * (b(y2) - b(y1)); ll temp2 = (k(y1) - k(y2)) * (b(y3) - b(y1)); return temp1 >= temp2;}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&m,&p); for (ll i = 2; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&dsum[i]); dsum[i] += dsum[i - 1]; } for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) scanf("%lld%lld",&h[i],&t[i]); for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) a[i] = t[i] - dsum[h[i]]; sort(a + 1,a + 1 + m); for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + a[i]; for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) g[i] = 1e15; for (ll i = 1; i <= p; i++) { head = tail = 0; for (ll j = 1; j <= m; j++) { while (head < tail && y(q[head],j) >= y(q[head + 1],j)) head++; f[j] = y(q[head],j) + j * a[j] - sum[j]; while (head < tail && check(j,q[tail - 1],q[tail])) tail--; q[++tail] = j; } for (ll j = 1; j <= m; j++) g[j] = f[j]; } printf("%lld\n",g[m]); return 0;} 分析  首先要知道猫在什么条件下才能被接到. 对于每只猫，设$A_i = T_i - ΣD_j(1≤j≤H_i)$.只有当人的出发时间在$A_i$之后时，这只猫才能被接到，等待时间为$t - A_i$,t是出发时间.  将所有猫按照A从小到大排好序后，就能够分配人去接猫了. 每个人接的猫对应的A一定是连续的一段. 因为要考虑有多少个人，接了多少只猫，因此状态定义为：$f_{i,j}表示前i个人，带走第k+1~j$的费用，枚举k,即可得到状态转移方程：$f_{i,j} = min\{f_{i - 1,k} + A_j *(j - k) - (S_j - S_k)\}$,其中S是A排好序后的前缀和. 斜率优化就能过. 坑点  一定要注意初始化！

entry.title: bzoj2726 [SDOI2012]任务安排(斜率优化模板的选择)
entry.content: 中文题面Description机器上有N个需要处理的任务，它们构成了一个序列。这些任务被标号为1到N，因此序列的排列为1,2,3…N。这N个任务被分成若干批，每批包含相邻的若干任务。从时刻0开始，这些任务被分批加工，第i个任务单独完成所需的时间是Ti。在每批任务开始前，机器需要启动时间S，而完成这批任务所需的时间是各个任务需要时间的总和。注意，同一批任务将在同一时刻完成。每个任务的费用是它的完成时刻乘以一个费用系数Fi。请确定一个分组方案，使得总费用最小。Input第一行两个整数，N,S。接下来N行每行两个整数，Ti,Fi。Output一个整数，为所求的答案。Sample Input5 1 1 3 3 2 4 3 2 3 1 4 Sample Output153 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm> using namespace std; typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 300010;ll n,s,sumt[maxn],sumc[maxn],q[maxn],head = 1,tail = 1,f[maxn]; ll find(ll k){ if (head == tail) return q[head]; ll l = head,r = tail,res = 0; while (l <= r) { ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if ((f[q[mid + 1]] - f[q[mid]]) > k * (sumc[q[mid + 1]] - sumc[q[mid]])) { res = mid; r = mid - 1; } else l = mid + 1; } return q[res];} int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&s); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld%lld",&sumt[i],&sumc[i]); sumt[i] += sumt[i - 1]; sumc[i] += sumc[i - 1]; } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll p = find(sumt[i] + s); f[i] = f[p] - (sumt[i] + s) * sumc[p] + sumt[i] * sumc[i] + s * sumc[n]; while (head < tail && (f[q[tail]] - f[q[tail - 1]]) * (sumc[i] - sumc[q[tail]]) >= (f[i] - f[q[tail]]) * (sumc[q[tail]] - sumc[q[tail - 1]])) tail--; q[++tail] = i; } printf("%lld\n",f[n]); return 0;} 分析  很显然这是一道dp题. 要知道当前划分到了哪一位，已经划分了几段，状态中必须记录两个信息：$f_{i,j}$表示当前划分到了第i位，已经划分了j段的总费用.这个dp显然是过不了的，光是状态数就已经爆了，还没有算上转移的复杂度.  其实划分问题都只用保留第一维. 但是要计算S的影响，必须要知道当前划分了多少段，只知道划分到了哪里不能推出来. 于是就要用上一种叫做费用提前计算的方法. 若对于当前枚举到的状态，不知道有多少前继状态影响到它，但知道它影响哪些后继状态，可以将它对后继状态的影响记入状态中. 那么$f_i = min\{f_j + sumT_i * (sumC_i - sumC_j) + S * (sumC_N - sumC_j)\}$,最后一部分即为状态i对后继状态的影响.  对dp转移进行优化. 转移方程内的多项式包含i和j的乘积项，因此不能用单调队列优化，”只能”用斜率优化. 关于斜率优化我有两种不同的模板，一种是博客园上的，一种是书上介绍的，下面说一说在什么情况下用哪种模板比较好：  1.如果是普通情况，当然是博客园上的模板更好，因为斜率可能会出现不存在的情况. 使用第一种模板时要记住：斜率递增，符号相反，斜率递减，符号相同.  2.如果斜率不一定递增，但是横坐标是递增的，那么用第二种模板. 保存整个凸包，不进行队首的操作，每次二分查找合适的斜率位置.  3.其它情况都用第二种模板 + cdq分治. 先递归处理左边的部分，然后维护水平序凸包，对右边的斜率也进行排序. 两个单调指针扫描转移即可.  对于本题而言，属于第二种情况.

entry.title: Codeforces 876 E. National Property
entry.content: 题目大意规定大写字母的字典序小于小写字母. 现在将所有的字母都表示成数字,可以将若干个字母变成大写字母，替换所有单词中的该字母. 问能不能将这些单词的字典序变成单调上升的? 如果能，输出变哪些字母. 提示  一个字母对应两种状态，能想到什么？ 代码#include <vector>#include <stack>#include <cstdio>#include <queue>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,m,maxx,head[maxn * 2],tot = 1,nextt[maxn * 4],ans[maxn * 2],cntt,to[maxn * 4],du[maxn * 2],pre[maxn * 2],low[maxn * 2],dui[maxn * 2],scc[maxn * 2],dfs_clock,cnt;int head2[maxn * 2],nextt2[maxn * 4],to2[maxn * 4],tot2 = 1,ok[maxn * 2],l[maxn];vector <int>p[maxn];stack <int> s;void add(int x,int y){ to[tot] = y; nextt[tot] = head[x]; head[x] = tot++;}void add2(int x,int y){ to2[tot2] = y; nextt2[tot2] = head2[x]; head2[x] = tot2++;}void tarjan(int u){ pre[u] = low[u] = ++dfs_clock; s.push(u); for (int i = head[u]; i; i = nextt[i]) { int v = to[i]; if (!pre[v]) { tarjan(v); low[u] = min(low[u],low[v]); } else if (!scc[v]) low[u] = min(low[u],pre[v]); } if (low[u] == pre[u]) { cnt++; while (1) { int t = s.top(); s.pop(); scc[t] = cnt; if (t == u) break; } }}void topo(){ queue <int> q; for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) if (!du[i]) q.push(i); while (!q.empty()) { int u = q.front(); q.pop(); if (!ok[u]) { ok[u] = 1; ok[dui[u]] = 2; for (int i = head2[u]; i; i = nextt2[i]) { int v = to2[i]; if (--du[v] == 0) q.push(v); } } }}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&l[i]); for (int j = 1; j <= l[i]; j++) { int x; scanf("%d",&x); p[i].push_back(x); } } for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { bool flag = true; for (int j = 0; j < l[i] && j < l[i + 1]; j++) if (flag && p[i][j] != p[i + 1][j]) { flag = false; int x = p[i][j],y = p[i + 1][j]; if (x < y) { add(x,y); add(y + m,x + m); } else { add(x,x + m); add(y + m,y); } } if (flag && l[i + 1] < l[i]) { puts("No"); return 0; } } for (int i = 1; i <= 2 * m; i++) if (!pre[i]) tarjan(i); bool flag = true; for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) { if (scc[i] == scc[i + m]) { flag = false; break; } dui[scc[i]] = scc[i + m]; dui[scc[i + m]] = scc[i]; } if (!flag) puts("No"); else { puts("Yes"); for (int i = 1; i <= 2 * m; i++) for (int j = head[i]; j; j = nextt[j]) { int v = to[j]; if (scc[i] != scc[v]) { add2(scc[v],scc[i]); du[scc[i]]++; } } topo(); for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) if (ok[scc[i + m]] == 1) ans[++cntt] = i; sort(ans + 1,ans + 1 + cntt); printf("%d\n",cntt); for (int i = 1; i <= cntt; i++) printf("%d ",ans[i]); } return 0;} 分析  打比赛时非常遗憾的一道题. 一直想的是贪心or dp,就是没往2-sat上面想. 其实2-sat也很容易想到. 因为每个字母只有两种状态. 考虑有哪些限制.  1.若第i行与第i+1行相邻的两个字母x,y, x < y，那么这两个字母是合法的，x不变y就不能变，y变了x就必须变，所以连边x —> y, y’ —> x’.  2.若x > y,那么x必须变，y不能变. 连边x —> x’,y’ —> y.  剩下的就是2-sat模型了. 最后要输出方案，拓扑排序一下即可. 教训  1.字母不要一列一列地存，要一行一行地存，不然可能会出现两个字母在行上不连续出现的情况.  2.要检验一种不合法的特殊情况：第i个和第j个单词的前len位一样(len是两个单词长度的较小值)，但是它们的长度不一样. 这样无论怎么变都不可能使单词的字典序有序.

entry.title: Codeforces 876 F. High Cry
entry.content: 题目大意从序列a中选取区间，要求这个区间内的所有数的或值>这个区间内所有的数. 求有多少个区间可以满足答案？ 提示  统计区间个数题一般有哪几种方法？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172#include <cstdio>#include <vector>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 400010;ll n,a[maxn],l[maxn],r[maxn],L[maxn],R[maxn],s[maxn],top,pos[maxn];ll ans;int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); l[i] = 1; r[i] = n; L[i] = 0; R[i] = n + 1; } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { while (top && a[s[top]] < a[i]) top--; if (top) l[i] = s[top] + 1; s[++top] = i; } top = 0; for (ll i = n; i >= 1; i--) { while (top && a[s[top]] <= a[i]) top--; if (top) r[i] = s[top] - 1; s[++top] = i; } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (ll j = 0; j <= 30; j++) { if (!(a[i] >> j & 1)) L[i] = max(L[i],pos[j]); else pos[j] = i; } for (ll i = 0; i <= 30; i++) pos[i] = n + 1; for (ll i = n; i >= 1; i--) for (ll j = 0; j <= 30; j++) { if (!(a[i] >> j & 1)) R[i] = min(R[i],pos[j]); else pos[j] = i; } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { if (l[i] <= L[i]) ans += 1LL * (L[i] - l[i] + 1) * (r[i] - i + 1); if (r[i] >= R[i]) ans += 1LL * (r[i] - R[i] + 1) * (i - l[i] + 1); if (l[i] <= L[i] && R[i] <= r[i]) ans -= 1LL * (L[i] - l[i] + 1) * (r[i] - R[i] + 1); } printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  统计区间个数题的做法非常套路. 要么是枚举其中一个端点，再来快速跳另一个端点,或者是以每一个点为基准点，向两边扩展合法的区间.  先尝试第一种方法. 枚举左端点，右端点怎么样才能快速移动呢？可以利用or操作的单调性？虽然or的结果是单调递增的，但是最大值也是单调递增的，两者的大小不好确定. 那么只好采用第二种方法。  先用单调栈求出以第i个点为最大值的区间的左端点和右端点的取值范围分别是多少. 因为或的值要比最大数大，那么一定存在一个数，它的某一位上是1而最大数上的这一位是0，那么我们可以按位扫描处理出这个数的位置在哪. 于是利用乘法原理+容斥原理即可求出区间个数。  注意！利用单调栈求最值管辖的区间会有一个问题：当有两个相邻的数是一样的话会重复统计，通常的解决方法是在从左往右扫时比较符号不加上=,从右往左时加上=. 可以参看代码和bzoj4199

entry.title: poj3017 Cut the Sequence
entry.content: 英文题面Description Given an integer sequence { an } of length N, you are to cut the sequence into several parts every one of which is a consecutive subsequence of the original sequence. Every part must satisfy that the sum of the integers in the part is not greater than a given integer M. You are to find a cutting that minimizes the sum of the maximum integer of each part. Input The first line of input contains two integer N (0 < N ≤ 100 000), M. The following line contains N integers describes the integer sequence. Every integer in the sequence is between 0 and 1 000 000 inclusively. Output Output one integer which is the minimum sum of the maximum integer of each part. If no such cuttings exist, output −1. Sample Input 8 172 2 2 8 1 8 2 1Sample Output 12Hint Use 64-bit integer type to hold M. Source POJ Monthly—2006.09.29, zhucheng 翻译  给定一个长度为N的序列A,要求把该序列分成若干段，在满足每段的和不超过M的前提下，让每段中所有数的最大值之和最小。计算这个值. 提示  连续序列划分问题，用dp解，先写出状态转移方程，再来想用什么方法去优化。 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859#include <cstdio>#include <set>#include <cmath>#include <queue>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 100010;const ll inf = 1e18;ll n,m,a[maxn],sum[maxn],pos[maxn],f[maxn],maxx[maxn][20],q[maxn];multiset<ll> s;int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&m); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + a[i]; } ll pos = 0,head = 1,tail = 0; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { if (a[i] > m) { puts("-1"); return 0; } while (sum[i] - sum[pos] > m) pos++; while (head <= tail && q[head] <= pos) { if (head < tail) s.erase(f[q[head]] + a[q[head + 1]]); head++; } while (head <= tail && a[q[tail]] <= a[i]) { if (head < tail) s.erase(f[q[tail - 1]] + a[q[tail]]); tail--; } q[++tail] = i; if (head < tail && q[tail - 1] < i) s.insert(f[q[tail - 1]] + a[i]); ll temp = *s.begin(); f[i] = a[q[head]] + f[pos]; if (head < tail && temp < f[i]) f[i] = temp; } printf("%lld\n",f[n]); return 0;} 分析  这是一道非常特殊的用单调队列优化的dp题. 先写出状态转移方程：$f_i = min\{f_j + max\{a_k\}(j + 1≤k≤i)\}(Σa_k ≤ M(j+1≤k≤i))$  枚举i和j的时间复杂度是$O(n^2)$的，需要优化掉其中一维的枚举. 一般是优化j的枚举. 观察状态转移方程，可以发现随着i的变大，j的取值范围的上界和下界都是单调变化的. 那么可以利用单调队列来优化.  可以用单调队列优化的dp状态转移方程后面一般接一个多项式，这个多项式的每一项只与i或j有关.然而这个状态转移方程后面根本就算不上多项式. 那么需要特殊的方法去处理：  1.找到最优解出现满足的情况,弄清楚这些情况是and关系还是or关系.  2.单调队列维护满足上面条件的位置.  3.用某种数据结构得到最优解.  也就是说，用单调队列优化这类dp问题的转移和优化“后面接多项式”dp的转移是不一样的. 前者是维护限制条件，也就是可能是最优决策的位置，后者是直接维护最优决策.  第一步是关键. 一般的方法是贪心地考虑有哪些情况可能成为最优解. 对于本题而言,有两种需要考虑的决策：  1.$A_j$是[j,i]中的最大值，那么从$f_j$转移而来.  2.从j+1开始，到i的和正好≤M的最小的j.  为什么考虑上面两种转移呢？对于第一种转移可以这样贪心考虑：将序列分成两段s1和s2. 从$f_j$转移而来，说明将$A_j$放在了s1,$A_{j + 1}$到$A_i$都放在了s2. 若s1段的最大值不是$A_j$那么相当于s1的答案不变，而s2的答案变小了.若s1段的最大值是$A_j$,这种情况只会发生在边界. 因为按照这种转移方式，s1一定能被分成更小的段，使得有$A_k≥A_j$. 因为边界处的特殊性，所以要考虑第二种决策. 两种决策关系是or，也就是说只要满足其中的一条，就有可能成为最优决策.  当YY出两种决策后，就要利用决策选择性来证明. 利用反证法，假设决策j两个条件都不满足, 因为$f_j$的单调性和max的单调性，$f_{j - 1} + max\{A_k\} (j≤k≤i) ≤ f_j + max\{A_k\}(j + 1≤k≤i)$. 那么我们完全可以选$f_{j - 1}$而不是$f_j$. 这个不等式是建立在两个条件都不满足的基础之上的，所以这两种条件至少要满足一个.  然后将所有可能的情况看作图上的点，对于and关系的情况，在它们之间连上一条边，那么图中就会有若干个连通分量. 分别对这些连通分量转移.  比如这两个限制条件的关系是or,那么就有两个连通分量，分开来考虑. 对于第二个决策，用一个单调指针维护从哪里转移即可. 对于第一个决策. 维护一个j递增，$A_j$递减的队列，用单调队列正好可以维护. 而$A_j$是j到i中最大的一个数，那么单调队列中的第i项的f值和第i+1项的a值即为一种可能的转移. 注意下标运算.  因为用单调队列维护的是可能成为最优决策的位置，要用一个数据结构维护最优值. 这个数据结构要支持删除最优值、添加一个值、取出最优值这些操作. multiset是首选，当然两个优先队列也是可以的.

entry.title: 被垃圾题cf940f浪费了一个晚上
entry.content: 题目大意用莫队求mex 吐槽  到现在还是WA第8个点,tmd. 不过学习了一点写法上的技巧：不必在修改时动态维护答案，最后统计一遍也是可以的. 修改操作修改的点只有在当前的查询区间[L,R]内时，才对答案产生影响！ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125126127128129130131132133134135#include <map>#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 1000010;int n,Q,a[maxn],b[maxn * 2],tot,lastt[maxn],block,cnt1,cnt2,ans[maxn],anss,num[maxn],cishu[maxn],L = 1,R = 0;map<int,int> M;struct node{ int pos,last,v;}p[maxn];struct node2{ int l,r,time,id;}q[maxn];bool cmp(node2 a,node2 b){ if ((a.l - 1) / block != (b.l - 1) / block) return (a.l - 1) / block < (b.l - 1) / block; if ((a.r - 1) / block != (b.r - 1) / block) return (a.r - 1) / block < (b.r - 1) / block; return a.time < b.time;}int get(int x){ return M.count(x) ? M[x] : M[x] = ++tot;}void add(int x){ cishu[num[x]]--; cishu[++num[x]]++;}void del(int x){ cishu[num[x]]--; cishu[--num[x]]++;}void update(int pos,int v){ if (pos >= L && pos <= R) { add(v); del(a[pos]); } a[pos] = v;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&Q); block = pow(n,2.0 / 3); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); a[i] = get(a[i]); } while (Q--) { int t,x,y; scanf("%d%d%d",&t,&x,&y); if (t == 1) { q[++cnt2].l = x; q[cnt2].r = y; q[cnt2].time = cnt1; q[cnt2].id = cnt2; } else { p[++cnt1].pos = x; p[cnt1].v = get(y); } } for (int i = 1; i <= cnt1; i++) { p[i].last = a[p[i].pos]; a[p[i].pos] = p[i].v; } int Time = cnt1; sort(q + 1,q + 1 + cnt2,cmp); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt2; i++) { while (Time < q[i].time) { ++Time; update(p[Time].pos,p[Time].v); } while (Time > q[i].time) { update(p[Time].pos,p[Time].last); Time--; } while (R < q[i].r) { ++R; add(a[R]); } while (R > q[i].r) { del(a[R]); R--; } while (L < q[i].l) { del(a[L]); L++; } while (L > q[i].l) { --L; add(a[L]); } int cur = 0; for (cur = 1; cishu[cur];cur++) ; ans[q[i].id] = cur; } for (int i = 1; i <= cnt2; i++) printf("%d\n",ans[i]); return 0;}

entry.title: Codeforces 940 E. Cashback
entry.content: 题目大意将一个序列分成若干段，若有一段长度为k,则从这一段中删掉前k/c小的数，问最后保留的数的和的最小值. 提示  划分序列题，方法非常套路，要么是贪心划分，要么是一维dp. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 100010;ll n,c,a[maxn],f[maxn],head = 1,tail = 0,q[maxn],ans;int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&c); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); ans += a[i]; } for (ll i = 1; i <= c - 1; i++) { while (head <= tail && a[q[tail]] >= a[i]) tail--; q[++tail] = i; } for (ll i = c; i <= n; i++) { while (head <= tail && q[head] <= i - c) head++; while(head <= tail && a[q[tail]] >= a[i]) tail--; q[++tail] = i; f[i] = max(f[i - 1],f[i - c] + a[q[head]]); } printf("%lld\n",ans - f[n]); return 0;} 分析  先从贪心的角度去思考. 从哪一方面下手呢？一般而言是哪一方面对答案有直接影响，就从哪一方面下手. 显然这道题中，对答案有直接影响的是被删掉的数，我们要让被删掉的数越大越好. 那么能不能确定哪些数该删，或者是哪些数能被删呢？很难做到，那么只剩下dp这种做法了.  还是利用上面说的这一种转化. 考虑删数，为了使得删掉的数最多/大，我们每次肯定选恰好c个数删掉其中最小的一个数. 那么dp转移方程就是：$f_i = max\{f_{i - c} + min\{a_k\}\}$,k的取值范围大小是固定的，因此可以用单调队列来优化. 注意单调队列的写法. 因为k可能等于i,所以先尝试将i加入到单调队列中，再来更新$f_i$.

entry.title: why uses dp?
entry.content: …  做了两道题，发现这两道题有个共性：当知道了它们可以用dp做后就变得特别简单. 难点在于想到用dp去做，如何想到一个题要用dp做？   1.一定要先模拟小数据，当你发现眼前有多种情况，每一种情况都可能得到不同解时，很大可能就是dp.   2.直觉告诉你这道题可以用贪心或数学方法做，但是贪心或数学方法只能覆盖有限的情况, 还有一些情况不能覆盖到,或者是在某些特定的条件下，贪心或数学方法不起作用(这两种方法只能在宏观上起作用),那么用dp来解决. 参考LeetCode466Codeforces985E

entry.title: Codeforces 985 E. Pencils and Boxes
entry.content: 题目大意将n个数分配到若干个集合中，满足每一个集合都至少要有k个数，并且所有集合的最大值与最小值之差≤d.问是否可行. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 500010;int n,k,d,a[maxn],f[maxn],c[maxn];void update(int x){ while (x <= n) { c[x]++; x += x & (-x); }}int query(int x){ int res = 0; while (x) { res += c[x]; x -= x & (-x); } return res;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&k,&d); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); sort(a + 1,a + 1 + n); int cur = 1; while(cur <= n && a[cur] - a[1] <= d) { if (cur >= k) { f[cur] = 1; update(cur); } cur++; } int pos = 1; for (int i = cur; i <= n; i++) { while (a[i] - a[pos] > d) pos++; if (i - k + 1 < pos) continue; if (query(i - k) - query(pos - 2)) { f[i] = 1; update(i); } } if (f[n]) puts("YES"); else puts("NO"); return 0;} 分析  一开始一直想着贪心.但是最后一个集合的数的个数至少是k不好满足. 只好用dp来做. dp的做法很简单，先将所有数从小到大排序,维护一个指针记录$a_r - a_l ≤ d$的最小的l,在树状数组中看[l,r - k]中是否有f值为1的. 具体思想可参见why uses dp?

entry.title: bzoj1672 [Usaco2005 Dec]Cleaning Shifts 清理牛棚
entry.content: 中文题面DescriptionFarmer John’s cows, pampered since birth, have reached new heights of fastidiousness. They now require their barn to be immaculate. Farmer John, the most obliging of farmers, has no choice but hire some of the cows to clean the barn. Farmer John has N (1 <= N <= 10,000) cows who are willing to do some cleaning. Because dust falls continuously, the cows require that the farm be continuously cleaned during the workday, which runs from second number M to second number E during the day (0 <= M <= E <= 86,399). Note that the total number of seconds during which cleaning is to take place is E-M+1. During any given second M..E, at least one cow must be cleaning. Each cow has submitted a job application indicating her willingness to work during a certain interval T1..T2 (where M <= T1 <= T2 <= E) for a certain salary of S (where 0 <= S <= 500,000). Note that a cow who indicated the interval 10..20 would work for 11 seconds, not 10. Farmer John must either accept or reject each individual application; he may NOT ask a cow to work only a fraction of the time it indicated and receive a corresponding fraction of the salary. Find a schedule in which every second of the workday is covered by at least one cow and which minimizes the total salary that goes to the cows. 约翰的奶牛们从小娇生惯养，她们无法容忍牛棚里的任何脏东西．约翰发现，如果要使这群有洁癖的奶牛满意，他不得不雇佣她们中的一些来清扫牛棚, 约翰的奶牛中有N(1≤N≤10000)头愿意通过清扫牛棚来挣一些零花钱．由于在某个时段中奶牛们会在牛棚里随时随地地乱扔垃圾，自然地，她们要求在这段时间里，无论什么时候至少要有一头奶牛正在打扫．需要打扫的时段从某一天的第M秒开始，到第E秒结束f0≤M≤E≤86399)．注意这里的秒是指时间段而不是时间点，也就是说，每天需要打扫的总时间是E-M+I秒． 约翰已经从每头牛那里得到了她们愿意接受的工作计划：对于某一头牛，她每天都愿意在笫Ti，.T2秒的时间段内工作(M≤Ti≤马≤E)，所要求的报酬是S美元(0≤S≤500000)．与需打扫时段的描述一样，如果一头奶牛愿意工作的时段是每天的第10_20秒，那她总共工作的时间是11秒，而不是10秒．约翰一旦决定雇佣某一头奶牛，就必须付给她全额的工资，而不能只让她工作一段时间，然后再按这段时间在她愿意工作的总时间中所占的百分比来决定她的工资．现在请你帮约翰决定该雇佣哪些奶牛以保持牛棚的清洁，当然，在能让奶牛们满意的前提下，约翰希望使总花费尽量小． Input Line 1: Three space-separated integers: N, M, and E. * Lines 2..N+1: Line i+1 describes cow i’s schedule with three space-separated integers: T1, T2, and S. 第1行：3个正整数N，M，E，用空格隔开． 第2到N+1行：第i+l行给出了编号为i的奶牛的工作计划，即3个用空格隔开的正整数Ti，T2，S．Output Line 1: a single integer that is either the minimum total salary to get the barn cleaned or else -1 if it is impossible to clean the barn. 输出一个整数，表示约翰需要为牛棚清理工作支付的最少费用．如果清理工作不可能完成，那么输出-1.Sample Input3 0 4 //三头牛,要打扫从0到4号stall 0 2 3 //一号牛,从0号stall打扫到2号,工资为3 3 4 2 0 0 1 INPUT DETAILS: FJ has three cows, and the barn needs to be cleaned from second 0 to second The first cow is willing to work during seconds 0, 1, and 2 for a total salary of 3, etc. Sample Output5 HINT约翰有3头牛，牛棚在第0秒到第4秒之间需要打扫．第1头牛想要在第0，1，2秒内工作，为此她要求的报酬是3美元．其余的依此类推． 约翰雇佣前两头牛清扫牛棚，可以只花5美元就完成一整天的清扫． SourceSilver 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283848586878889909192939495969798#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm> using namespace std; typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 90000,inf = 1e18;ll n,m,E,minn[maxn << 2],tag[maxn << 2]; struct node{ ll l,r,cost;} e[maxn]; bool cmp(node a,node b){ if (a.r == b.r) return a.l < b.l; return a.r < b.r;} void pushup(ll o){ minn[o] = min(minn[o * 2],minn[o * 2 + 1]);} void build(ll o,ll l,ll r){ if (l == r) { minn[o] = inf; return; } ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; build(o * 2,l,mid); build(o * 2 + 1,mid + 1,r); pushup(o);} void update(ll o,ll l,ll r,ll pos,ll v){ if (l == r) { minn[o] = min(minn[o],v); return; } ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (pos <= mid) update(o * 2,l,mid,pos,v); else update(o * 2 + 1,mid + 1,r,pos,v); pushup(o);} ll query(ll o,ll l,ll r,ll x,ll y){ if (x <= l && r <= y) return minn[o]; ll mid = (l + r) >> 1,res = inf; if (x <= mid) res = min(res,query(o * 2,l,mid,x,y)); if (y > mid) res = min(res,query(o * 2 + 1,mid + 1,r,x,y)); return res;} int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&m,&E); m += 2; E += 2; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&e[i].l,&e[i].r,&e[i].cost); e[i].l += 2; e[i].r += 2; } sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); build(1,1,E); update(1,1,E,m - 1,0); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll temp = query(1,1,E,e[i].l - 1,e[i].r); if (temp == inf) continue; temp += e[i].cost; update(1,1,E,e[i].r,temp); } ll temp = query(1,1,E,E,E); if (temp == inf) printf("-1\n"); else printf("%lld\n",query(1,1,E,E,E)); return 0;} 分析  令$f_i$表示覆盖完[m,i]的最小花费. 接下来有两种选择：要么枚举选哪条线段，要么枚举选的位置，再枚举选哪条线段，显然第一种方法更优. 为了确保每一条线段最多只被选一次，将所有线段按照右端点位置排序. $f_{r_i} = min\{f_j\} + cost_i(l_i - 1≤j≤r_i)$. 最小值那一部分可以用线段树来优化.

entry.title: Codeforces 985 D. Sand Fortress
entry.content: 题目大意  有无限个坑，你有n个沙子. 需要将这n个沙子全部倒进坑中，要满足情况:$h_1 ≤ H$,对于任意一对相邻的h，它们的差的绝对值≤1. 求最少有多少个坑中有沙子. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll n,h,ans;bool check(ll k){ bool flag1 = false,flag2 = false; if (k <= n) flag2 = true; double res = 0.0; if (k <= h) res = (double)k * (double)(k + 1) / (double)2; else { res = (double)h * (double)(h - 1) / (double)2; k -= (h - 1); ll temp = 0; if (k % 2 == 1) { temp = (k - 1) / 2; if (temp != 0) res += ((double)2 * h + (double)temp) * ((double)temp + 1) - (double)(h + temp); else res += (double)k * (double)h; } else { temp = k / 2 - 1; if (temp != 0) res += ((double)2 * h + (double)temp) * ((double)temp + 1); else res += (double)k * (double)h; } } if (res >= n) flag1 = true; if (flag1 && flag2) return true; return false;}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&h); ll l = 1,r = n; while (l <= r) { ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (check(mid)) { ans = mid; r = mid - 1; } else l = mid + 1; } printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  要求一个具体的最值，这个值的取值范围特别大，很容易想到二分. 二分有多少个坑有沙子. 判断可行性也很容易想到：如果能放的最大的沙子数量 ≥ n并且最小的沙子数量≤n,那么可行. 因为每次可以将一个坑中的沙子挪走1个，还是可以满足限制条件.  求下界比较简单，上界比较麻烦. 要对二分的值和h的大小关系分类讨论. 若$h < k$,那么这些坑的沙子数量就相当于一个先凸上去，再回落到0的图像. 利用等差数列求和公式进行计算. 比较坑的一点是中间运算过程会爆long long,一个比较好的处理方法是将long long全部转化成double来做.

entry.title: Codeforces 985 C. Liebig's Barrels
entry.content:
题目大意  有n*k个木板，要装n个木桶，每个木桶需要k个木板，定义一个木桶的权值为其木板的最小值，求所有木桶的权值和的最大值.这些木桶的权值的最大值和最小值之差要≤l. 提示  答案和什么有关就从那一方面去考虑. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 100010;ll n,k,L,a[maxn],m,cnt,b[maxn],num[maxn],sum[maxn],ans;ll find(){ ll l = 1,r = cnt,res = -1; while (l <= r) { ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (b[mid] - b[1] <= L) { res = mid; l = mid + 1; } else r = mid - 1; } return res;}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&k,&L); m = n * k; for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); b[i] = a[i]; } sort(b + 1,b + 1 + m); cnt = unique(b + 1,b + 1 + m) - b - 1; if (k == 1) { if (b[cnt] - b[1] > L) { printf("0
"); return 0; } for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) ans += a[i]; printf("%lld
",ans); } else { for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) { a[i] = lower_bound(b + 1,b + 1 + cnt,a[i]) - b; num[a[i]]++; } for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + num[i]; ll pos = find(); if (pos == -1) { printf("0
"); return 0; } ll temp = sum[cnt] - sum[pos]; ll p = temp / (k - 1),q = k - (temp % (k - 1)); ll cur = pos; bool flag = true; for (ll i = 1; i <= p; i++) { if (!cur) { flag = false; break; } ans += b[cur]; num[cur]--; if (!num[cur]) cur--; } if (!flag) { printf("0
"); return 0; } if (q != k) { for (ll i = 1; i <= q; i++) { if (!cur) { flag = false; break; } if (i == q) ans += b[cur]; num[cur]--; if (!num[cur]) cur--; } } int res = 0; while (cur != 0) { res++; if (res == k) { res = 0; ans += b[cur]; } num[cur]--; if (!num[cur]) cur--; } printf("%lld
",ans); } return 0;} 分析  如果没有限制条件，那么将所有木板从大到小排序依次选k个拼成一个木桶即可保证权值和最大. 现在有了限制条件，木桶的最小权值一定是长度最小的木板！那么可以求出哪些木板的长度作为木桶的权值时合法. 对于不合法的木板组成的集合，从中挑k-1个与合法的集合中最大的拼在一起，就能保证拼成的木桶合法. 对于不够k-1个的情况要特殊处理一下.对于剩下的木板就没有限制条件了.  如果中途木板都用完了，要输出0. 注意边界.

entry.title: LeetCode466
entry.content: 题目大意定义conn(s,n)为n个字符串s首位相接连成的字符串. 给定s1,n1,s2,n2.求一个最大的整数m,满足conn(conn(s2,n2),m)能由conn(s1,n1)生成. 一个字符串能被另一个字符串生成当且仅当能从第一个字符串中删去某些字符得到第二个字符串. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 110;char s1[maxn],s2[maxn];ll n1,n2,len1,len2,f[maxn][31],ans;int main(){ scanf("%s",s1); len1 = strlen(s1); scanf("%lld",&n1); scanf("%s",s2); len2 = strlen(s2); scanf("%lld",&n2); for (ll i = 0; i < len1; i++) { ll pos = i; f[i][0] = 0; for (ll j = 0; j < len2; j++) { ll cnt = 0; while (s1[pos] != s2[j]) { pos = (pos + 1) % len1; if (++cnt >= len1) { printf("0\n"); return 0; } } pos = (pos + 1) % len1; f[i][0] += cnt + 1; } } for (ll j = 1; j <= 30; j++) for (ll i = 0; i < len1; i++) f[i][j] = f[i][j - 1] + f[(i + f[i][j - 1]) % len1][j - 1]; for (ll i = 0; i < len1; i++) { ll res = 0,x = 0; for (ll j = 30; j >= 0; j--) if (x + f[x % len1][j] <= len1 * n1) { x += f[x % len1][j]; res += (1 << j); } ans = max(ans,res); } printf("%lld\n",ans / n2); return 0;} 分析  这道题如果能想到用dp做基本上就成功了.  首先化简公式:conn(conn(s2,n2),m) = conn(s2,n2 * m),令n2 *m = M,求得最大的一个M后除以n2就是答案了. 那么问题就转变成了求满足conn(s2,M) = conn(s1,n1)的M的最大值. 我一开始的想法是看一个s1能生成多少个s2,然后利用数学方法求解. 这样会有一个问题：s1可能会有一部分没用完，数学方法显然不能针对这样的特殊情况进行处理. 但这正好也能让我们想到dp，需要记录当前的起始点是哪一个. 要求M的最大值，可以想到将M变成状态的值,那么$f_{i,j}$表示当前的起始点是i,s1已经用了j个字符(≤s1*n1),能得到的最大的M是多少. 由于s1*n1过大，这种方法行不通. 事实上M可能会比较小，至少从数量级上看是比s1*n1小得多，那么可以想到一种常用的方法对状态进行优化：当状态多，状态表示的值少时，可以将它们交换. 那么$f_{i,j}$表示起始点是i,已经拼了j个s2所用的s1的字符数量. 最后只需要从大到小枚举j,找到第一个$f_{i,j} ≤ s1 * n1$的j即可.状态转移也很显然：$f_{i,j} = f_{i,j - 1} + f_{(i + f_{i,j - 1}) \% |s1|,1}$.  这样转移会非常慢，考虑到一个一个拼s2和两两拼s2最后的结果都是一样的，可以倍增优化转移. 令$f_{i,j}$表示起始点为i,拼了$2^j$个s2所用的s1的字符的数量. 转移和上面基本上是一样的. 最后统计答案就从大到小枚举j,若$cnt + f_{i,j} ≤ n1 * s1$,那么$cnt += f_{i,j}$,并且$ans += 2^j$. 总结  要能从小样例中看出问题的答案可由相同的子问题求解得到，于是想到dp. 若写出来的dp方程一维是线性增长的，并且方程比较简单. (表示的状态一般是第几个，和时多少),那么可以考虑用倍增优化.

entry.title: bzoj5248 [2018多省省队联测]一双木棋
entry.content: 中文题面Description菲菲和牛牛在一块n行m列的棋盘上下棋，菲菲执黑棋先手，牛牛执白棋后手。棋局开始时，棋盘上没有任何棋子，两人轮流在格子上落子，直到填满棋盘时结束。落子的规则是：一个格子可以落子当且仅当这个格子内没有棋子且这个格子的左侧及上方的所有格子内都有棋子。棋盘的每个格子上，都写有两个非负整数，从上到下第i行中从左到右第j列的格子上的两个整数记作Aij、Bij。在游戏结束后，菲菲和牛牛会分别计算自己的得分：菲菲的得分是所有有黑棋的格子上的Aij之和，牛牛的得分是所有有白棋的格子上的Bij的和。菲菲和牛牛都希望，自己的得分减去对方的得分得到的结果最大。现在他们想知道，在给定的棋盘上，如果双方都采用最优策略且知道对方会采用最优策略，那么，最终的结果如何Input第一行包含两个正整数n,m，保证n,m≤10。接下来n行，每行m个非负整数，按从上到下从左到右的顺序描述每个格子上的第一个非负整数：其中第i行中第j个数表示Aij。接下来n行，每行m个非负整数，按从上到下从左到右的顺序描述每个格子上的第二个非负整数：其中第i行中第j个数表示Bijn, m ≤ 10 ， Aij, Bij ≤ 100000Output输出一个整数，表示菲菲的得分减去牛牛的得分的结果。Sample Input2 3 2 7 3 9 1 2 3 7 2 2 3 1Sample Output2 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172#include <cstdio>#include <map>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const int maxn = 12,inf = 0x7fffffff;int n,m,a[maxn][maxn],b[maxn][maxn],num[maxn];map<ll,int>f;ll hashh(){ ll res = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) res = res * 11 + num[i]; return res;}int dfs(int human,ll sta){ if (f.count(sta)) return f[sta]; int ans; if (human == 1) { ans = -inf; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (num[i - 1] > num[i]) { num[i]++; ll temp = hashh(); int temp2 = dfs(human ^ 1,temp) + a[i][num[i]]; ans = max(ans,temp2); num[i]--; } } else { ans = inf; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (num[i - 1] > num[i]) { num[i]++; ll temp = hashh(); ans = min(ans,dfs(human ^ 1,temp) - b[i][num[i]]); num[i]--; } } return f[sta] = ans;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) scanf("%d",&a[i][j]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) scanf("%d",&b[i][j]); ll temp = 0; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) temp = temp * 11 + m; f[temp] = 0; num[0] = m; printf("%d\n",dfs(1,0)); return 0;} 分析  第一次写对抗搜索. 之前没接触过这类题，在考场上看不懂题目，不知道双方到底要怎么走，于是gg.  每个人在自己的回合肯定都要走最优的策略，搜索所有可能的后继状态，取最优的状态转移到当前局面，用记忆化搜索. 比较关键的一点是用什么表示状态?  一种做法是记录轮廓线，用长为2n的二进制数表示，若第i位为1，说明这一位置的轮廓线是竖着的，否则是横着的，由轮廓线可以推出有哪些合法的后继转移. 这种做法太麻烦，另外一种表示状态的方法是记录每一行放了多少个. hash一下丢到map中. 这种做法可以快速知道第i行放了多少个，以便做出判断当前决策是否合法.  对抗搜索要分人决策！

entry.title: Codeforces 957 C. Three-level Laser
entry.content: 题目大意  从一个序列中选3个递增的数，使得$(E_k - E_j) / (E_k - E_i)$最大. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243#include <string>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,u,a[maxn];double ans = -1.0;int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&u); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); sort(a + 1,a + 1 + n); for (int i = 1; i <= n - 2; i++) { if (a[i + 2] - a[i] > u) continue; int l = i + 2,r = n,res = 0; while (l <= r) { int mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (a[mid] - a[i] <= u) { res = mid; l = mid + 1; } else r = mid - 1; } ans = max(ans,(double)(a[res] - a[i + 1]) / (double)(a[res] - a[i])); } if (ans < -0.5) printf("-1"); else printf("%.9lf\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  很显然的结论：j = i + 1.  有了这个结论以后，就可以把j和i看作一个数. 那么实际上只需要确定两个数的位置即可. 我一开始的想法是二分比值大小，但是二分了后不知道怎么去判定. 于是想着枚举一个数，枚举哪一个呢？ k比较特殊，就尝试枚举k,二分i. 但$a_{i + 1} - a_i$的值是不一样的，答案不具备单调性! 那么就只要枚举i,二分k. 容易证明，k越大，比值越大. 只需要保证k在上界内即可.

entry.title: Codeforces 957 C. Three-level Laser
entry.content: 题目大意n天中，在每一天的水位处打上标记，并统计该天位于标记之上的标记数量是多少(标记重叠算一个)，求每天位于标记之下的标记数量的和. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829#include <string>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,b[maxn],maxx[maxn];long long ans;int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&b[i]); maxx[i] = max(maxx[i - 1],b[i]); } for (int i = n - 1; i >= 1; i--) if (maxx[i + 1] - 2 >= maxx[i]) maxx[i] = maxx[i + 1] - 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) ans += maxx[i] - b[i]; printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  解决这道题最好的方法是对着第一个样例手动模拟一遍. 在手动模拟的过程中，会想到一个问题：如何确定当前有多少个不重叠的标记？ 然后发现数量为0的时候比较难以处理.有可能水位到了最高点，又有可能多了一个标记. 怎么确定是哪一种情况呢？ 从后往前判断!  倒着处理. 因为每一天最多只会增加一个标记，所以需要满足$m_{i + 1} ≤ m_i + 1$,如果出现了不满足限制的情况，说明中间出现的0的情况是多了一个标记. 为了使得答案最小，取$m_i$的最大值作为最后的标记数，从后往前，若出现$m_{i + 1} ≥ m_i + 2$这种情况，就将$m_i$改成$m_{i + 1} - 1$. 最后$m_i$就是到第i天的标记数.

entry.title: Codeforces 957 E. Contact ATC
entry.content: 题目大意数轴上有n个人，每个人有位置和速度. 有风，速度为v,范围在[-w,w],求有多少对人能在某一种风的速度下同时到达原点. 提示  根据同时到达原点列出方程. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172#include <string>#include <cmath>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 100010;ll n,a[maxn],b[maxn],c[maxn],ans;double w;struct node{ double x,v; ll id;}e[maxn];bool cmp(node a,node b){ return fabs(a.x * b.v) < fabs(b.x * a.v);}void update(ll x){ while (x <= n) { c[x]++; x += x & (-x); }}ll query(ll x){ ll res = 0; while (x) { res += c[x]; x -= x & (-x); } return res;}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lf",&n,&w); w += 1e-6; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lf%lf",&e[i].x,&e[i].v); e[i].v -= w; e[i].id = i; } sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) a[i] = e[i].id; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) e[i].v += 2 * w; sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) b[e[i].id] = i; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ans += i - 1 - query(b[a[i]]); update(b[a[i]]); } printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  第i个人到达原点所花的时间为：$x_i / (v_i + p)$ p在[-w,w]内. 对于每一个i,统计有多少个j,使得j的时间与i的时间相同. 可以列方程，但是p是变元，非常难解. 我一开始的想法是表示出p,用p的范围列出不等式，然后求解. 但是这样的话不能把结构相同的部分放到一起，也就不能快速求个数.  这种问题算是一种新题型吧. 可以发现：随着p的增大，每个人到原点所花的时间是单调的. 利用极端法：若p = -w时，A比B先到，p=w时，B比A先到，那么A,B一定能在p∈(-w,w)时同时到达原点. 利用了函数图像. 那怎么统计呢？  一个非常巧妙的方法：统计在p=-w时B比A先到但是当p=w时B没到A先到的二元组个数. 将所有人按照p = -w和p = w到达原点所花的时间分成两个序列,从小到大排序. 枚举第一个序列，在第二个序列中求逆序对数即可.算是维护了二元偏序关系吧.  可能会出现两个人在p = -w或p = w时同时到达. 这样的话排序就没有意义了(只是按照输入顺序排序). 解决方法是将w变成浮点型，加上合适的eps,这样就将p的范围扩大了，原本会在p=-w或p=w时同时到达的人所化的时间就会有细微的差别了. 总结  几种与方程有关的题型：  1.单变量求解型：直接解.  2.单变量就个数型：二分or三分求上下界，或者直接找到解的特征值统计.  3.noip2014 d2t3,取模.  4.双变量求个数型：等式左右两边化为结构相同的式子，用map存值的个数.  5.双变量有变元型：观察函数图像，求交点.  边界问题可以通过+eps来避免. 参加poj的star in your windows.(整体平移法). 这种处理方法适用于所求的点不能在边界上这类问题.

entry.title: Codeforces 957 B. Mystical Mosaic
entry.content: 题目大意  一个n*m的网格，一开始所有点都是白色的，可以进行若干次以下的操作：选出一个行集合和一个列集合，将这两个集合的行列的交点染成黑色. 每一行和每一列最多被选一次. 给定最终局面问能否达成. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243#include <string>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;int n,m;string str[60];bool flag = true;bool check(int x,int y){ for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) if (str[i][y] == '#' && str[i] != str[x]) return false; return true;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) cin >> str[i]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < m; j++) if (str[i][j] == '#' && !check(i,j)) { flag = false; break; } if (!flag) break; } if (flag) puts("Yes"); else puts("No"); return 0;} 分析  观察样例可以发现：若最终局面的(i,j)位置为黑色，那么所有第j列是黑色的行的状态都必须是一样的,逐个判断即可.

entry.title: poj2411 Mondriaan's Dream
entry.content: 英文题面Description Squares and rectangles fascinated the famous Dutch painter Piet Mondriaan. One night, after producing the drawings in his ‘toilet series’ (where he had to use his toilet paper to draw on, for all of his paper was filled with squares and rectangles), he dreamt of filling a large rectangle with small rectangles of width 2 and height 1 in varying ways. Expert as he was in this material, he saw at a glance that he’ll need a computer to calculate the number of ways to fill the large rectangle whose dimensions were integer values, as well. Help him, so that his dream won’t turn into a nightmare!Input The input contains several test cases. Each test case is made up of two integer numbers: the height h and the width w of the large rectangle. Input is terminated by h=w=0. Otherwise, 1<=h,w<=11.Output For each test case, output the number of different ways the given rectangle can be filled with small rectangles of size 2 times 1. Assume the given large rectangle is oriented, i.e. count symmetrical tilings multiple times.Sample Input 1 21 31 42 22 32 42 114 110 0Sample Output 10123514451205Source Ulm Local 2000 翻译给你一个n*m的棋盘，用1*2的多米诺骨牌去覆盖它，求方案数. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll n,m,sta[1 << 12],f[12][1 << 12];int main(){ while (scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&m) != EOF) { if (n == 0 && m == 0) break; for (ll i = 0; i < (1 << m); i++) { bool cnt = 0,odd = 0; int x = i,len = 0; while (x) { len++; x >>= 1; } for (ll j = 0; j < m; j++) { if (i >> j & 1) odd |= cnt,cnt = 0; else cnt ^= 1; } odd |= cnt; sta[i] = odd; } memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); f[0][0] = 1; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (ll j = 0; j < (1 << m); j++) { f[i][j] = 0; for (ll k = 0; k < (1 << m); k++) if ((j & k) == 0 && sta[j | k] == 0) f[i][j] += f[i - 1][k]; } printf("%lld\n",f[n][0]); } return 0;} 分析  多米诺骨牌覆盖的套路题. 以行为阶段，状压. 若第i位为1，则说明这是竖着的多米诺骨牌的上面一片，否则是其他情况. 转移时需要检查第i-1行与第i行的状态之间是否合法. 若$sta[i]and sta[i - 1]=0$并且$sta[i] | sta[i - 1]$中的每一段连续的0的个数都是偶数个，那么它们就是合法的. 第一个判断是为了让上端出现的多米诺骨牌下端也出现，第二个判断是为了使横着放的多米诺骨牌合法.  一个坑点：千万在外层初始化每个状态中每一段连续的0的个数是不是偶数个，因为状态的位数与m有关. m对答案会有影响!

entry.title: Codeforces 24 D. Broken robot
entry.content: 英文题面outputstandard outputYou received as a gift a very clever robot walking on a rectangular board. Unfortunately, you understood that it is broken and behaves rather strangely (randomly). The board consists of N rows and M columns of cells. The robot is initially at some cell on the i-th row and the j-th column. Then at every step the robot could go to some another cell. The aim is to go to the bottommost (N-th) row. The robot can stay at it’s current cell, move to the left, move to the right, or move to the cell below the current. If the robot is in the leftmost column it cannot move to the left, and if it is in the rightmost column it cannot move to the right. At every step all possible moves are equally probable. Return the expected number of step to reach the bottommost row. InputOn the first line you will be given two space separated integers N and M (1 ≤ N, M ≤ 1000). On the second line you will be given another two space separated integers i and j (1 ≤ i ≤ N, 1 ≤ j ≤ M) — the number of the initial row and the number of the initial column. Note that, (1, 1) is the upper left corner of the board and (N, M) is the bottom right corner. OutputOutput the expected number of steps on a line of itself with at least 4 digits after the decimal point. ExamplesinputCopy10 1010 4outputCopy0.0000000000inputCopy10 145 14outputCopy18.0038068653 题目大意一个机器人在$(x,y)$处，它要走到第$n$行的某一个格子上去，每一步中要么不动，要么往下、左、右走一步，求期望步数. 提示  期望dp的一般处理步骤，决策成环形的处理方法. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const double eps = 1e-6;int n,m,x,y;double f[1010][1010],a[1010],b[1010],c[1010],r[1010],p[1010],q[1010];void solve(int row){ r[1] = f[row + 1][1] / 3.0 + 1.0; for (int i = 2; i < m; i++) r[i] = f[row + 1][i] / 4.0 + 1.0; r[m] = f[row + 1][m] / 3.0 + 1.0; b[1] = 2.0 / 3.0; c[1] = -1.0 / 3.0; for (int i = 2; i < m; i++) { a[i] = -1.0 / 4.0; b[i] = 3.0 / 4.0; c[i] = -1.0 / 4.0; } a[m] = -1.0 / 3.0; b[m] = 2.0 / 3.0; p[1] = c[1] / b[1]; q[1] = r[1] / b[1]; for (int i = 2; i <= m; i++) { p[i] = c[i] / (b[i] - p[i - 1] * a[i]); q[i] = (r[i] - a[i] * q[i - 1]) / (b[i] - p[i - 1] * a[i]); } f[row][m] = q[m]; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 1; i--) f[row][i] = q[i] - p[i] * f[row][i + 1];}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d%d",&n,&m,&x,&y); if (m == 1) { double temp = n - x; printf("%.4lf\n",temp * 2); } else if (x == n) printf("0.0000"); else { for (int i = n - 1; i >= x; i--) solve(i); printf("%.4lf\n",f[x][y]); } return 0;} 分析  dp的状态表示以及转移还是挺好想的. 只是这个转移是环形的. 处理方法是先以行为阶段，从第n行向第1行转移. 这样未知数就都是第i层的了，m个未知数，m个方程，高斯消元解之. 不过高斯消元的复杂度是$O(n^3)$的，会TLE. 一般遇到高斯消元会TLE的问题，都要分析清楚矩阵的特征,针对特征矩阵来用不同的方法求解. 将系数矩阵写出来后发现这是一个三对角矩阵，通过向前消元+回代的方式可以求解，具体可见blog:http://www.cnblogs.com/xpvincent/archive/2013/01/25/2877411.html.

entry.title: Codeforces 982 D. Shark
entry.content:
题目大意有一个长度为n的序列a,任意选择一个数k，将序列a中严格小于k的数标记为1，大于等于k的数标记为-1,要求每一段连续的1所包含的1的数量都是一样的，并且要使得段数最多，k最小，求k. 提示  可以二分吗？求确定的解的一般方法是什么？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125126127#include <queue>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 1000010,inf = 0x7fffffff;ll n,a[maxn],b[maxn],num[maxn],cnt,vis[maxn],tot,pos[maxn],maxxx,ans = inf;struct node{ ll l,r,num;} e[maxn];int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); b[i] = a[i]; } sort(b + 1,b + 1 + n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { a[i] = lower_bound(b + 1,b + 1 + n,a[i]) - b; pos[a[i]] = i; } if (n == 1) printf("%lld
",b[1] + 1); else { for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ++cnt; e[++tot].l = pos[i]; e[tot].r = pos[i]; e[tot].num = 1; num[1]++; ll cur = pos[i]; vis[cur] = tot; if (cur == 1) { if (vis[cur + 1]) { cnt--; e[tot].l = cur; e[tot].r = e[vis[cur + 1]].r; ll temp = e[vis[cur + 1]].num; e[tot].num = temp + 1; num[e[tot].num]++; num[temp]--; num[1]--; vis[e[tot].l] = vis[e[tot].r] = tot; } } else if (cur == n) { if (vis[cur - 1]) { cnt--; e[tot].l = e[vis[cur - 1]].l; e[tot].r = cur; ll temp = e[vis[cur - 1]].num; e[tot].num = temp + 1; num[e[tot].num]++; num[temp]--; num[1]--; vis[e[tot].l] = vis[e[tot].r] = tot; } } else if (vis[cur - 1] && vis[cur + 1]) { cnt -= 2; e[tot].l = e[vis[cur - 1]].l; e[tot].r = e[vis[cur + 1]].r; e[tot].num = e[vis[cur - 1]].num + e[vis[cur + 1]].num + 1; num[1]--; num[e[vis[cur - 1]].num]--; num[e[vis[cur + 1]].num]--; num[e[tot].num]++; vis[e[tot].l] = vis[e[tot].r] = tot; } else if (vis[cur - 1]) { cnt--; e[tot].l = e[vis[cur - 1]].l; e[tot].r = cur; e[tot].num = e[vis[cur - 1]].num + 1; num[1]--; num[e[vis[cur - 1]].num]--; num[e[tot].num]++; vis[e[tot].l] = vis[e[tot].r] = tot; } else if (vis[cur + 1]) { cnt--; e[tot].l = cur; e[tot].r = e[vis[cur + 1]].r; e[tot].num = e[vis[cur + 1]].num + 1; num[1]--; num[e[vis[cur + 1]].num]--; num[e[tot].num]++; vis[e[tot].l] = vis[e[tot].r] = tot; } if (cnt == num[e[tot].num]) { if (cnt > maxxx) { maxxx = cnt; ans = b[i] + 1; } else if (cnt == maxxx && b[i] + 1 < ans) ans = b[i] + 1; } } if (ans == inf) printf("%lld
",b[n] + 1); else printf("%lld
",ans); } return 0;} 分析  我的第一想法是二分. 因为要求出k的具体值，而k的取值范围又很大. 但是找不到单调性. 三分就更不说了.  这两种方法都失效后很自然地想到了枚举. 但是$a_i ≤ 10^9$,这怎么能枚举地完.要想使得枚举不超时，复杂度就必须和n相关. 可以想到k的取值只可能是$a_i + 1$,结论很显然，因为若$k = a_i + 1$时合法，那么k在$a_i + 1到a_{i+1}$之间也一定合法. 而前者显然更小. 值域一下子从$10^9$缩小到了$n$.  能想到这里，接下来就很简单了. 当从i变成i+1时，会有一个点从-1变成1，将其与相邻的可能存在的连通块合并. 分情况讨论即可，注意合并的操作顺序.

entry.title: Codeforces 982 C. Cut 'em all!
entry.content: 题目大意n个点的树，问最多能删多少条边使得剩下的每个连通块内的点数都是偶数. 提示从加减法的奇偶性去考虑. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253#include <queue>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 200010;int n,head[maxn],to[maxn],nextt[maxn],tot = 1,sizee[maxn],ans;void add(int x,int y){ to[tot] = y; nextt[tot] = head[x]; head[x] = tot++;}void dfs(int u,int fa){ sizee[u] = 1; for (int i = head[u];i;i = nextt[i]) { int v = to[i]; if (v == fa) continue; dfs(v,u); sizee[u] += sizee[v]; if (sizee[v] % 2 == 0) ans++; }}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); add(x,y); add(y,x); } if (n % 2 == 1) printf("-1"); else { dfs(1,0); printf("%d\n",ans); } return 0;} 分析  若n为奇数，那么肯定是做不到的，因为最后不管是有奇数个点数为偶数的连通块还是偶数个，总点数一定是偶数，矛盾. 只考虑n为偶数的情况. 我一开始的想法是把树划分成尽量多的只有两个点的连通块,或许能保证割的边最多. 事实上有些情况是分不了的. 这说明思考的方向错了！  从产生贡献的东西角度来思考，产生贡献的是边而不是点！如果考虑保留哪些点，很容易造成不合法局面(边不能匹配). 如果考虑边的话，只需要考虑每一条边能不能割，如果割了这一条边，那么这条边所连的子树就变成了一个独立的连通块，点数必须为偶数. 在树上递归思考下去，可以得出一个结论：若一条边所连的子树的大小为偶数，则这条边可以删. 一次dfs即可.

entry.title: poj2228 Naptime
entry.content: 英文题面Description Goneril is a very sleep-deprived cow. Her day is partitioned into N (3 <= N <= 3,830) equal time periods but she can spend only B (2 <= B < N) not necessarily contiguous periods in bed. Due to her bovine hormone levels, each period has its own utility U_i (0 <= U_i <= 200,000), which is the amount of rest derived from sleeping during that period. These utility values are fixed and are independent of what Goneril chooses to do, including when she decides to be in bed. With the help of her alarm clock, she can choose exactly which periods to spend in bed and which periods to spend doing more critical items such as writing papers or watching baseball. However, she can only get in or out of bed on the boundaries of a period. She wants to choose her sleeping periods to maximize the sum of the utilities over the periods during which she is in bed. Unfortunately, every time she climbs in bed, she has to spend the first period falling asleep and gets no sleep utility from that period. The periods wrap around in a circle; if Goneril spends both periods N and 1 in bed, then she does get sleep utility out of period 1. What is the maximum total sleep utility Goneril can achieve?Input Line 1: Two space-separated integers: N and B Lines 2..N+1: Line i+1 contains a single integer, U_i, between 0 and 200,000 inclusiveOutput The day is divided into 5 periods, with utilities 2, 0, 3, 1, 4 in that order. Goneril must pick 3 periods.Sample Input 5 320314Sample Output 6Hint INPUT DETAILS: The day is divided into 5 periods, with utilities 2, 0, 3, 1, 4 in that order. Goneril must pick 3 periods. OUTPUT DETAILS: Goneril can get total utility 6 by being in bed during periods 4, 5, and 1, with utilities 0 [getting to sleep], 4, and 2 respectively.Source USACO 2005 January Gold 翻译一个星球上一天由n个小时构成，在第i个小时睡觉能够恢复$U_i$点体力，有一头牛要休息$B_i$个小时，可以不连续. 但是每连续的一段的第一个小时都不恢复体力，第N个小时和下一天的第1小时是连续的，要求每N个小时休息B小时，求如何安排使得每天恢复的体力最多？ 分析  链上的dp和在环上的dp有什么不同？ 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 3831;int n,b,u[maxn],f[2][maxn][2],ans,now,last;int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&b); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&u[i]); memset(f,-0x3f,sizeof(f)); now = 0,last = 1; f[last][0][0] = f[last][1][1] = 0; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= b; j++) { f[now][j][0] = max(f[last][j][0],f[last][j][1]); if (j > 0) f[now][j][1] = max(f[last][j - 1][0],f[last][j - 1][1] + u[i]); } swap(now,last); } ans = max(f[last][b][0],f[last][b][1]); memset(f,-0x3f,sizeof(f)); now = 0,last = 1; f[last][1][1] = u[1]; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= b; j++) { f[now][j][0] = max(f[last][j][0],f[last][j][1]); if (j > 0) f[now][j][1] = max(f[last][j - 1][0],f[last][j - 1][1] + u[i]); } swap(now,last); } ans = max(ans,f[last][b][1]); printf("%d\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  环形dp一个基本的处理方法是将环从某一处断开，形成一条链，再将这条链复制一份接到后面，在这条新链上求. 这种做法在这道题上会有问题：先要枚举这N天的起始点，然后枚举长度为n的序列，在这个序列上dp，时间复杂度是$O(n^3)$的.对于环形dp,还有另一种处理方法：先将环从任意一个位置断开，不考虑连接处的情况，然后再考虑连接处会有哪些情况，做两次dp,将答案合并就是原问题的答案. 在这道题中，如果将环从第N天处断开，那么在第1天休息就不能恢复体力. 连接处的情况就是：第N天和第1天休息，并且在第1天恢复体力. 那么在dp初始化和统计答案的时候强制让第1天和第n天休息即可.  $f_{i,j,0} = min\{f_{i - 1,j,0},f_{i - 1.j,1}\}$  $f_{i,j,1} = min\{f_{i - 1,j - 1,0},f_{i - 1.j - 1,1} + u_i\}$.

entry.title: poj3585 Accumulation Degree
entry.content: 英文题面Description Trees are an important component of the natural landscape because of their prevention of erosion and the provision of a specific ather-sheltered ecosystem in and under their foliage. Trees have also been found to play an important role in producing oxygen and reducing carbon dioxide in the atmosphere, as well as moderating ground temperatures. They are also significant elements in landscaping and agriculture, both for their aesthetic appeal and their orchard crops (such as apples). Wood from trees is a common building material. Trees also play an intimate role in many of the world’s mythologies. Many scholars are interested in finding peculiar properties about trees, such as the center of a tree, tree counting, tree coloring. A(x) is one of such properties. A(x) (accumulation degree of node x) is defined as follows: Each edge of the tree has an positive capacity.The nodes with degree of one in the tree are named terminals.The flow of each edge can’t exceed its capacity.A(x) is the maximal flow that node x can flow to other terminal nodes.Since it may be hard to understand the definition, an example is showed below: A(1)=11+5+8=24Details: 1->2 11 1->4->3 5 1->4->5 8(since 1->4 has capacity of 13)A(2)=5+6=11Details: 2->1->4->3 5 2->1->4->5 6A(3)=5Details: 3->4->5 5A(4)=11+5+10=26Details: 4->1->2 11 4->3 5 4->5 10A(5)=10Details: 5->4->1->2 10The accumulation degree of a tree is the maximal accumulation degree among its nodes. Here your task is to find the accumulation degree of the given trees. Input The first line of the input is an integer T which indicates the number of test cases. The first line of each test case is a positive integer n. Each of the following n - 1 lines contains three integers x, y, z separated by spaces, representing there is an edge between node x and node y, and the capacity of the edge is z. Nodes are numbered from 1 to n.All the elements are nonnegative integers no more than 200000. You may assume that the test data are all tree metrics. Output For each test case, output the result on a single line. Sample Input 151 2 111 4 133 4 54 5 10Sample Output 26Source South Central China 2008 hosted by NUDT 翻译一棵树，可以任选一个点作为源点，度数为1的点作为汇点，每条边有容量，求最大流. 提示  如果给定了源点要怎么做？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 400010;ll T,n,head[maxn],to[maxn],nextt[maxn],tot = 1,w[maxn],du[maxn],d[maxn],f[maxn],ans;void add(ll x,ll y,ll z){ w[tot] = z; to[tot] = y; nextt[tot] = head[x]; head[x] = tot++;}void dfs(ll u,ll fa){ d[u] = 0; for (ll i = head[u];i;i = nextt[i]) { ll v = to[i]; if (v == fa) continue; dfs(v,u); if (du[v] == 1) d[u] += w[i]; else d[u] += min(w[i],d[v]); }}void dfs2(ll u,ll fa){ for (ll i = head[u];i;i = nextt[i]) { ll v = to[i]; if (v == fa) continue; if (du[u] == 1) f[v] = w[i] + d[v]; else f[v] = min(w[i],f[u] - min(w[i],d[v])) + d[v]; dfs2(v,u); }}int main(){ scanf("%lld",&T); while (T--) { memset(head,0,sizeof(head)); tot = 1; memset(du,0,sizeof(du)); memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); ans = 0; memset(d,0,sizeof(d)); scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i < n; i++) { ll x,y,z; scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&y,&z); add(x,y,z); add(y,x,z); du[x]++; du[y]++; } dfs(1,0); f[1] = d[1]; dfs2(1,0); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) ans = max(ans,f[i]); printf("%lld\n",ans); } return 0;} 分析  如果给定了源点root,那么只需要树形dp即可求出答案. 即$f_u = Σmin\{f_v,w_{u,v}\}$v是u的子节点. 涉及到换根操作，通常的处理方法是自顶向下再做一次更新. 一开始根是x,将根换成y,那么y的最大流就是y流向其子树的最大流和x流向y的最大流. 开两个数组维护.  两次更新操作顺序不一样. 第一次是先递归，再用子节点更新.第二次是先更新，再递归. 注意特判度数为1的点.

entry.title: 金字塔
entry.content: 中文题面虽然探索金字塔是极其老套的剧情，但是这一队探险家还是到了某金字塔脚下。经过多年的研究，科学家对这座金字塔的内部结构已经有所了解。首先，金字塔由若干房间组成，房间之间连有通道。如果把房间看做节点，通道看做边的话，整个金字塔呈现一个有根树结构，节点的子树之间有序，金字塔有唯一的一个入口通向树根。并且，每个房间的墙壁都涂有若干种颜色的一种。探险队员打算进一步了解金字塔的结构，为此，他们使用了一种特殊设计的机器人。这种机器人会从入口进入金字塔，之后对金字塔进行深度优先遍历。机器人每进入一个房间（无论是第一次进入还是返回），都会记录这个房间的颜色。最后，机器人会从入口退出金字塔。显然，机器人会访问每个房间至少一次，并且穿越每条通道恰好两次（两个方向各一次），然后，机器人会得到一个颜色序列。但是，探险队员发现这个颜色序列并不能唯一确定金字塔的结构。现在他们想请你帮助他们计算，对于一个给定的颜色序列，有多少种可能的结构会得到这个序列。由于结果可能会非常大，你只需要输出答案对 $10^9$ 取模之后的值。输入格式输入文件包含一行，含有一个字符串，表示机器人得到的颜色序列。输出格式输出一个整数表示答案。样例输入ABABABA样例输出5 提示  在树上dfs得到的一个序列，能想到什么？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 310,mod = 1e9;char s[maxn];int f[maxn][maxn],n;int main(){ scanf("%s",s + 1); n = strlen(s + 1); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) f[i][i] = 1; for (int len = 2; len <= n; len++) for (int i = 1; i + len - 1 <= n; i++) { int j = i + len - 1; if (s[i] != s[j]) f[i][j] = 0; else { f[i][j] = f[i + 1][j - 1]; f[i][j] %= mod; for (int k = i + 2; k <= j - 2; k++) if (s[k] == s[i]) { f[i][j] += 1LL * f[i + 1][k - 1] * f[k][j] % mod; f[i][j] %= mod; } } } printf("%d\n",f[1][n]); return 0;} 分析  由在树上dfs形成的一个序列可以想到dfs序. 因为dfs是一个一个子树遍历的，所以一个子树在所形成的序列上是连续的. 由数据范围很容易想到区间dp,即令$f_{l,r}$表示子串S[l,r]对应着多少种可能的金字塔结构. 根据区间dp的一般转移形式，很容易想到$f_{l,r} = Σf_{i,k} * f_{k + 1,j}$.这种转移方式是错的.  考虑序列ABABABA,两种方案A|BAB|A|B|A和A|B|A|BAB|A是一样的，因为它们都对应一个A延伸出3个B. 为什么会错呢？因为k只是我们枚举的一个分割点, 每一层枚举一个分割点，到最后可能就会有多种决策产生同一种局面，而他们选择的分割点相同，只是选择的次序不同罢了,也就是说：我们考虑的是排列的情况，而题目要求组合的情况. 要去重就必须要在每一层中确定选择几个分割点，并且还要确定这几个分割点的位置. 这样就有点搜索的意味了，会TLE.  因为题目说子树是有序的，那么我们只需要让每一步的不同决策可能产生的不同局面不同即可.在第一棵子树上下手. 只考虑第一棵子树是由哪些点组成的，将k作为划分点. 如果k不相同，那么第一棵子树的大小也就不相同，整棵树也就不同了，就可以计数了. 在转移的时候，要先考虑只延伸一棵子树的情况. 因为遍历完第一棵子树后要回到根，所以在s[k] = s[r]时才能转移,在转移的时候一定要考虑状态的合法性！ 总结  dp计数问题中，若多种决策会产生同一种最终局面，就必须改变决策，使每一层的决策所导出的局面都是不同的. 转移时要考虑状态的合法性(定义).

entry.title: poj1179 Polygon
entry.content: 英文题面Description Polygon is a game for one player that starts on a polygon with N vertices, like the one in Figure 1, where N=4. Each vertex is labelled with an integer and each edge is labelled with either the symbol + (addition) or the symbol * (product). The edges are numbered from 1 to N. On the first move, one of the edges is removed. Subsequent moves involve the following steps:�pick an edge E and the two vertices V1 and V2 that are linked by E; and�replace them by a new vertex, labelled with the result of performing the operation indicated in E on the labels of V1 and V2.The game ends when there are no more edges, and its score is the label of the single vertex remaining. Consider the polygon of Figure 1. The player started by removing edge 3. After that, the player picked edge 1, then edge 4, and, finally, edge 2. The score is 0. Write a program that, given a polygon, computes the highest possible score and lists all the edges that, if removed on the first move, can lead to a game with that score.Input Your program is to read from standard input. The input describes a polygon with N vertices. It contains two lines. On the first line is the number N. The second line contains the labels of edges 1, …, N, interleaved with the vertices’ labels (first that of the vertex between edges 1 and 2, then that of the vertex between edges 2 and 3, and so on, until that of the vertex between edges N and 1), all separated by one space. An edge label is either the letter t (representing +) or the letter x (representing *). 3 <= N <= 50For any sequence of moves, vertex labels are in the range [-32768,32767].Output Your program is to write to standard output. On the first line your program must write the highest score one can get for the input polygon. On the second line it must write the list of all edges that, if removed on the first move, can lead to a game with that score. Edges must be written in increasing order, separated by one space.Sample Input 4t -7 t 4 x 2 x 5Sample Output 331 2Source IOI 1998 翻译一个图，点上标有数字，边上表有运算符号，第一轮选择一条边删掉，然后每次选两个相邻的点，将其合并为1个点，点的数字为两个点原来的数字做所连的边上的运算得到的数字. 问怎样操作能使得最后剩下的那一个数尽量大. 提示  求最值、环形、数字的数量每次减少1，能想到什么？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll inf = 0x7fffffff;ll n,f[110][110][2],op[110],a[110],ans;int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { char s[2]; scanf("%s",s); scanf("%lld",&a[i]); if (s[0] == 't') op[i] = op[i + n] = 1; else op[i] = op[i + n] = 2; a[i + n] = a[i]; } for (ll i = 1; i <= 2 * n; i++) for (ll j = 1; j <= 2 * n; j++) for (ll k = 0; k < 2; k++) { if (k == 0) f[i][j][k] = -inf; else f[i][j][k] = inf; } for (ll i = 1; i <= 2 * n; i++) f[i][i][0] = f[i][i][1] = a[i]; for (ll len = 2; len <= n; len++) for (ll i = 1; i + len - 1 <= 2 * n; i++) { ll j = i + len - 1; ll &temp0 = f[i][j][0]; ll &temp1 = f[i][j][1]; for (ll k = i; k < j; k++) { if (op[k + 1] == 2) { temp0 = max(temp0,f[i][k][0] * f[k + 1][j][0]); temp0 = max(temp0,f[i][k][1] * f[k + 1][j][1]); temp1 = min(temp1,f[i][k][1] * f[k + 1][j][1]); temp1 = min(temp1,f[i][k][1] * f[k + 1][j][0]); temp1 = min(temp1,f[i][k][0] * f[k + 1][j][1]); } else { temp0 = max(temp0,f[i][k][0] + f[k + 1][j][0]); temp1 = min(temp1,f[i][k][1] + f[k + 1][j][1]); } } } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) ans = max(ans,f[i][i + n - 1][0]); printf("%lld\n",ans); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (ans == f[i][i + n - 1][0]) printf("%lld ",i); printf("\n"); return 0;} 分析  首先这道题很容易看出来要用区间dp做. 对于环，有两种处理方法：要么枚举删掉哪一条边，要么任意选取一条边删掉并复制一份接在后面变成一条长链. 比较好的是第二种方法，因为在这条新链上考虑一条长为n的子链，就相当于割掉了一条边，并且起点已知，不用再额外话$O(n)$的时间去枚举割掉哪条边.  状态转移方程也很显然，就是令$f_{i,j}$为区间[i,j]的最大值，枚举中间点k,$f_{i,j} = max\{f_{i,k} op f_{k + 1,j}\}$ . 最后枚举起点i为哪一个即可. 事实上这种做法是错误的.因为有负数的情况，该状态设计不具备最优子结构性.那么还要维护最小值，加一维$f_{i,j,0/1}$表示区间[i,j]的最大值/最小值. 分别维护即可. 总结  环的两种处理方法，以及数的乘除运算求最值问题要考虑负数与0的情况.

entry.title: poj1742 Coins
entry.content: 英文题面Description People in Silverland use coins.They have coins of value A1,A2,A3…An Silverland dollar.One day Tony opened his money-box and found there were some coins.He decided to buy a very nice watch in a nearby shop. He wanted to pay the exact price(without change) and he known the price would not more than m.But he didn’t know the exact price of the watch.You are to write a program which reads n,m,A1,A2,A3…An and C1,C2,C3…Cn corresponding to the number of Tony’s coins of value A1,A2,A3…An then calculate how many prices(form 1 to m) Tony can pay use these coins.Input The input contains several test cases. The first line of each test case contains two integers n(1<=n<=100),m(m<=100000).The second line contains 2n integers, denoting A1,A2,A3…An,C1,C2,C3…Cn (1<=Ai<=100000,1<=Ci<=1000). The last test case is followed by two zeros.Output For each test case output the answer on a single line.Sample Input 3 101 2 4 2 1 12 51 4 2 10 0Sample Output 84Source LouTiancheng@POJ 翻译n种硬币，第i种面值为$a_i$,共有$c_i$个，问1~m内能拼出多少种面值？ 提示  背包问题的优化. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,m,num[maxn],a[maxn],c[maxn],ans,f[maxn];int main(){ while (scanf("%d%d",&n,&m) != EOF) { if (n == 0 && m == 0) break; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&c[i]); ans = 0; memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); f[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { memset(num,0,sizeof(num)); for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) { if (j - a[i] >= 0 && !f[j] && f[j - a[i]] && num[j - a[i]] < c[i]) { num[j] = num[j - a[i]] + 1; f[j] = 1; } } } for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) if (f[i]) ans++; printf("%d\n",ans); } return 0;} 分析  挺巧妙的优化. 首先很容易看出来这是一个多重背包模型. 但本题只关注可行性，那么可以采用一种策略：直到万不得已时采用当前枚举到的第i枚硬币，若$f_j$已经为1了，那么就不需要用. 因为数值都是由若干枚硬币拼成的，枚举第i枚硬币考虑的是这一枚硬币对数值的贡献，若不需要它的贡献，不加即可. 总结  可行性问题的万不得已策略.

entry.title: poj1015 Jury Compromise
entry.content:
英文题面Description In Frobnia, a far-away country, the verdicts in court trials are determined by a jury consisting of members of the general public. Every time a trial is set to begin, a jury has to be selected, which is done as follows. First, several people are drawn randomly from the public. For each person in this pool, defence and prosecution assign a grade from 0 to 20 indicating their preference for this person. 0 means total dislike, 20 on the other hand means that this person is considered ideally suited for the jury.Based on the grades of the two parties, the judge selects the jury. In order to ensure a fair trial, the tendencies of the jury to favour either defence or prosecution should be as balanced as possible. The jury therefore has to be chosen in a way that is satisfactory to both parties.We will now make this more precise: given a pool of n potential jurors and two values di (the defence’s value) and pi (the prosecution’s value) for each potential juror i, you are to select a jury of m persons. If J is a subset of {1,…, n} with m elements, then D(J ) = sum(dk) k belong to Jand P(J) = sum(pk) k belong to J are the total values of this jury for defence and prosecution.For an optimal jury J , the value |D(J) - P(J)| must be minimal. If there are several jurys with minimal |D(J) - P(J)|, one which maximizes D(J) + P(J) should be selected since the jury should be as ideal as possible for both parties.You are to write a program that implements this jury selection process and chooses an optimal jury given a set of candidates.Input The input file contains several jury selection rounds. Each round starts with a line containing two integers n and m. n is the number of candidates and m the number of jury members.These values will satisfy 1<=n<=200, 1<=m<=20 and of course m<=n. The following n lines contain the two integers pi and di for i = 1,…,n. A blank line separates each round from the next.The file ends with a round that has n = m = 0.Output For each round output a line containing the number of the jury selection round (‘Jury #1’, ‘Jury #2’, etc.).On the next line print the values D(J ) and P (J ) of your jury as shown below and on another line print the numbers of the m chosen candidates in ascending order. Output a blank before each individual candidate number.Output an empty line after each test case.Sample Input 4 21 22 34 16 20 0Sample Output Jury #1Best jury has value 6 for prosecution and value 4 for defence: 2 3Hint If your solution is based on an inefficient algorithm, it may not execute in the allotted time.Source Southwestern European Regional Contest 1996 翻译每个人有属性$a_i$和$b_i$,要求从n个人中选出m个人使得它们的$|Σa_i - b_i|$最小，若有多种选择，应当使$Σa_i + b_i$最大. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int inf = 0x7fffffff;int n,m,f[30][8100],pre[30][8100],a[210],b[210],ans,sum,pos,cnt,anss[8100],cas;bool check(int x,int y,int z){ if (!x) return false; if (pre[x][y] == z) return true; return check(x - 1,y - a[pre[x][y]],z);}int main(){ while(scanf("%d%d",&n,&m) != EOF) { memset(pre,0,sizeof(pre)); memset(anss,0,sizeof(anss)); cnt = ans = sum = pos = 0; if (n == 0 && m == 0) break; int now = 20 * m; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); a[i] = x - y; b[i] = x + y; } memset(f,-1,sizeof(f)); f[0][now] = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= 2 * now; j++) for (int k = 1; k <= n; k++) if (j - a[k] >= 0 && !check(i - 1,j - a[k],k) && f[i - 1][j - a[k]] != -1) { if (f[i][j] < f[i - 1][j - a[k]] + b[k]) { f[i][j] = f[i - 1][j - a[k]] + b[k]; pre[i][j] = k; } } ans = inf; for (int i = now; i <= 2 * now; i++) if (f[m][i] != -1) { ans = i - now; sum = f[m][i]; pos = i; break; } for (int i = now; i >= 0; i--) if (f[m][i] != -1 && (now - i < ans || (now - i == ans && f[m][i] > sum))) { ans = i - now; sum = f[m][i]; pos = i; break; } printf("Jury #%d
",++cas); int x = (ans + sum) / 2,y = (sum - ans) / 2; printf("Best jury has value %d for prosecution and value %d for defence: 
",x,y); x = m,y = pos; while (x) { anss[++cnt] = pre[x][y]; y -= a[pre[x][y]]; x--; } sort(anss + 1,anss + 1 + cnt); for(int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) printf(" %d",anss[i]); puts("
"); } return 0;} 分析  很容易看出这是一个背包问题,将每个人的$a_i - b_i$和$a_i + b_i$看作两个维度.维护可行性背包$f_{i,j,k}$,最后枚举j和k的值即可. j与k分别维护a的总和与b的总和.  这种方法因为$a_i$和$b_i$的总和可能会比较大而TLE. 不过这种做法启发我们：既然我们可以把$a_i$和$b_i$记作状态，最后枚举它们来判断可行性，那么我们也可以记录$Σa_i - b_i$到状态中,最后枚举这一维判断可行性即可. 那么$Σa_i + b_i$怎么维护呢？我们可以将$Σa_i+b_i$看作物品的价值，一开始将f数组初始化为-1,若枚举到的状态的f值不为-1，则说明合法. 根据状态中的差与状态表示的和，即可解出$Σa_i$与$Σb_i$.  几个问题：  1.绝对值如何处理？将下标整体移20 * m位即可，将20 * m当作0值.  2.如何输出方案？经典做法，开相同大小的数组记录当前状态是从哪一个状态转移而来的.  3.题目要求每个人只能被选一次，如何确保这一点？不能采取逆序枚举的方法，应当递归在路径数组中判断.算是一种新方法吧.

entry.title: Codeforces 965 E. Short Code
entry.content: 题目大意  给n个不相同的字符串，要求将所有字符串用它的前缀代替，使得这些前缀互不相同，并且长度和最小. 提示  由前缀能想到什么？ 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980#include <bits/stdc++.h>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,tot,anss;char s[maxn];struct node{ int tr[30],vis; void clear() { memset(tr,0,sizeof(tr)); vis = 0; }} e[maxn];void insert(){ scanf("%s",s + 1); int len = strlen(s + 1),u = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= len; i++) { int t = s[i] - 'a'; if (!e[u].tr[t]) { e[u].tr[t] = ++tot; e[tot].clear(); } u = e[u].tr[t]; } e[u].vis = 1;}multiset<int> hebing(multiset<int> a,multiset<int> b){ if (a.size() < b.size()) swap(a,b); for (multiset<int>::iterator it = b.begin(); it != b.end(); it++) a.insert(*it); return a;}multiset<int> dfs(int u,int dep){ multiset<int> temp; if (e[u].vis) temp.insert(dep); for (int i = 0; i < 26; i++) if (e[u].tr[i]) temp = hebing(temp,dfs(e[u].tr[i],dep + 1)); if (dep != 0 && !e[u].vis) { if (!temp.empty()) { multiset<int>::iterator it = temp.end(); --it; temp.erase(it); } temp.insert(dep); } return temp;}multiset<int> ans;int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); e[tot = 1].clear(); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) insert(); ans = dfs(1,0); for (multiset<int>::iterator it = ans.begin(); it != ans.end(); ++it) anss += *it; printf("%d\n",anss); return 0;} 分析  看到前缀，很容易想到将所有字符串都放到Trie树上处理. 于是每一个单词都对应了一个点. 用一个前缀代替字符串，实际上就是在Trie树中，将点向其祖先方向上挪. 为了使所有前缀互不相同，每个位置最多只能被一个点占据. 问题就转化为了：在一棵树上，可以将一个点向其祖先方向上挪，不能有多个点在同一位置，问最后所有点的深度和最小是多少.  我一开始的想法是每次挪深度最大的一个点，在Trie树上倍增找到深度最低的没有被占用的点. 这个贪心的想法很容易举出反例来. 但由此很容易想到正确的解法：肯定要将深度最大的点挪到上面去. 这个做法错就错在处理不同子树的处理上，如果先将深度最大的点挪到最上面去，那么就有可能会占据其它子树的位置,所以我们应该把这些子树合起来考虑. 递归，在以u为根节点的子树中找到深度最大的一个点，将其放到根节点上(若根节点为空).然后将这些子树合并. 利用multiset维护,合并两个multiset用启发式合并.(第一次知道原来函数的返回类型可以是STL容器). 经验  单单考虑一个点会对其它子树的决策造成影响，解决方法是将所有可能有影响的点合起来一起考虑，在树上多采用自底向上更新的方法.

entry.title: Codeforces 965 D. Single-use Stones
entry.content: 题目大意  一个宽度为w的河，每只青蛙最多可以跳步长为l,每个位置有若干个石头，石头只能用一次，问最多有多少只青蛙能过河？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const int maxn = 100010;int w,l,a[maxn],b[maxn],pos;int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&w,&l); for (int i = 1; i <= w - 1; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= l; i++) b[i] = a[i]; pos = 1; a[w] = 0x7fffffff; for (int i = l + 1; i <= w; i++) { while (i - pos > l) pos++; while (pos < i && b[pos] + b[i] <= a[i]) { b[i] += b[pos]; pos++; } if (pos < i && b[i] != a[i]) { int left = a[i] - b[i]; b[i] = a[i]; b[pos] -= left; } } printf("%d\n",b[w]); return 0;} 分析  数据范围这么大，dp肯定不行，于是想到贪心. 从石头的角度去考虑而从青蛙的角度去考虑，因为青蛙的数量是不知道的. 从左到右维护当前位置的所有石头最多能容纳多少个青蛙,用决策包容性的思想考虑. 位置为i - l的青蛙最远能跳到位置为i的石头上，考虑先将当前位置的石头给占满，从最远处的青蛙考虑，维护一个指针，将指针扫到的位置的青蛙都移到当前石头上来，直到移满为止. 方法类似于单调队列，但是起限制作用的是数量而不是距离.

entry.title: Codeforces 965 C. Greedy Arkady
entry.content: 题目大意  k个人，n个糖果. 从1号开始分，每个人分x个糖果，然后下一轮继续这样分，知道糖果总数不足k. 确定x的值，使得第一个人分得的糖果数最多，要求x≤M，并且每个人被分的次数都不应该>D. 提示  写出第一个人分得糖果的表达式. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll n,k,m,d,ans;ll cal(ll x){ return (n / x + k - 1) / k;}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld%lld",&n,&k,&m,&d); for (ll i = 1; i <= d; i++) { ll l = 1,r = m; while (l <= r) { ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (cal(mid) < i) r = mid - 1; else if (cal(mid) > i) l = mid + 1; else { ans = max(ans,mid * cal(mid)); l = mid + 1; } } } printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  第一个人能分$(k / x+ k - 1) / k$次，每一次分得的糖果数为x,故分得的总糖果数为$(k / x + k - 1) / k * x$. 要在满足限制的条件下使得这个表达式的值最大, 其实并不太好处理. 因为当x变大时，左半部分减小，右半部分增大，总体的值不知道是增大还是减小. 既然不好确定，那么我们就固定其中一部分，利用另一部分的单调性来求最值. 枚举第一个人分糖的次数，也就是左半部分的值. 固定下来后，整体的值随着x的增大而增大，二分x, 只有当左半部分的值等于我们枚举得到的值时才统计进入答案. 经验  当有多部分的值同时影响答案时，先固定其中若干部分的取值，再利用单调性or单峰性求另外若干部分的最值，以求得整体的最值. 若这些部分都涉及到同一变量的取值，那么只有在这些值等于枚举的值时才统计答案.

entry.title: Codeforces 967 E. Big Secret
entry.content: 题目大意  给定一个序列b,要求重组b,构造新的序列$a_i = b_1 xor b_2 xor…xorb_i$,要求$a_i$单调递增(严格)，输出重组后的b. 提示  一个数异或什么样的数能比原数更大？ 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859#include <cstdio>#include <vector>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const int maxn = 100010;int n;bool flag = true;ll b[maxn],ans[maxn],x;vector <ll>a[62];int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&b[i]); for (int j = 60; j >= 0; j--) if (b[i] >> j & 1) { a[j].push_back(b[i]); break; } } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= 60; j++) if (!(x >> j & 1) && !a[j].empty()) { ans[i] = a[j].back(); a[j].pop_back(); x ^= ans[i]; break; } } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (!ans[i]) { flag = false; break; } if (!x || !flag) puts("No"); else { puts("Yes"); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) printf("%lld ",ans[i]); printf("\n"); } return 0;} 分析  一个结论:若a异或上一个数x得到的数比a大，那么a有一位为0，x这一位为1，并且这是x的最高位. 很显然，因为a异或上x后a的这一位一定会变成1,而这是x的最高位,即使a后面的1变成了0，也会比a大.  那么方法就很简单了，用60个vector分别维护最高位为i的数即可.

entry.title: Codeforces 967 D. Resource Distribution
entry.content:
题目大意  给出n个服务器的资源数$c_1,c_2,…,c_n$和运行两个程序需要的资源$x_1,x_2$,求一个解决方案，选取k1个资源数不小于$x_1 / k_1$的服务器使资源总和不小于$x_1$,选取k2个资源数不小于$x_2/k_2$的服务器使资源总和不小于$x_2$,两次选取的服务器不能有交叉. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 300010;bool flag = false;int n,x1,x2,ans1[maxn],ans2[maxn],cnt1,cnt2;struct node{ int c,id;} e[maxn];bool cmp(node a,node b){ return a.c > b.c;}void solve1(){ int cur1 = -1,cur2 = -1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x1 / (double)i)) { cur1 = i; break; } if (cur1 == -1) return; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x2 / (double)(i - cur1))) { cur2 = i; break; } if (cur2 == -1) return; flag = true; for (int i = 1; i <= cur1; i++) ans1[++cnt1] = e[i].id; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= cur2; i++) ans2[++cnt2] = e[i].id;}void solve2(){ int cur1 = -1,cur2 = -1; swap(x1,x2); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x1 / (double)i)) { cur1 = i; break; } if (cur1 == -1) return; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x2 / (double)(i - cur1))) { cur2 = i; break; } if (cur2 == -1) return; flag = true; for (int i = 1; i <= cur1; i++) ans2[++cnt2] = e[i].id; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= cur2; i++) ans1[++cnt1] = e[i].id;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&x1,&x2); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&e[i].c); e[i].id = i; } sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); solve1(); if (!flag) solve2(); if (!flag) puts("No"); else { puts("Yes"); printf("%d %d
",cnt1,cnt2); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt1; i++) printf("%d ",ans1[i]); printf("
"); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt2; i++) printf("%d ",ans2[i]); printf("
"); } return 0;} 分析  这些限制条件中有一个是显然满足的：资源总和不小于$x_1$,和资源总和不小于$x_2$.关键就是选出$k_1$个资源≥$x_1 / k_1$的服务器. 在此基础上，还要让$k_1$尽量小,因为k越大，可选的数就越多，那么留给第二个任务的选择就更多了. 那么将服务器按照资源数从大到小排序,枚举$k_1$，找到最小的满足要求的. 接着按照相同的方法枚举$k_2$. 最后将两个任务交换，重复这个过程,为了避免出现满足第一个任务却不能满足第二个任务的情况.

entry.title: Codeforces 967 D. Resource Distribution
entry.content:
题目大意  给出n个服务器的资源数$c_1,c_2,…,c_n$和运行两个程序需要的资源$x_1,x_2$,求一个解决方案，选取k1个资源数不小于$x_1 / k_1$的服务器使资源总和不小于$x_1$,选取k2个资源数不小于$x_2/k_2$的服务器使资源总和不小于$x_2$,两次选取的服务器不能有交叉. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 300010;bool flag = false;int n,x1,x2,ans1[maxn],ans2[maxn],cnt1,cnt2;struct node{ int c,id;} e[maxn];bool cmp(node a,node b){ return a.c > b.c;}void solve1(){ int cur1 = -1,cur2 = -1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x1 / (double)i)) { cur1 = i; break; } if (cur1 == -1) return; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x2 / (double)(i - cur1))) { cur2 = i; break; } if (cur2 == -1) return; flag = true; for (int i = 1; i <= cur1; i++) ans1[++cnt1] = e[i].id; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= cur2; i++) ans2[++cnt2] = e[i].id;}void solve2(){ int cur1 = -1,cur2 = -1; swap(x1,x2); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x1 / (double)i)) { cur1 = i; break; } if (cur1 == -1) return; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= n; i++) if (e[i].c >= ceil((double)x2 / (double)(i - cur1))) { cur2 = i; break; } if (cur2 == -1) return; flag = true; for (int i = 1; i <= cur1; i++) ans2[++cnt2] = e[i].id; for (int i = cur1 + 1; i <= cur2; i++) ans1[++cnt1] = e[i].id;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&x1,&x2); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&e[i].c); e[i].id = i; } sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); solve1(); if (!flag) solve2(); if (!flag) puts("No"); else { puts("Yes"); printf("%d %d
",cnt1,cnt2); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt1; i++) printf("%d ",ans1[i]); printf("
"); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt2; i++) printf("%d ",ans2[i]); printf("
"); } return 0;} 分析  这些限制条件中有一个是显然满足的：资源总和不小于$x_1$,和资源总和不小于$x_2$.关键就是选出$k_1$个资源≥$x_1 / k_1$的服务器. 在此基础上，还要让$k_1$尽量小,因为k越大，可选的数就越多，那么留给第二个任务的选择就更多了. 那么将服务器按照资源数从大到小排序,枚举$k_1$，找到最小的满足要求的. 接着按照相同的方法枚举$k_2$. 最后将两个任务交换，重复这个过程,为了避免出现满足第一个任务却不能满足第二个任务的情况.

entry.title: 线性dp总结
entry.content:
1.基本处理方法  1.找维度：限制、个数、长度.  2.找状态表示：最优值、个数、看问题要求什么.  3.找决策：刷表or填表. 2.通用技巧  1.排序or其它算法解决题目限制.  2.决策集合的决策有限制条件，并且决策集合的大小只增不减，可以用一个变量维护代表元.  3.优化状态. 维度上能否互相导出. 若可以则省略掉可以被导出的状态，只需要保留状态的“秩”.  4.网格图的阶段；行/列，格子.  5.元素相对大小不变，采用整体加减法，考虑边界来递推. (整体加减法不会影响元素的相对大小)  6.用与答案数组相同大小的数组表示每一维是从哪一个状态转移过来的，从而可以递归输出方案. 3.特定技巧  1.中位数调整法.  2.凸图形的轮廓线表示法. 4.习题1.poj2279英文题面Description Mr. Young wishes to take a picture of his class. The students will stand in rows with each row no longer than the row behind it and the left ends of the rows aligned. For instance, 12 students could be arranged in rows (from back to front) of 5, 3, 3 and 1 students.X X X X X X X X X X X X In addition, Mr. Young wants the students in each row arranged so that heights decrease from left to right. Also, student heights should decrease from the back to the front. Thinking about it, Mr. Young sees that for the 12-student example, there are at least two ways to arrange the students (with 1 as the tallest etc.): 1 2 3 4 5 1 5 8 11 12 6 7 8 2 6 9 9 10 11 3 7 10 12 4 Mr. Young wonders how many different arrangements of the students there might be for a given arrangement of rows. He tries counting by hand starting with rows of 3, 2 and 1 and counts 16 arrangements:123 123 124 124 125 125 126 126 134 134 135 135 136 136 145 146 45 46 35 36 34 36 34 35 25 26 24 26 24 25 26 25 6 5 6 5 6 4 5 4 6 5 6 4 5 4 3 3 Mr. Young sees that counting by hand is not going to be very effective for any reasonable number of students so he asks you to help out by writing a computer program to determine the number of different arrangements of students for a given set of rows.Input The input for each problem instance will consist of two lines. The first line gives the number of rows, k, as a decimal integer. The second line contains the lengths of the rows from back to front (n1, n2,…, nk) as decimal integers separated by a single space. The problem set ends with a line with a row count of 0. There will never be more than 5 rows and the total number of students, N, (sum of the row lengths) will be at most 30.Output The output for each problem instance shall be the number of arrangements of the N students into the given rows so that the heights decrease along each row from left to right and along each column from back to front as a decimal integer. (Assume all heights are distinct.) The result of each problem instance should be on a separate line. The input data will be chosen so that the result will always fit in an unsigned 32 bit integer.Sample Input 13051 1 1 1 133 2 145 3 3 156 5 4 3 2215 150Sample Output 111641581418926089694845Source Greater New York 2004 翻译  有k排，每排分别有n1,n2,…,nk个人,每一排从左到右身高递减，每一列从后到前升高递减，求一共有多少种安排合影位置的方案？ 提示  是考虑每个位置放什么还是每个人放在哪? 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;int n,k[6],f[31][31][31][31][31];int main(){ while (scanf("%d",&n) != EOF && n) { memset(k,0,sizeof(k)); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&k[i]); memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); f[0][0][0][0][0] = 1; for (int i = 0; i <= k[1]; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= i && j <= k[2]; j++) for (int kk = 0; kk <= j && kk <= k[3]; kk++) for (int p = 0; p <= kk && p <= k[4]; p++) for (int q = 0; q <= p && q <= k[5]; q++) { if (!f[i][j][kk][p][q]) continue; if (i + 1 <= k[1]) f[i + 1][j][kk][p][q] += f[i][j][kk][p][q]; if (j + 1 <= i && j + 1 <= k[2]) f[i][j + 1][kk][p][q] += f[i][j][kk][p][q]; if (kk + 1 <= j && kk + 1 <= k[3]) f[i][j][kk + 1][p][q] += f[i][j][kk][p][q]; if (p + 1 <= kk && p + 1 <= k[4]) f[i][j][kk][p + 1][q] += f[i][j][kk][p][q]; if (q + 1 <= p && q + 1 <= k[5]) f[i][j][kk][p][q + 1] += f[i][j][kk][p][q]; } printf("%d
",f[k[1]][k[2]][k[3]][k[4]][k[5]]); } return 0;} 分析  两种思维方式，要么考虑每个位置放什么，要么考虑每个人放在哪. 如果是第一种，还要考虑有哪些位置可能放人，不好处理. 那么考虑每个人放在哪. 因为要求人的升高是单调递减的，所以将人按照身高从大到小排序.  有k行数，可以考虑每个数插入到哪一行后面. 行的限制是能满足的，关键是列的限制. 列的限制也比较简单，令$f_{a1,a2,a3,a4,a5}$表示第i行有ai个人的合法方案数. 只需要保证$a_{i - 1} > a_i$. 2.tyvj1071中文题面题目描述熊大妈的奶牛在小沐沐的熏陶下开始研究信息题目。小沐沐先让奶牛研究了最长上升子序列，再让他们研究了最长公共子序列，现在又让他们要研究最长公共上升子序列了。小沐沐说，对于两个串A，B，如果它们都包含一段位置不一定连续的数字，且数字是严格递增的，那么称这一段数字是两个串的公共上升子串，而所有的公共上升子串中最长的就是最长公共上升子串了。奶牛半懂不懂，小沐沐要你来告诉奶牛什么是最长公共上升子串。不过，只要告诉奶牛它的长度就可以了。输入格式第一行N，表示A，B的长度。第二行，串A。第三行，串B。输出格式输出长度。 提示1<=N<=3000，A，B中的数字不超过maxlongintMoe-ing 样例数据输入样例 #1 输出样例 #142 2 1 32 1 2 32 提示  将LIS与LCS结合起来. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 3010;int n,a[maxn],b[maxn],f[maxn][maxn],ans;int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&b[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int maxx = 0; for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) { if (a[i] == b[j]) f[i][j] = maxx + 1; else f[i][j] = f[i - 1][j]; if (b[j] < a[i]) maxx = max(maxx,f[i - 1][j]); } } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) ans = max(ans,f[i][j]); printf("%d
",ans); return 0;} 分析  首先可以确定的是状态的一维要表示当前取到了A的第几个数,这是线性dp的阶段. 因为要确保子序列是上升的，所以还要记录当前序列的最后一位是哪一个数. 那么$f_{i,j}$表示匹配到A的第i个数，LCIS的最后一位是B的第j个数.  状态转移很好想，决策集合有限制，并且集合大小是单调递增的，那么可以用一个变量动态维护最大值. 3.poj3666英文题面Description A straight dirt road connects two fields on FJ’s farm, but it changes elevation more than FJ would like. His cows do not mind climbing up or down a single slope, but they are not fond of an alternating succession of hills and valleys. FJ would like to add and remove dirt from the road so that it becomes one monotonic slope (either sloping up or down). You are given N integers A1, … , AN (1 ≤ N ≤ 2,000) describing the elevation (0 ≤ Ai ≤ 1,000,000,000) at each of N equally-spaced positions along the road, starting at the first field and ending at the other. FJ would like to adjust these elevations to a new sequence B1, . … , BN that is either nonincreasing or nondecreasing. Since it costs the same amount of money to add or remove dirt at any position along the road, the total cost of modifying the road is |A1 - B1| + |A2 - B2| + … + |AN - BN |Please compute the minimum cost of grading his road so it becomes a continuous slope. FJ happily informs you that signed 32-bit integers can certainly be used to compute the answer. Input Line 1: A single integer: N Lines 2..N+1: Line i+1 contains a single integer elevation: Ai Output Line 1: A single integer that is the minimum cost for FJ to grade his dirt road so it becomes nonincreasing or nondecreasing in elevation.
