Sample Input 71324539Sample Output 3Source USACO 2008 February Gold 翻译给定长度为n的序列A,构造一个长度为N的序列B,满足：1.B非严格单调. 2.最小化$Σ|A_i - B_i|$ 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <cmath>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 2010,inf = 1e18;ll n,a[maxn],b[maxn],ans,f[maxn][maxn];bool cmp(ll x,ll y){ return x > y;}int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); b[i] = a[i]; } sort(b + 1,b + 1 + n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll minn = inf; for (ll j = 1; j <= n; j++) { minn = min(minn,f[i - 1][j]); int temp1 = a[i],temp2 = b[j]; f[i][j] = minn + abs(temp1 - temp2); } } ans = inf; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) ans = min(ans,f[n][i]); memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); sort(b + 1,b + 1 + n,cmp); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll minn = inf; for (ll j = 1; j <= n; j++) { minn = min(minn,f[i - 1][j]); int temp1 = a[i],temp2 = b[j]; f[i][j] = minn + abs(temp1 - temp2); } } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) ans = min(ans,f[n][i]); printf("%lld
",ans); return 0;} 分析  一个定理：一定存在一种构造B的方案，使得B中的数值在A中都出现过.  证明：利用数学归纳法，N=1时显然成立. 假设N = k - 1时，可以构造出序列$B_1 ~ B_{k - 1}$,当N = k时，若$B_k ≤ A_k$,直接令$B_k = A_k$即可. 否则，假设存在一个j,使得$B_j,B_{j + 1},…,B_k$的数值都为v. 根据中位数原理，假设$A_j,A_{j + 1},…,A_k$的中位数为mid,若$mid ≥ B_{j - 1}$,则直接令$B_j,B_{j + 1},…,B_k$都为mid,否则就将这一段与$B_{j - 1}$,那一段合并，求新的中位数. 直到满足条件为止. 这种方法称为中位数调整法.  那么考虑设计状态：$f_{i,j}$表示A的前i个数中，第i个数选择了B的第j小的数的答案. $f_{i,j} = min(f_{i-1,k},|A_i - A’_j|)$. 决策集合只增不减，依然可以$O(n^2)$处理. 4.tyvj1061中文题面题目描述一个公司有三个移动服务员。如果某个地方有一个请求，某个员工必须赶到那个地方去（那个地方没有其他员工），某一时刻只有一个员工能移动。被请求后，他才能移动，不允许在同样的位置出现两个员工。从p到q移动一个员工，需要花费c(p,q)。这个函数没有必要对称，但是c(p,p)=0。公司必须满足所有的请求。目标是最小化公司花费。 输入格式第一行有两个整数L,N(3<=L<=200, 1<=N<=1000)。L是位置数；N是请求数。每个位置从1到L编号。下L行每行包含L个非负整数。第i+1行的第j个数表示c(i,j) ，并且它小于2000。最后一行包含N个数，是请求列表。一开始三个服务员分别在位置1，2，3。 输出格式一个数M，表示最小服务花费。 样例数据输入样例 #1 输出样例 #15 90 1 1 1 11 0 2 3 21 1 0 4 12 1 5 0 14 2 3 4 04 2 4 1 5 4 3 2 15 提示简化状态. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 1010,inf = 0x7fffffff;int n,Q,d[maxn][maxn],f[2][210][210],p[maxn],ans = inf,now,last;int main(){ memset(f,0x3f,sizeof(f)); scanf("%d%d",&n,&Q); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) scanf("%d",&d[i][j]); for (int i = 1; i <= Q; i++) scanf("%d",&p[i]); now = 1; last = 0; f[0][1][2] = 0; p[0] = 3; for (int i = 0; i < Q; i++) { memset(f[now],127 / 3,sizeof(f[now])); for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) for (int k = 1; k <= n; k++) { if (k == j) continue; if (k == p[i] || j == p[i]) continue; f[now][j][k] = min(f[now][j][k],f[last][j][k] + d[p[i]][p[i + 1]]); f[now][p[i]][k] = min(f[now][p[i]][k],f[last][j][k] + d[j][p[i + 1]]); f[now][j][p[i]] = min(f[now][j][p[i]],f[last][j][k] + d[k][p[i + 1]]); } swap(now,last); } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) { if (i == j || i == p[Q] || j == p[Q]) continue; ans = min(ans,f[last][i][j]); } printf("%d
",ans); return 0;} 分析  很容易想到状态表示：$f_{i,a,b,c}$表示第i轮，3个人的位置分别是a,b,c的答案. 每次可以枚举一个人移动到目标位置. 这种方法会爆内存+时间,需要进行优化. 注意到其实我们不需要记录3个人的位置，因为到第i轮一定有人在$P_{i - 1}$,我们只需要记录另外两个人的位置即可,假设$P_0 = 3$,加上滚动数组优化. 5.sgu167英文题面According to top-secret A-country plans, I-country is divided into N*M equal squares, each square contains some oil resources. They want to occupy all the territory of I-country, but the UN (United Nations) will allow them to occupy only K squares. Of course, A-country want to get control over as many oil as possible, but, they will have to guard all their territory. So, they need their territory to be easy-controlled, i.e. from any square to any it must be possible to get moving only along two directions (selected from the next list: left, right, up, down; for different squares pairs of directions may differ).You are to write a program, which determinies, what squares will be occupyed by A-country. If there are several solutions, you may output any. InputOn the first line of input there are 3 integer numbers N,M,K (1<=N,M<=15, 0<=K<=N*M). Next N lines contains M integers each, which are the number of oil resource on that square. Each of this numbers lies in range of 0 to 1000. OutputOn the first line of output, write string “Oil : X”, where integer number X —- the maximal number of oil which can be controlled by A-country. Next you should output K pairs of numbers —- coordinates of the squares which will be occupied by A-country. The first coordinate is number of row (top to bottom, starting from 1), second is number of column (left to right, starting from 1). Sample test(s) Input2 3 410 20 3040 2 3 OutputOil : 1001 11 21 32 1 翻译n*m的矩阵中，每个格子有一个权值，要寻找一个包含K个格子的凸连通块，使得这个连通块内的格子的权值和最大，求出这个权值和，并输出连通块的方案. 提示  网格图用什么表示阶段？  如何表示凸多边形？试试观察看能否得出规律？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 16,inf = 0x7fffffff;int n,m,k,a[maxn][maxn],sum[maxn][maxn],f[maxn][226][maxn][maxn][2][2];char sx[maxn][226][maxn][maxn][2][2],sy[maxn][226][maxn][maxn][2][2],sl[maxn][226][maxn][maxn][2][2],sr[maxn][226][maxn][maxn][2][2];int ans = -inf,posx,posy,posl,posr,posi;void update(int val,int I,int J,int L,int R,int X,int Y,int tI,int tJ,int tL,int tR,int tX,int tY){ if (val < f[I][J][L][R][X][Y]) return; f[I][J][L][R][X][Y] = val; sx[I][J][L][R][X][Y] = tX; sy[I][J][L][R][X][Y] = tY; sl[I][J][L][R][X][Y] = tL; sr[I][J][L][R][X][Y] = tR;}void print(int num,int i,int l,int r,int x,int y){ if (!num) return; print(num - (r - l + 1),i - 1,sl[i][num][l][r][x][y],sr[i][num][l][r][x][y],sx[i][num][l][r][x][y],sy[i][num][l][r][x][y]); for (int p = l; p <= r; p++) printf("%d %d
",i,p);}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&m,&k); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) scanf("%d",&a[i][j]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) sum[i][j] = sum[i][j - 1] + a[i][j]; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= k; j++) for (int l = 1; l <= m; l++) for (int r = 1; r <= m; r++) for (int x = 0; x < 2; x++) for (int y = 0; y < 2; y++) f[i][j][l][r][x][y] = -0x7ffffff; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) f[i][0][0][0][1][0] = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 1; j <= k; j++) for (int l = 1; l <= m; l++) for (int r = l; r <= m; r++) { int len = r - l + 1,temp = sum[i][r] - sum[i][l - 1]; if (len > j) break; if (j == len) update(temp + f[i - 1][0][0][0][1][0],i,j,l,r,1,0,i - 1,0,0,0,1,0); if (j > len) { for (int p = l; p <= r; p++) for (int q = p; q <= r; q++) update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][0],i,j,l,r,1,0,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,0); } for (int p = l; p <= r; p++) for (int q = r; q <= m; q++) { update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][0],i,j,l,r,1,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,0); update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][1],i,j,l,r,1,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,1); } for (int p = 1; p <= l; p++) for (int q = l; q <= r; q++) { update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][0][0],i,j,l,r,0,0,i - 1,j - len,p,q,0,0); update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][0],i,j,l,r,0,0,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,0); } for (int p = 1; p <= l; p++) for (int q = r; q <= m; q++) { update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][0][0],i,j,l,r,0,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,0,0); update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][0][1],i,j,l,r,0,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,0,1); update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][0],i,j,l,r,0,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,0); update(temp + f[i - 1][j - len][p][q][1][1],i,j,l,r,0,1,i - 1,j - len,p,q,1,1); } } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int l = 1; l <= m; l++) for (int r = l; r <= m; r++) for (int x = 0; x < 2; x++) for (int y = 0; y < 2; y++) { if (f[i][k][l][r][x][y] > ans) { ans = f[i][k][l][r][x][y]; posx = x; posy = y; posl = l; posr = r; posi = i; } } printf("Oil : %d
",ans); print(k,posi,posl,posr,posx,posy); return 0;} 分析  挺神的一道题.  以行为阶段，需要关注的信息是：当前已经处理完了几行，已经选出了多少个格子，当前行的左端点和右端点分别是哪一个，左右轮廓.  关键的问题是如何维护左右轮廓. 注意到一个凸连通块，其左侧的点的列数一定是先递减后递增的，右侧的点的列数一定是先递增后递减的. 那么维护左右轮廓只需要知道当前轮廓是递增还是递减即可.那么状态表示也就出来了：$f_{i,j,l,r,x,y}$表示前i行选了j个格子，第i行的左端点是l,右端点是r,左轮廓的单调性是x,右轮廓的单调性是y的答案. 转移什么的讨论一下这个状态从哪几种状态转移而来即可.  如何输出解?一个比较常用的方法是开若干个和答案数组一样大小的数组，记录由上一层转移而来的状态的每一维.更新答案的时候同时更新这些信息，最后递归一遍就可以求出解来了.  这种方法空间占用非常大. 需要将数组大小尽可能压缩. 比较牛逼的处理方法是将记录转移路径的int数组改成char数组. 因为每一维都很小，不会爆char.从int到char和从char到int实际上就是两种相反的映射. 6.未知来源的题题目描述m个饼干给n个人，对于第i个人，若有x个人得到的饼干比它多，那么它会产生$x * g_i$的愤怒值，求怎么分饼干使得这些人的总愤怒值最小. 分析  已经有多少个人获得了饼干、已经发了多少个饼干应该作为阶段，用$f_{i,j}$表示.  因为每个人得多少块饼干没有限制，而g值有区别，可以想到将所有人按照g值从大到小排序. g值大的分配的饼干就多. 那么排序后，这些人得到的饼干数就是非严格单调递减的. 状态的转移需要知道第i - 1个人的饼干数. 那么就要额外再记录一维，显然不行，考虑一下转化.  若第i个人获得的饼干数>1,那么可以将所有人的饼干数-1，当前状态从这个状态转移而来. 因为所有人的相对大小不变，所以答案不会变. 否则就枚举从哪一个人开始到第i个人的饼干数都是1. 因为它们的饼干数都是1,就相当于知道了第i-1个人的饼干数，也可以快速确定有多少个人的饼干比它们多. (只有这些人的饼干数都是1).那么状态转移方程就是:$f_{i,j} = min(f_{i,j - i},f_{k,j - (i - k) + kΣg_p})$.  相对大小不变的问题可以通过缩放到边界1来进行处理.

entry.title: Codeforces 984 D. XOR-pyramid
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译求区间[l,r]的f(l’,r’)的最大值. $l ≤ l’ ≤ r’ ≤ r$ 提示  询问特别多，区间总长度却非常小，甚至可以用数组存下，能想到什么？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 5010;int n,a[maxn],d[maxn][maxn],f[maxn][maxn],Q;int solve(int x,int y){ if (x == y) return d[x][y] = a[x]; if (d[x][y] != -1) return d[x][y]; return d[x][y] = (solve(x + 1,y) ^ solve(x,y - 1));}int solve2(int x,int y){ if (x == y) return f[x][y] = a[x]; if (f[x][y] != -1) return f[x][y]; return f[x][y] = max(solve2(x + 1,y),max(solve2(x,y - 1),d[x][y]));}int main(){ memset(d,-1,sizeof(d)); memset(f,-1,sizeof(f)); scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = i; j <= n; j++) solve(i,j); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (int j = i; j <= n; j++) solve2(i,j); scanf("%d",&Q); while (Q--) { int l,r; scanf("%d%d",&l,&r); printf("%d\n",f[l][r]); } return 0;} 分析  因为n只有5000,我们可以把$f_{l,r}$预处理出来，然后做一次dp,O(1)可完成查询操作，难点就在于怎么预处理.  观察f函数，它是由相邻的两项异或而组成一个新的序列. 联想到杨辉三角，将$f_{l,r}$看作杨辉三角的最后一行，往上递推，一定能递推到一行只剩一个数. 预处理f函数的关键在于找到规律. 没有直接能表达出$f_{l,r}$的式子，就要找递推式. f函数构成的杨辉三角的每一个数是由它下面的数和它下面的右边的数异或得到的. 那么可以得到：$f_{l,r} = f_{l + 1,r} \^ f_{l,r - 1}$. 用记忆化搜索，即可$O(n^2)$预处理得到所有的f值. 接下来的dp就很容易了. 经验  一个函数是递归定义的，并且与每一对相邻的数有关，那么可以联想到杨辉三角.

entry.title: Codeforces 984 C. Finite or not?
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译问p/q在b进制下是不是有限小数. 提示  先考虑十进制. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051#include <map>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll n;ll p,q,b;ll gcd(ll a,ll b){ if (!b) return a; return gcd(b,a % b);}bool solve(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&p,&q,&b); if (p % q == 0 || p == 0) return true; ll d = gcd(p,q); q /= d; while (gcd(q,b) != 1) { ll temp = gcd(q,b); while (q % temp == 0) q /= temp; } if (q == 1) return true; return false;}int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); while (n--) { if (solve()) puts("Finite"); else puts("Infinite"); } return 0;} 分析  一个结论：在十进制下，若p/q化成最简分数后，q的质因子只有2和5，那么p/q就是一个有限小数，否则就是无限小数.  证明：在十进制下，一个有限小数一定可以表示成$p/10^k$的形式,而$10^k$只含有2和5两种质因子，故q要能变成$10^k$,就必须只能含有2和5. 同样的，对于b进制下的p/q,若最简分数q的质因子在b中都出现过，那么p/q就可以表示成一个有限小数.  怎么知道q的质因子在b中是否都出现过呢？ 求出它的所有质因子？复杂度太高了！可以利用唯一分解定律和gcd. 因为$gcd(a,b) = p_1^{min(a_1,b_1)}p_2^{min(a_2,b_2)}……p_k^{min(a_k,b_k)}$. 求q与b的gcd,并将q除去它. 一直除下去，知道gcd = 1,那么q中含有的b的质因数一定都被除完了，剩下的就是b没有的质因数，只需要判断q是否等于1即可.

entry.title: Codeforces 975 C. Valhalla Siege
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译  n个人,q次进攻. 第i个人能承受的伤害是$a_i$,第i轮进攻会释放$k_i$的伤害，求每轮攻击后，还有多少个人存活. 若所有人都死了，那么它们会立刻活过来，并且那一轮的剩下的伤害作废. 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465#include <cstdio>#include <set>#include <string>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 200010;ll n,q;ll a[maxn],k[maxn],pos,remain,sum[maxn];ll solve(ll p,ll t){ ll x = p + t; ll l = pos,r = n,ans = -1; while (l <= r) { ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (sum[mid] - sum[pos - 1] <= x) { ans = mid; l = mid + 1; } else r = mid - 1; } if (ans == -1) { remain += p; return (n - pos + 1); } if (ans == n) { remain = 0; pos = 1; return n; } x -= (sum[ans] - sum[pos - 1]); pos = ans + 1; remain = x; return (n - ans);}int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&q); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + a[i]; } pos = 1; for (ll i = 1; i <= q; i++) { ll k; scanf("%lld",&k); printf("%lld\n",solve(k,remain)); } return 0;} 分析  很显然是二分+前缀和. 如果当前这个人没有被射死，就将下一次的伤害加上累加到这个人的伤害. 不要加错了！

entry.title: Codeforces 975 D. Valhalla Siege
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译  给定直线$y = ax + b$上的若干个点的x,以及这些点的横向速度以及纵向速度. 求这些点会相交多少次. 提示  两个点相遇的条件是什么? 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233#include <cstdio>#include <set>#include <map>#include <string>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll n,a,b;ll ans;map<ll,int> M;map<pair<ll,ll>,int> M2;int main(){ scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&a,&b); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll x,vx,vy; scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&vx,&vy); ll temp = vy - a * vx; ans += (M[temp] - M2[make_pair(vx,vy)]) * 2; M[temp]++; M2[make_pair(vx,vy)]++; } cout << ans << endl; return 0;} 分析  两个点相遇的条件是：在同一时刻，它们的横坐标相同，纵坐标相同，那么我们可以针对横坐标和纵坐标的时间列一个方程，解得：$v_{ay} - av_{ax} = v_{by} - av_{bx}$. 利用map存$v_y - av_x$的值有多少个，每次在map中查找个数即可.  因为列的方程的分母可能为0，需要再建一个map存所有的直线(由横速度与纵速度构成)，来保证不计数平行的直线. 总结  对问题的条件做进一步的推导与转化. 若要计数同类元素，记录值域信息！

entry.title: Codeforces 975 A. Aramic script
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译将所有字符串内的相同字母去重，问有多少种不一样的字符串. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include <cstdio>#include <set>#include <string>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;int n;char str[1010];string s;set<string> S;int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); while (n--) { cin >> s; sort(s.begin(),s.end()); int len = unique(s.begin(),s.end()) - s.begin(); for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) str[i] = s[i]; str[len] = '\0'; S.insert(str); } printf("%d\n",S.size()); return 0;} 分析  对于每一个字符串内的排序+去重，string更好处理一些. 问有多少种字符串，可以将所有字符串放到同一个string数组中排序,也可以直接放到set中. 经验  string可以实现和普通的int数组一样的功能. char数组可以直接变成string, string一开始是有规定长度的，不能直接赋值s[i] = p. 要s += p. char转换成string要在末尾加一个’\0’.

entry.title: Codeforces 975 A. Aramic script
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译将所有字符串内的相同字母去重，问有多少种不一样的字符串. 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include <cstdio>#include <set>#include <string>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;int n;char str[1010];string s;set<string> S;int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); while (n--) { cin >> s; sort(s.begin(),s.end()); int len = unique(s.begin(),s.end()) - s.begin(); for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) str[i] = s[i]; str[len] = '\0'; S.insert(str); } printf("%d\n",S.size()); return 0;} 分析  对于每一个字符串内的排序+去重，string更好处理一些. 问有多少种字符串，可以将所有字符串放到同一个string数组中排序,也可以直接放到set中. 经验  string可以实现和普通的int数组一样的功能. char数组可以直接变成string, string一开始是有规定长度的，不能直接赋值s[i] = p. 要s += p. char转换成string要在末尾加一个’\0’.

entry.title: poj3580 SuperMemo
entry.content: 英文题面Description Your friend, Jackson is invited to a TV show called SuperMemo in which the participant is told to play a memorizing game. At first, the host tells the participant a sequence of numbers, {A1, A2, … An}. Then the host performs a series of operations and queries on the sequence which consists: ADD x y D: Add D to each number in sub-sequence {Ax … Ay}. For example, performing “ADD 2 4 1” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} results in {1, 3, 4, 5, 5}REVERSE x y: reverse the sub-sequence {Ax … Ay}. For example, performing “REVERSE 2 4” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} results in {1, 4, 3, 2, 5}REVOLVE x y T: rotate sub-sequence {Ax … Ay} T times. For example, performing “REVOLVE 2 4 2” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} results in {1, 3, 4, 2, 5}INSERT x P: insert P after Ax. For example, performing “INSERT 2 4” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} results in {1, 2, 4, 3, 4, 5}DELETE x: delete Ax. For example, performing “DELETE 2” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} results in {1, 3, 4, 5}MIN x y: query the participant what is the minimum number in sub-sequence {Ax … Ay}. For example, the correct answer to “MIN 2 4” on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} is 2To make the show more interesting, the participant is granted a chance to turn to someone else that means when Jackson feels difficult in answering a query he may call you for help. You task is to watch the TV show and write a program giving the correct answer to each query in order to assist Jackson whenever he calls. Input The first line contains n (n ≤ 100000). The following n lines describe the sequence. Then follows M (M ≤ 100000), the numbers of operations and queries. The following M lines describe the operations and queries. Output For each “MIN” query, output the correct answer. Sample Input 5123452ADD 2 4 1MIN 4 5Sample Output 5Source POJ Founder Monthly Contest – 2008.04.13, Yao Jinyu 代码#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 1000010,inf = 1e17;ll n,a[maxn],root,tot,Q;struct node{ ll left,right,minn,v,fa,rev,add,sizee;} e[maxn];void pushup(ll o){ e[o].sizee = 1 + e[e[o].left].sizee + e[e[o].right].sizee; e[o].minn = e[o].v; if (e[o].left) e[o].minn = min(e[o].minn,e[e[o].left].minn); if (e[o].right) e[o].minn = min(e[o].minn,e[e[o].right].minn);}void fan(ll o){ swap(e[o].left,e[o].right); e[o].rev ^= 1;}void add(ll o,ll v){ e[o].minn += v; e[o].v += v; e[o].add += v;}void pushdown(ll o){ if (e[o].rev) { if (e[o].left) fan(e[o].left); if (e[o].right) fan(e[o].right); e[o].rev = 0; } if (e[o].add) { if (e[o].left) add(e[o].left,e[o].add); if (e[o].right) add(e[o].right,e[o].add); e[o].add = 0; }}void build(ll l,ll r,ll &x,ll y){ if (l > r) return; if (!x) x = ++tot; e[x].fa = y; ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; e[x].v = a[mid]; build(l,mid - 1,e[x].left,x); build(mid + 1,r,e[x].right,x); pushup(x);}void turnr(ll x){ pushdown(x); ll y = e[x].fa; ll z = e[y].fa; e[y].left = e[x].right; if (e[x].right != 0) e[e[x].right].fa = y; e[x].fa = z; if (z != 0) { if (e[z].left == y) e[z].left = x; else e[z].right = x; } e[x].right = y; e[y].fa = x; pushup(y); pushup(x);}void turnl(ll x){ pushdown(x); ll y = e[x].fa; ll z = e[y].fa; e[y].right = e[x].left; if (e[x].left != 0) e[e[x].left].fa = y; e[x].fa = z; if (z != 0) { if (e[z].left == y) e[z].left = x; else e[z].right = x; } e[x].left = y; e[y].fa = x; pushup(y); pushup(x);}void splay(ll x,ll yy){ while (e[x].fa != yy) { pushdown(x); ll y = e[x].fa; ll z = e[y].fa; if (z == 0 || z == yy) { if (e[y].left == x) turnr(x); else turnl(x); } else { if (e[z].left == y && e[y].left == x) { turnr(y); turnr(x); } else { if (e[z].right == y && e[y].right == x) { turnl(y); turnl(x); } else { if (e[z].left == y && e[y].right == x) { turnl(x); turnr(x); } else { turnr(x); turnl(x); } } } } } if (yy == 0) root = x; pushup(x);}ll find(ll x,ll k){ pushdown(x); if (k > e[e[x].left].sizee + 1) return find(e[x].right,k - e[e[x].left].sizee - 1); if (k == e[e[x].left].sizee + 1) return x; return find(e[x].left,k);}int main(){ scanf("%lld",&n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]); a[0] = a[n + 1] = inf; build(0,n + 1,root,0); root = 1; scanf("%lld",&Q); while (Q--) { char s[10]; ll x,y,d; scanf("%s",s); if (s[0] == 'A') { scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&y,&d); ll p = find(root,x),q = find(root,y + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); add(e[q].left,d); pushup(q); pushup(p); } if (s[0] == 'R' && s[3] == 'E') { scanf("%lld%lld",&x,&y); ll p = find(root,x),q = find(root,y + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); fan(e[q].left); pushup(q); pushup(p); } if (s[0] == 'R' && s[3] == 'O') { scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&y,&d); d %= (y - x + 1); if (d < 0) d += (y - x + 1); if (d == 0) continue; ll p = find(root,y - d + 1),q = find(root,y + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); ll temp = e[q].left; e[q].left = 0; pushup(q); pushup(p); p = find(root,x),q = find(root,x + 1); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); e[q].left = temp; e[temp].fa = q; pushup(q); pushup(p); } if (s[0] == 'M') { scanf("%lld%lld",&x,&y); ll p = find(root,x),q = find(root,y + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); printf("%lld\n",e[e[q].left].minn); } if (s[0] == 'I') { scanf("%lld%lld",&x,&d); ll p = find(root,x + 1),q = find(root,x + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); a[1] = d; build(1,1,e[q].left,q); pushup(q); pushup(p); } if (s[0] == 'D') { scanf("%lld",&x); int p = find(root,x),q = find(root,x + 2); splay(p,0); splay(q,p); e[q].left = 0; pushup(q); pushup(p); } } return 0;} 分析  就是一些splay的基本操作，需要说一下的是第三种操作. 将一个序列旋转T次，先让T对(y - x + 1)取模，旋转操作实际上就是把后面的一段序列提到前面来.一次插入+删除操作即可搞定. 教训  老是写错我也很绝望.一开始是add操作没有把当前点自身的值给加上，只加了最小值和标记. 然后是删除操作，删了一段序列而不是一个点.插入操作的位置也搞错了,splay数组开小了导致一直TLE!!!这都是什么奇葩错误……

entry.title: 算法竞赛进阶指南第五章
entry.content: 前言  历时3天时间完成了这一章的学习. 有一些数据结构有很好的应用. 1.并查集  无向图连通情况，传递关系，位置占用(连成一片),带权并查集，扩展域并查集. 当位置连成一片可以跳过时，可以利用并查集维护每个点往右边跳能跳到哪个点.(跳过一整段连续的区域).  几个经典的用并查集维护的关系：  1.对立集合.  2.同类集合. 2.树状数组  树状数组区间修改+区间查询,思想是将整体求和转化为统计单点贡献. 3.线段树  线段树维护一段数的gcd,利用定理$gcd(x,y) = gcd(x,y - x)$,维护序列首位元素以及差分数组. 4.扫描线  将无法“准确”计算的矩形变成对称的线段. 因为对称，所以不用pushdown,pushdown是为了处理查询的区间是修改区间的子区间这种情况.,维护区间内的点是否被完全覆盖. 一个长度为2的区间不可再分，而在线段树中可以，故要将右端点-1.  求一类有限制的极值问题，要搞清楚到底是什么产生了极值，针对它设计算法,对限制进行转化.比如选点连通问题、机器任务问题、矩形星星问题等等. 5.分块  分块的常用方法:  1.整体排序，块内排序.  2.块内二分求值.  3.对变量大小进行分类讨论，采取不同的方法. 比如若变量小，数组能开的下，就维护块的前缀和. 否则暴力统计.  4.解决二维偏序的“which”问题. 6.一类从后往前依次确定的题.  poj2828,poj2182. 最后一个数可以立马确定. 并且前面的数可以通过后面的数以及自身的值来确定.

entry.title: Codeforces 979 D.Kuro and GCD and XOR and SUM
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译两种操作，要么往集合中插入一个数，要么给定x,k,s,求集合中的一个v,使得$k | gcd(x,v),x + v ≤ s$并且x异或v的值要求最大. 提示  两个数异或最大能想到什么？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899#include <vector>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 100010;ll Q,tot = 100000,inf = 0x7ffffff;vector <ll> p[maxn];struct node{ int tr[2],minn; void clear() { memset(tr,0,sizeof(tr)); minn = inf; }} e[maxn * 400];void init(){ for (ll i = 1; i <= 100000; i++) for (ll j = i; j <= 100000; j += i) p[j].push_back(i);}void insert(ll pos,ll x){ for (ll i = 17; i >= 0; i--) { ll t = ((x >> i) & 1); e[pos].minn = min(1LL * e[pos].minn,x); if (!e[pos].tr[t]) { e[pos].tr[t] = ++tot; e[tot].clear(); } pos = e[pos].tr[t]; } e[pos].minn = min(1LL * e[pos].minn,x);}ll solve(ll x,ll k,ll s){ ll res = 0,pos = k; if (x % k != 0 || e[pos].minn + x > s) return -1; for (ll i = 17; i >= 0; i--) { ll t = ((x >> i) & 1); ll temp; if (t) temp = 0; else temp = 1; if (e[pos].tr[temp] && e[e[pos].tr[temp]].minn <= s - x) { res += (temp << i); pos = e[pos].tr[temp]; } else { res += (t << i); pos = e[pos].tr[t]; } } return res;}int main(){ for (ll i = 1; i <= 100000; i++) e[i].clear(); init(); scanf("%lld",&Q); while(Q--) { ll t,u,x,k,s; scanf("%lld",&t); if (t == 1) { scanf("%lld",&u); for (ll i = 0; i < p[u].size(); i++) insert(p[u][i],u); } else { scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&k,&s); printf("%lld\n",solve(x,k,s)); } } return 0;} 分析  由两个数异或得到的值最大可以想到Trie树(不要想线性基，那是多个数异或得到的值最大). 关键是限制不好处理. 如何才能保证gcd被k整除？与x的和≤s?  对于第二个限制，我们可以在Trie树上记录当前节点子树叶节点的最小值，若要往下一层走，则先判断最小值+x是否≤s. 是则可以往下走. 对于第一个限制，要使得x与v的gcd被k整除，那么x,v一定都要是k的倍数. 先判断x是不是k的倍数，若不是，直接返回-1. v也要是k的倍数，在一棵Trie树上不好处理，因为在没有走到叶子节点以前不能判断这个数的具体组成. 那么就用10w棵Trie树,第i棵Trie树存的是被i整除的数,每次询问只需要在第k棵Trie树上查询即可.  事实上这道题还可以用比较巧妙的暴力过掉：对k进行分类处理. 若$k > 100$,则直接找k的倍数，看它与x的异或值，更新答案. 若$k < 100$,则从s到1枚举异或得到的答案，看v是否满足答案. 跑的比std还快，不科学.. 总结  难点是对限制的处理. 不等式限制可以用极值法解决，而倍数关系则要对数分类. 要想到这个数在以后的哪些查询中可能会被考虑到.

entry.title: poj1417 True Liars
entry.content: 英文题面Description After having drifted about in a small boat for a couple of days, Akira Crusoe Maeda was finally cast ashore on a foggy island. Though he was exhausted and despaired, he was still fortunate to remember a legend of the foggy island, which he had heard from patriarchs in his childhood. This must be the island in the legend. In the legend, two tribes have inhabited the island, one is divine and the other is devilish, once members of the divine tribe bless you, your future is bright and promising, and your soul will eventually go to Heaven, in contrast, once members of the devilish tribe curse you, your future is bleak and hopeless, and your soul will eventually fall down to Hell. In order to prevent the worst-case scenario, Akira should distinguish the devilish from the divine. But how? They looked exactly alike and he could not distinguish one from the other solely by their appearances. He still had his last hope, however. The members of the divine tribe are truth-tellers, that is, they always tell the truth and those of the devilish tribe are liars, that is, they always tell a lie. He asked some of them whether or not some are divine. They knew one another very much and always responded to him “faithfully” according to their individual natures (i.e., they always tell the truth or always a lie). He did not dare to ask any other forms of questions, since the legend says that a devilish member would curse a person forever when he did not like the question. He had another piece of useful informationf the legend tells the populations of both tribes. These numbers in the legend are trustworthy since everyone living on this island is immortal and none have ever been born at least these millennia. You are a good computer programmer and so requested to help Akira by writing a program that classifies the inhabitants according to their answers to his inquiries.Input The input consists of multiple data sets, each in the following format : n p1 p2xl yl a1x2 y2 a2…xi yi ai…xn yn an The first line has three non-negative integers n, p1, and p2. n is the number of questions Akira asked. pl and p2 are the populations of the divine and devilish tribes, respectively, in the legend. Each of the following n lines has two integers xi, yi and one word ai. xi and yi are the identification numbers of inhabitants, each of which is between 1 and p1 + p2, inclusive. ai is either yes, if the inhabitant xi said that the inhabitant yi was a member of the divine tribe, or no, otherwise. Note that xi and yi can be the same number since “are you a member of the divine tribe?” is a valid question. Note also that two lines may have the same x’s and y’s since Akira was very upset and might have asked the same question to the same one more than once. You may assume that n is less than 1000 and that p1 and p2 are less than 300. A line with three zeros, i.e., 0 0 0, represents the end of the input. You can assume that each data set is consistent and no contradictory answers are included. Output For each data set, if it includes sufficient information to classify all the inhabitants, print the identification numbers of all the divine ones in ascending order, one in a line. In addition, following the output numbers, print end in a line. Otherwise, i.e., if a given data set does not include sufficient information to identify all the divine members, print no in a line.Sample Input 2 1 11 2 no2 1 no3 2 11 1 yes2 2 yes3 3 yes2 2 11 2 yes2 3 no5 4 31 2 yes1 3 no4 5 yes5 6 yes6 7 no0 0 0Sample Output nono12end3456endSource Japan 2002 Kanazawa 翻译有p1个好人,p2个坏人，现在给出m个关系，诸如a说b是好人，a说b是坏人. 好人一定说真话，坏人一定说假话，问能否给出唯一的方案满足上述限制？ 分析  用图论的观点去思考. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 610;int n,p1,p2,fa[maxn],cnt,zhonglei[maxn],cnt0[maxn],cnt1[maxn],f[maxn][maxn],ans[maxn],tot,root[maxn];int find(int x){ if (x == fa[x]) return x; int root = find(fa[x]); zhonglei[x] ^= zhonglei[fa[x]]; return fa[x] = root;}void hebing(int x,int y,int op){ int fx = find(x),fy = find(y); if (fx != fy) { fa[fx] = fy; zhonglei[fx] = zhonglei[x] ^ zhonglei[y] ^ op; }}int main(){ while (scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&p1,&p2) != EOF) { cnt = 0; tot = 0; memset(f,0,sizeof(f)); memset(zhonglei,0,sizeof(zhonglei)); memset(cnt0,0,sizeof(cnt0)); memset(cnt1,0,sizeof(cnt1)); memset(root,0,sizeof(root)); if (n == 0 && p1 == 0 && p2 == 0) break; for (int i = 1; i <= p1 + p2; i++) fa[i] = i; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int x,y; char s[5]; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); scanf("%s",s + 1); if (s[1] == 'y') hebing(x,y,0); else hebing(x,y,1); } for (int i = 1; i <= p1 + p2; i++) { int fx = find(i); if (fx != i) continue; ++cnt; for (int j = 1; j <= p1 + p2; j++) { int fy = find(j); if (fx == fy) { if (zhonglei[j] == 0) cnt0[cnt]++; else cnt1[cnt]++; } } root[cnt] = i; } f[0][0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= p1 + p2; j++) { if (j - cnt0[i] >= 0) f[i][j] += f[i - 1][j - cnt0[i]]; if (j - cnt1[i] >= 0) f[i][j] += f[i - 1][j - cnt1[i]]; } if (f[cnt][p1] != 1) puts("no"); else { int sum = p1 + p2; for (int i = cnt; i >= 1; i--) { if (p1 - cnt1[i] >= 0 && f[i - 1][p1 - cnt1[i]]) { p1 -= cnt1[i]; for (int j = 1; j <= sum; j++) { int fx = find(j); if (fx == root[i] && zhonglei[j] == 1) ans[++tot] = j; } } else if (p1 - cnt0[i] >= 0 && f[i - 1][p1 - cnt0[i]]) { p1 -= cnt0[i]; for (int j = 1; j <= sum; j++) { int fx = find(j); if (fx == root[i] && zhonglei[j] == 0) ans[++tot] = j; } } } sort(ans + 1,ans + 1 + tot); for (int i = 1; i <= tot; i++) printf("%d\n",ans[i]); printf("end\n"); } } return 0;} 分析  如果有一条关系是“a说b yes or no”,那么就在a,b之间连一条边. 这样就会形成一个有多个连通分量的图. 对于每个连通分量，一定存在一个入度为0的点，确定这个人是好人or坏人，那么这个连通分量就会有两种结果. 记这个人为好人时，该连通分量的好人数为$cnt_1$,为坏人是，好人数为$cnt_2$. 因为每个连通分量都是独立的，问题就转变成了一个背包问题：将每个连通分量看作一个物品，取(cnt1)or不取(cnt2),令$f_{i,j}$表示前i个连通分量中，好人数量为j的方案数. 若最后$f_{cnt,p1}$不为1，则输出no.  输出方案怎么解决？从后往前枚举连通分量. 看这个状态是从哪个状态转移而来的. 因为最后$f_{cnt,p1}$为1，要么$f_{cnt - 1,p1 - cnt_{0,i}}$为1，要么$f_{cnt - 1,p1 - cnt_{1,i}}$为1，确定了转移方向后，更新p1,将符合要求的点加入答案中，最后排序输出即可.  可以利用带权并查集来处理连通分量. 因为yes表示a与b同类,no表示a与b不是同类，维护每个点是不是与连通分量的根的同类即可. 经验教训  模型见少了，就差最后一步的背包转化.

entry.title: bzoj2821 作诗
entry.content: 中文题面Description神犇SJY虐完HEOI之后给傻×LYD出了一题：SHY是T国的公主，平时的一大爱好是作诗。由于时间紧迫，SHY作完诗之后还要虐OI，于是SHY找来一篇长度为N的文章，阅读M次，每次只阅读其中连续的一段[l,r]，从这一段中选出一些汉字构成诗。因为SHY喜欢对偶，所以SHY规定最后选出的每个汉字都必须在[l,r]里出现了正偶数次。而且SHY认为选出的汉字的种类数（两个一样的汉字称为同一种）越多越好（为了拿到更多的素材！）。于是SHY请LYD安排选法。LYD这种傻×当然不会了，于是向你请教……问题简述：N个数，M组询问，每次问[l,r]中有多少个数出现正偶数次。Input输入第一行三个整数n、c以及m。表示文章字数、汉字的种类数、要选择M次。第二行有n个整数，每个数Ai在[1, c]间，代表一个编码为Ai的汉字。接下来m行每行两个整数l和r，设上一个询问的答案为ans(第一个询问时ans=0)，令L=(l+ans)mod n+1, R=(r+ans)mod n+1，若L>R，交换L和R，则本次询问为[L,R]。Output输出共m行，每行一个整数，第i个数表示SHY第i次能选出的汉字的最多种类数。 Sample Input5 3 5 1 2 2 3 1 0 4 1 2 2 2 2 3 3 5Sample Output2 0 0 0 1HINT对于100%的数据，1<=n,c,m<=10^5SourceBy lydrainbowcat 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125126127128#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <vector>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 100010;int n,C,Q,a[maxn],block,pos[maxn],L[maxn],R[maxn],cnt,f[1510][1510],ans,Time,vis[maxn];vector <int>c[maxn];void pre(int p,int st){ int vis[maxn],res = 0; for (int i = st; i <= n; i++) vis[a[i]] = 0; for (int i = st; i <= n; i++) { if (vis[a[i]] % 2 == 1) res++; if (vis[a[i]] % 2 == 0 && vis[a[i]] != 0) res--; vis[a[i]]++; if (i % block == 0) f[p][pos[i]] = res; if (i == n) f[p][pos[i]] = res; }}int solve(int l,int r){ int res = 0; Time++; if (pos[l] == pos[r]) { for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) { int temp = upper_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),r) - lower_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),l); if (temp % 2 == 0) { if (vis[a[i]] != Time) { vis[a[i]] = Time; res++; } } } return res; } int p = pos[l],q = pos[r]; res = f[p + 1][q - 1]; for (int i = l; i <= R[p]; i++) { int temp = upper_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),r) - lower_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),l); int temp2 = upper_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),R[q - 1]) - lower_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),L[p + 1]); if (temp % 2 == 0) { if (vis[a[i]] == Time) continue; vis[a[i]] = Time; if (temp2 % 2 == 1 || temp2 == 0) res++; } if (temp % 2 == 1) { if (vis[a[i]] == Time) continue; vis[a[i]] = Time; if (temp2 % 2 == 0 && temp2 != 0) res--; } } for (int i = L[q]; i <= r; i++) { int temp = upper_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),r) - lower_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),l); int temp2 = upper_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),R[q - 1]) - lower_bound(c[a[i]].begin(),c[a[i]].end(),L[p + 1]); if (temp % 2 == 0) { if (vis[a[i]] == Time) continue; vis[a[i]] = Time; if (temp2 % 2 == 1 || temp2 == 0) res++; } if (temp % 2 == 1) { if (vis[a[i]] == Time) continue; vis[a[i]] = Time; if (temp2 % 2 == 0 && temp2 != 0) res--; } } return res;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&C,&Q); block=sqrt((double)n/log((double)n)*log(2)); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); c[a[i]].push_back(i); } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) pos[i] = (i - 1) / block + 1; cnt = pos[n]; for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) L[i] = R[i - 1] + 1,R[i] = min(n,i * block); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) pre(i,L[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= Q; i++) { int l,r; scanf("%d%d",&l,&r); l = (l + ans) % n + 1; r = (r + ans) % n + 1; if (l > r) swap(l,r); printf("%d\n",ans = solve(l,r)); } return 0;} 分析  如果做过蒲公英那道题，很容易就能想到这道题可以用分块来做. 记录一个数组$f_{i,j}$表示第i个块到第j个块内出现次数为偶数的数有多少个. 可以通过$O(sqrt(n)n)$预处理得到.然后用一个vector存储每个数值在哪些位置出现了.  对于查询操作，先查整块内的值：若l属于块p,r属于块q,$ans = f_{p + 1,q - 1}$,然后暴力统计不在整块内的数在给定区间内是否出现了偶数次，利用vector对区间的左右端点进行lower_bound和upper_bound运算. 为了避免重复统计，可以利用vis数组标记已经统计过的值，因为值域很小，不需要离散化. 查询操作很多，利用时间戳来替代vis的清空. 这样做会出现一个问题：可能有的数在整块内出现了偶数次，在区间[l,r]内出现了奇数次，那么这个数对应的答案就要减掉;或者在整块内出现了奇数次，在[l,r]内出现了偶数次，这个数对应的答案就要加上. 对这两种情况进行特殊判断即可.  需要注意的是题目要求的出现偶数次是正偶数次，统计的时候特判出现0次的情况!

entry.title: poj2912 Rochambeau
entry.content: 英文题面Description N children are playing Rochambeau (scissors-rock-cloth) game with you. One of them is the judge. The rest children are divided into three groups (it is possible that some group is empty). You don’t know who is the judge, or how the children are grouped. Then the children start playing Rochambeau game for M rounds. Each round two children are arbitrarily selected to play Rochambeau for one once, and you will be told the outcome while not knowing which gesture the children presented. It is known that the children in the same group would present the same gesture (hence, two children in the same group always get draw when playing) and different groups for different gestures. The judge would present gesture randomly each time, hence no one knows what gesture the judge would present. Can you guess who is the judge after after the game ends? If you can, after how many rounds can you find out the judge at the earliest? Input Input contains multiple test cases. Each test case starts with two integers N and M (1 ≤ N ≤ 500, 0 ≤ M ≤ 2,000) in one line, which are the number of children and the number of rounds. Following are M lines, each line contains two integers in [0, N) separated by one symbol. The two integers are the IDs of the two children selected to play Rochambeau for this round. The symbol may be “=”, “>” or “<”, referring to a draw, that first child wins and that second child wins respectively. Output There is only one line for each test case. If the judge can be found, print the ID of the judge, and the least number of rounds after which the judge can be uniquely determined. If the judge can not be found, or the outcomes of the M rounds of game are inconsistent, print the corresponding message. Sample Input 3 30

entry.title: Codeforces 980 E.The Number Games
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译有一棵n个节点的树，第i个节点的权值为$2^i$,需要删掉K个点，使得剩下的点连通，并且保留下来的点的权值和尽量大，求删哪些点？ 提示  $2^i$有什么性质？ 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 2000010;int n,k,head[maxn],to[maxn],nextt[maxn],vis[maxn],fa[maxn][22],cnt,tot = 1;void add(int x,int y){ to[tot] = y; nextt[tot] = head[x]; head[x] = tot++;}void dfs(int u,int faa){ fa[u][0] = faa; for (int i = head[u]; i; i = nextt[i]) { int v = to[i]; if (v == faa) continue; dfs(v,u); }}int jump(int u){ int res = 0; for(int i = 21; i >= 0; i--) if (fa[u][i] && !vis[fa[u][i]]) { res += (1 << i); u = fa[u][i]; } return res + 1;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&k); k = n - k; for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); add(x,y); add(y,x); } dfs(n,0); for (int j = 1; j <= 21; j++) for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) fa[i][j] = fa[fa[i][j - 1]][j - 1]; vis[n] = 1; k--; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 1; i--) if (!vis[i]) { int temp = jump(i); if (temp + cnt > k) continue; cnt += temp; int x = i; while (!vis[x]) { vis[x] = 1; x = fa[x][0]; } } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (!vis[i]) printf("%d ",i); printf("\n"); return 0;} 分析  非常巧妙的一道题. 我一开始的想法是把所有度数为1的点放到优先队列中，取出权值最小的点删掉，继续加点删点，直到正好删去k个点.感觉似乎没问题，实际上当有4个点的权值分别为1,6,4,5时，要删掉3个点，若1的度数不为1，那么就有可能删掉4,5,6,不是最优的.于是我又想到了poj color the tree,每次删点要找最外围的点嘛，那么能不能找到一种依赖关系呢？ 显然不行，因为你可以以多种方式删掉一个点。  删点不行，能不能考虑保留哪些点呢？上述做法说明了我们不能优先确定顺序，而应该确定保留哪些点. 我当时忽视了一个性质，导致一直想不出来：$2^i = 2^{i - 1} + 2^{i - 2} + …… + 1$,也就是说选i号点比选所有的编号小于i的点都要优. 那么算法就出来了，按照编号从大往小选,选的那些点一定会构成一个连通块，若当前考虑的是第i个点，如果它与连通块之间的路径上有cnt个点，若cntt(已经选的点) + cnt + 1 > n - k,则不选，否则选，将路径上的所有点打上标记,利用倍增找到深度最浅的没有被标记的点. 以最后一个点为根建树. 经验教训  这类贪心问题都要从产生收益的一方取考虑啊！千万不要舍本逐末取考虑顺序条件什么的.

entry.title: Codeforces 980 D.Perfect Groups
entry.content: 英文题面 翻译有一个问题：从给定的将给定的集合划分成尽量少的子集，使得每个子集内的每一对数的乘积是完全平方数.现在给你一个数组A,让你求有多少个子数组(元素相邻)使得问题的答案为k,输出k为1~n的所有答案. 提示  由完全平方数能想到什么？ 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485868788899091929394959697#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 5010;int n,ans[maxn],a[maxn],b[maxn],cnt,c[maxn],vis[100010],Time;int div(int x){ if (x == 0) { b[++cnt] = 0; return 0; } bool flag = false; if (x < 0) flag = true; x = abs(x); int temp = 1; for (int i = 2; i * i <= x; i++) if (x % i == 0) { int res = 0; while (x % i == 0) { res++; x /= i; } if (res % 2 == 1) temp *= i; } if (x > 1) temp *= x; if (flag) temp = -temp; b[++cnt] = temp; return temp;}void solve(){ for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { bool flag = false; Time++; int res = 0; for (int j = i; j <= n; j++) { if (c[j] != 0) flag = true; if (!flag) { ans[1]++; continue; } if (c[j] == 0 && flag) { ans[res]++; continue; } int t = lower_bound(b + 1,b + 1 + cnt,c[j]) - b; if (vis[t] == Time) { ans[res]++; continue; } else { res++; ans[res]++; vis[t] = Time; } } }}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); c[i] = div(a[i]); } sort(b + 1,b + 1 + cnt); cnt = unique(b + 1,b + 1 + cnt) - b - 1; solve(); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) printf("%d ",ans[i]); return 0;} 分析  遇到完全平方数，先将所有数分解质因数. 若一个数为完全平方数，则它的每一个质因子的次数都是偶数.若两个数的乘积是完全平方数，那么这两个数对应的质因子的次数要么同时是奇数，要么同时是偶数. 因为要求乘积的质因子的次数为偶数，若当前这个数的某个质因子的次数已经是偶数了，我们就不需要考虑这个质因子的影响,只需要考虑它的次数为奇数的质因子的影响.  将每个数换一种表示方法，比如180 = 2*2*3*3*5,把次数为偶数的质因子去掉，就变成了5. 对于一个已经确定的集合，该集合最少被分成的子集数=有多少种不同的表达方式. 将所有数的表达方式都存到一个数组中，离散化一下. 因为n只有5000，可以枚举连续段的左右端点,固定左端点，枚举右端点，同时统计答案.  需要考虑负数和0的情况. 负数的表示方法一定带一个负号，若连续的一段数只包含0，则最少划分成一个子集，若包含其他的数，0可以忽略！ 经验教训  一开始想着把所有的表示方法状压一下，看来还是too young too simple. 感觉可以把这个表示方法理解成hash函数，将状压转换成hash,效率高很多.

entry.title: 算法竞赛进阶指南第四章
entry.content: 前言  花了5天的时间把这一章学完了. 发现有好多数学定理我以前都不会证明，现在学了一遍，算是建立了比较完整的知识体系吧. 1.余数与除法分块  遇到余数，要么是变成同余式处理，要么是将余数化为余数表达式. 即k mod i = k - (k / i) * i. 或者是r = k - pi. 注意到第一个式子有k / i下取整. 我们可以利用商是由若干段连续的数字拼成的这一事实来优化算法. 当i属于 [x, k /(k / x)]时，[k / i]的值都相等. 2.积性函数的求值方法.  对于积性函数$f(x)$，通常将$x$分解为$p_1^{q_1}p_2^{q_2}…p_n^{q_n}$,分别求出$f(p_i^{q_i})$的值，最后再乘起来就是$f(x)$的值了，这利用了一个数的不同质因子间互质这一定理. 3.欧拉函数的若干性质  1.对于所有的大于1的n,1~n中与n互质的数的和为$n*φ(n) / 2$.  2.若a,b互质，则$φ(ab) = φ(a)φ(b)$. （欧拉函数是积性函数）  3.若$p | n$且$p^2 | n$,则$φ(n) = φ(n / p) * p$.  4.若第3条中的$p^2$不整除$n$,则$φ(n) = φ(n / p) * (p - 1)$.  5.若d为n的约数，那么$Σφ(d) = n$.  因为$gcd(n,x) = gcd(n,n-x)$,即与n不互质的数成对出现，平均值为$n/2$，可以证明性质1，利用性质1可以求与一个数不互质的数的和.  利用第2,3,4条性质，可以在线性筛中求出$φ(n)$的值,性质二的证明可以利用上面提到的积性函数的求值方法：将a,b分解质因数. 性质3可以通过公式展开直接证明. 性质4则利用性质2证明.  对于第5条性质,令$g(n) = Σφ(d)$,证明$g(n)$是积性函数，利用积性函数的求值方法即可证明. 如何证明$g(n)$是积性函数？只需要证明$g(n)g(m) = g(nm)$即可，其中n,m互质. 4.费马小定理的证明  费马小定理：若p是质数，对于任意整数a,有$a^p = a （mod p)$  由费马小定理可以导出欧拉定理$a^{φ(p)} = 1(mod p)$,由于$p$是质数，所以$φ(p) = p - 1$,证明了欧拉定理即可证明费马小定理.  利用简化剩余系来证明. 若$\{a_1,a_2,…,a_{φ(n)}\}$与$\{aa_1,aa_2,…,aa_{φ(n)}\}$都能表示模n下的简化剩余系，那么$a^{φ(n)}a_1a_2…a_{φ(n)} = (aa_1)(aa_2)……(aa_{φ(n)}) = a_1a_2…a_{φ(n)}(modn)$,也就是将上述两个集合分别乘起来,因为a与n互质，所以a可以消掉，就得到了上面的定理，同时也证明了欧拉定理. 这一步利用了一个关键的性质：模n意义下，与n互质的数不影响整除性，故a可以消掉.  上面的结论都是在这两个集合是等价的前提下推导出来的，下面来证明这两个集合是等价的. 我们只需要两个集合的元素是一一对应的即可. 对于n原来的简化剩余系，若有$a_i,a_j$,$aa_i = aa_j(modn)$,那么a可以消掉，得到$a_i = a_j(modn)$. 当$a_i ≠a_j$ 时，$aa_i,aa_j$一定对应着不同的同余类. $a_i对应aa_i$,两个集合大小相等，那么这两个集合就是等价的. 5.裴蜀定理的证明  先证明边界情况：b = 0时,x = 1,y = 0. 再对欧几里得算法的递归过程应用数学归纳法. 若$bx + (amodb)y = gcd(b,amodb)$利用余数的展开式，对式子进行变形，令$x’ = y,y’ = x - (a/b)y$,因为$gcd(b,amodb) = gcd(a,b)$,所以$ax’ + by’ = gcd(a,b)$,正好就是欧几里得算法往上一层的情况. 6.乘法逆元与中国剩余定理  一定要注意：乘法逆元只有保证在模数为大质数的情况下才一定会有.若p为小质数，x是p的倍数，那么x不存在模p意义下的逆元.  中国剩余定理类似拉格朗日插值法，都是利用特殊的点值，只有当$x = x_i$时，$y = y_i$. 当$x = x_k (k≠i)$时，$y = 0$,因此可以将答案写成$Σa_iM_it_i(modm_i)$.中国剩余定理求出来的解一定要不断地加mod使之变成非负数！  若模数不互质，可以用增加模数的lcm法，或者直接合并两个方程. 7.矩阵快速幂  如果一类问题满足以下特点：  1.可以抽象出一个长度为n的一维向量，该向量在每个单位时间发生一次变化.  2.变化的形式是一个线性递推(只能乘上or加上一个数).  3.该递推式在每个时间可能作用于不同的数据上，但本身保持不变.  4.向量变化时间(递推的轮数)很长，但向量长度n不大.  即可使用矩阵快速幂优化递推.  设计转移矩阵也有很多技巧. 若状态矩阵的第i维对下一层状态矩阵的第j维有影响，那么转移矩阵的$a_{i,j} = ?$,?根据题目来定. 状态矩阵是一个横着的矩阵，其列数与转移矩阵的行数相等.  若递推式具有周期性(在同一个周期内的不同时间递推式不同)，周期很小，那么可以构造周期长度个矩阵. 8.高斯消元and线性基  高斯消元可以用来解线性方程组，异或方程组，模线性方程组(我目前遇到的)，线性基主要是用来处理异或问题的.  高斯消元有四类不同的写法:  1.有且仅有一组解的线性方程组. （模）  2.贪心+线性方程组.  3.异或方程组.  4.有多种解的情况的线性方程组.（模）  第一种怎么写都可以. 第二种是类似于线性基一样的写法，不交换行的位置，每次消掉能找到的最高位. 第三种就是每次找最大的数，换到第i行. 消掉其它的i的最高位为1的数. 第四种要维护当前消到了第几行，消到了第几列. 优先保证第i行被消掉，而不是贪心中的保证第j列被消掉，以下是四种高斯消元的代码： 代码11234567891011121314151617181920212223void solve(){ for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j <= n; j++) { while (fabs(a[j][i]) > eps) { double t = a[i][i] / a[j][i]; for (int k = i; k <= n + 1; k++) a[i][k] -= t * a[j][k]; for (int k = i; k <= n + 1; k++) swap(a[i][k],a[j][k]); } } } for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) { for (int j = i + 1; j <= n; j++) a[i][n + 1] -= x[j] * a[i][j]; x[i] = a[i][n + 1] / a[i][i]; }} 代码212345678910111213141516171819202122232425void guess(){ for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++) { if (fabs(e[i].t[j]) > eps) { if (vis[j]) { long double temp = e[i].t[j] / e[vis[j]].t[j]; for (int k = j; k <= n; k++) e[i].t[k] -= temp * e[vis[j]].t[k]; } else { vis[j] = i; cnt++; ans += e[i].w; break; } } } }} 代码312345678910111213141516171819202122void guess(){ for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) { for (ll j = i + 1; j <= cnt; j++) if (e[j] > e[i]) swap(e[i],e[j]); if (e[i] == 0) { t = i - 1; break; } for (ll k = 63; k >= 0; k--) if ((e[i] >> k) & 1) { for (ll j = 1; j <= cnt; j++) if (i != j && ((e[j] >> k) & 1)) e[j] ^= e[i]; break; } }} 代码4123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354void guess(){ int row,col; for (row = 1,col = 1; row <= m && col <= n; row++,col++) { int i; for (i = row; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][col]) break; if (i == m + 1) { row--; continue; } if (i != row) for (int j = 1; j <= n + 1; j++) swap(a[row][j],a[i][j]); for (i = row + 1; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][col]) { int LCM = lcm(a[i][col],a[row][col]); int t1 = LCM / a[i][col],t2 = LCM / a[row][col]; for (int j = col; j <= n + 1; j++) a[i][j] = ((a[i][j] * t1 - t2 * a[row][j]) % mod + mod) % mod; } } for (int i = row; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][n + 1]) { flag = -1; return; } if (row <= n) { flag = -2; return; } for (int i = m; i >= 1; i--) { int temp = 0; for (int j = i + 1; j <= n; j++) temp = (temp + a[i][j] * ans[j] % mod) % mod; temp = ((a[i][n + 1] - temp) % mod + mod) % mod; int A = a[i][i],B = mod; int x,y; int d = exgcd(A,B,x,y); x *= (temp / d); x %= mod; x = (x % (mod / d) + (mod / d)) % (mod / d); ans[i] = x; if (ans[i] < 3) ans[i] += 7; }}   线性基的性质：1.选取任意不相同的基底异或结果都不为0.  2.一个线性空间的所有基包含的向量个数都相等，可以依据此来贪心.  3.需要考虑0的情况！  4.不去重异或集合是去重异或集合的$2^t$个整数各重复$2^{n - t}$次所形成的. 9.概率/期望/01分数规划/博弈  期望dp要倒推，概率dp要正推. 期望dp如果要正推就要先求出到达每个点的概率,转移的代价要乘上概率.  01分数规划用二分.  sg函数用来求解有向图游戏. 在应用sg函数之前，必须先将失败条件转化为一方不能移动.,可以通过微调边界来实现.  mex与xor的区别：mex对应的是每一种决策所转移到的状态的sg值的集合,xor是一种决策将当前任务分成的若干个子任务的sg值的运算.

entry.title: tyvj2049 魔法珠
entry.content: 中文题面题目描述Freda和rainbow是超自然之界学校(Preternatural Kingdom University，简称PKU)魔法学院的学生。为了展示新学的魔法，Ta们决定进行一场对弈~~~起初Freda面前有n堆魔法珠，其中第i堆有ai颗。Freda和rainbow可以轮流进行以下操作：1.选择n堆中魔法珠数量大于1的任意一堆。记该堆魔法珠的数量为p，p有b1、b2……bm这m个小于p的约数。2.施展魔法把这一堆魔法珠变成m堆，每堆各有b1、b2……bm颗魔法珠。3.选择这m堆中的一堆魔法珠，施展魔法令其消失。注意一次操作过后，魔法珠的堆数会增加m-2，各堆中魔法珠数量的总和可能会发生变化。当轮到某人操作时，如果每堆中魔法珠的数量均为1，那么ta就输了。Freda和rainbow都采取最好的策略，从Freda开始。请你预测一下，谁能获胜呢？输入格式本题仅有一个测试点，包含多组数据，以EOF结尾。每组数据的第一行包含一个整数n。第二行包含n个整数ai。输出格式对于每组数据，在两人均采取最佳策略的前提下，若Freda能获胜，输出freda；若Rainbow能获胜，输出rainbow。提示1<=n<=100,1<=ai<=1000感谢zanoes提供出题思路样例数据输入样例 #132 2 231 3 5输出样例 #1fredarainbow 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 110;int n,a[maxn],f[1100];int sg(int x){ if (x == 1) return f[x] = 0; if (f[x] != -1) return f[x]; int vis[1010],p[1010],cnt = 0,res = 0; memset(vis,0,sizeof(vis)); for (int i = 1; i * i <= x; i++) { if (x % i == 0) { if (i * i != x) { p[++cnt] = i; p[++cnt] = x / i; } else p[++cnt] = i; } } for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) if (p[i] < x) res ^= sg(p[i]); for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) if (p[i] < x) vis[res ^ sg(p[i])] = 1; for (int i = 0;;i++) if (!vis[i]) return f[x] = i;}int main(){ memset(f,-1,sizeof(f)); while (scanf("%d",&n) != EOF) { int ans = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); ans ^= sg(a[i]); } if (ans == 0) puts("rainbow"); else puts("freda"); } return 0;} 分析  sg函数的吼题啊！  我一开始的想法类似于二进制状压，将每一堆的魔法珠的数量都给存到一个状态中. 这样造成的后果是后继状态极多，状态不好表示，而且不好转移和还原. 没有想到每一堆魔法珠都是独立的……. 单独考虑每一堆魔法珠. 将其每一种决策的后继所有状态的异或值放到一个集合中，最后求该集合的mex,就能得到sg值了.  之前xor和mex一直傻傻分不清. 做完这题才算是有了一点新的认识. 单独考虑每一种决策，若一个决策能够分成若干个子问题，就将这些子问题的sg值异或起来，放到mex集合中. 也就是说：mex集合的大小取决于决策的个数,mex对应决策,xor对应将所有的子问题合并.

entry.title: poj1704 Georgia and Bob
entry.content: 英文题面Description Georgia and Bob decide to play a self-invented game. They draw a row of grids on paper, number the grids from left to right by 1, 2, 3, …, and place N chessmen on different grids, as shown in the following figure for example:Georgia and Bob move the chessmen in turn. Every time a player will choose a chessman, and move it to the left without going over any other chessmen or across the left edge. The player can freely choose number of steps the chessman moves, with the constraint that the chessman must be moved at least ONE step and one grid can at most contains ONE single chessman. The player who cannot make a move loses the game. Georgia always plays first since “Lady first”. Suppose that Georgia and Bob both do their best in the game, i.e., if one of them knows a way to win the game, he or she will be able to carry it out. Given the initial positions of the n chessmen, can you predict who will finally win the game?Input The first line of the input contains a single integer T (1 <= T <= 20), the number of test cases. Then T cases follow. Each test case contains two lines. The first line consists of one integer N (1 <= N <= 1000), indicating the number of chessmen. The second line contains N different integers P1, P2 … Pn (1 <= Pi <= 10000), which are the initial positions of the n chessmen.Output For each test case, prints a single line, “Georgia will win”, if Georgia will win the game; “Bob will win”, if Bob will win the game; otherwise ‘Not sure’.Sample Input 231 2 381 5 6 7 9 12 14 17Sample Output Bob will winGeorgia will winSource POJ Monthly—2004.07.18 分析  经典的阶梯博弈问题.  将n个棋两两分成一组. 若n为奇数，则将第一个棋和位置0分为一组. 接下来考虑两种不同的移动方式：  若对手移动一组中前面的棋x步，那么你可以移该组后面的棋x步，两个棋的相对位置不变. 若对手移动一组中后面的棋. 你可以选择一组中前面的移动，也可以选择后面的. 若你选择了前面的，对手就会选择相应的后面的，和你挪相同的步数，一组中的棋的相对位置不变,并且接下来又轮到你行动. 若你选择了后面的，则一定会有一组棋的相对位置发生改变. 也就是说：只有每一组内的两个棋子的距离会对答案产生影响，组与组之间的距离是没有影响的.那么可以把每一组看作一堆石子，石子的个数为组内两个棋子的距离-1，这样就转化为经典的nim问题了.

entry.title: bzoj3029 守卫者的挑战
entry.content: 中文题面Description 打开了黑魔法师Vani的大门，队员们在迷宫般的路上漫无目的地搜寻着关押applepi的监狱的所在地。突然，眼前一道亮光闪过。“我，Nizem，是黑魔法圣殿的守卫者。如果你能通过我的挑战，那么你可以带走黑魔法圣殿的地图……”瞬间，队员们被传送到了一个擂台上，最初身边有一个容量为K的包包。 擂台赛一共有N项挑战，各项挑战依次进行。第i项挑战有一个属性ai，如果ai>=0，表示这次挑战成功后可以再获得一个容量为ai的包包；如果ai=-1，则表示这次挑战成功后可以得到一个大小为1 的地图残片。地图残片必须装在包包里才能带出擂台，包包没有必要全部装满，但是队员们必须把 【获得的所有的】地图残片都带走（没有得到的不用考虑，只需要完成所有N项挑战后背包容量足够容纳地图残片即可），才能拼出完整的地图。并且他们至少要挑战成功L次才能离开擂台。 队员们一筹莫展之时，善良的守卫者Nizem帮忙预估出了每项挑战成功的概率，其中第i项挑战成功的概率为pi%。现在，请你帮忙预测一下，队员们能够带上他们获得的地图残片离开擂台的概率。 Input 第一行三个整数N,L,K。 第二行N个实数，第i个实数pi表示第i项挑战成功的百分比。 第三行N个整数，第i个整数ai表示第i项挑战的属性值. Output 一个整数，表示所求概率，四舍五入保留6 位小数。 Sample Input样例输入1 3 1 0 10 20 30 -1 -1 2 样例输入2 5 1 2 36 44 13 83 63 -1 2 -1 2 1 Sample Output样例输出1 0.300000 样例输出2 0.980387 HINT 若第三项挑战成功，如果前两场中某场胜利，队员们就有空间来容纳得到的地图残片，如果挑战失败，根本就没有获得地图残片，不用考虑是否能装下；若第三项挑战失败，如果前两场有胜利，没有包来装地图残片，如果前两场都失败，不满足至少挑战成功次（）的要求。因此所求概率就是第三场挑战获胜的概率。 对于 100% 的数据，保证0<=K<=2000，0<=N<=200，-1<=ai<=1000，0<=L<=N，0<=pi<=100。 SourcePoetize1 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 201;int n,l,k,cost[maxn],now,last;double p[maxn];double f[2][maxn][maxn * 2],ans;int main(){ scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&l,&k); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { double temp; scanf("%lf",&temp); p[i] = temp / 100.0; } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&cost[i]); f[1][0][k + n] = 1.0; last = 1,now = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { memset(f[now],0,sizeof(f[now])); for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) for (int k = 0; k <= 2 * n; k++) { int t = k + cost[i]; if (t < 0) t = 0; if (t > 2 * n) t = 2 * n; f[now][j + 1][t] += f[last][j][k] * p[i]; f[now][j][k] += f[last][j][k] * (1.0 - p[i]); } swap(now,last); } for (int i = l; i <= n; i++) for (int j = n; j <= 2 * n; j++) ans += f[last][i][j]; printf("%.6lf\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  挺好的一道题.  很容易想到这道题用概率dp来做. 如何设计状态？ 对答案有影响的变量是：当前进行到了第几项挑战、有几项挑战成功了、当前背包容量、收集了多少个地图残片. 如果将它们都保存在状态中，内存和时间都会爆. 考虑优化状态. 地图的数量是优先的，最多只会有n个，而背包容量可能会非常大，如果能不保存这一维就好了. 题目要求最后背包的容量>地图残片个数. 那么可以记录一个收益值，遇到背包，则加上其对应的容量，遇到地图就-1，最后只要检查收益值是否大于等于0即可.那么状态就设计为了$f_{i,j,k}$表示当前进行到了第i项挑战，有j项成功了，收益值为k的概率.  一些细节问题需要注意：收益值可能会出现负数，因此将收益值整体+n，那么以前的0收益值就对应了现在的n, 因为地图残片数量最多只会有n个，所以当k ≥ 2n时，可以将k看作2n,同理，k ≤ 0时，可以将其看作0. dp是由当前已知状态去更新位置状态，用刷表法. 内存可能会炸,(刚好开成200*200*400就不会炸)，利用滚动数组优化. 因为是用刷表法，并不是仅仅交换两个指针就完了. 要将转移到的指针的f数组给清空. 刷表法的滚动数组优化和填表法的还是有区别的.

entry.title: poj3904 Sky Code
entry.content: 英文题面Description Stancu likes space travels but he is a poor software developer and will never be able to buy his own spacecraft. That is why he is preparing to steal the spacecraft of Petru. There is only one problem – Petru has locked the spacecraft with a sophisticated cryptosystem based on the ID numbers of the stars from the Milky Way Galaxy. For breaking the system Stancu has to check each subset of four stars such that the only common divisor of their numbers is 1. Nasty, isn’t it? Fortunately, Stancu has succeeded to limit the number of the interesting stars to N but, any way, the possible subsets of four stars can be too many. Help him to find their number and to decide if there is a chance to break the system.Input In the input file several test cases are given. For each test case on the first line the number N of interesting stars is given (1 ≤ N ≤ 10000). The second line of the test case contains the list of ID numbers of the interesting stars, separated by spaces. Each ID is a positive integer which is no greater than 10000. The input data terminate with the end of file.Output For each test case the program should print one line with the number of subsets with the asked property.Sample Input 42 3 4 542 4 6 872 3 4 5 7 6 8Sample Output 1034Source Southeastern European Regional Programming Contest 2008 翻译求多少个四元组的gcd为1 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 10010;ll n,a[maxn],num[maxn],cnt[maxn],maxx;ll ans,c[maxn];void init(){ for (ll i = 4; i <= 10000; i++) c[i] = i * (i - 1) * (i - 2) * (i - 3) / 24;}void solve(ll x){ ll prime[30],tot = 0; memset(prime,0,sizeof(prime)); for (ll i = 2; i * i <= x; i++) if (x % i == 0) { prime[++tot] = i; while(x % i == 0) x /= i; } if (x > 1) prime[++tot] = x; for (ll i = 1; i < (1 << tot); i++) { ll temp = 1,res = 0; for (ll j = 0; j < tot; j++) if (i >> j & 1) { temp *= prime[j + 1]; res++; } num[temp]++; cnt[temp] = res; }}int main(){ init(); while (scanf("%lld",&n) != EOF) { ans = 0; maxx = 0; memset(num,0,sizeof(num)); memset(cnt,0,sizeof(cnt)); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); solve(a[i]); } for (ll i = 1; i <= 10000; i++) if (num[i]) { if (cnt[i] & 1) ans += c[num[i]]; else ans -= c[num[i]]; } printf("%lld\n",c[n] - ans); } return 0;} 分析  直接计数gcd = 1的四元组的数量很难. 一个思路是求gcd != 1的四元组数量，用总数量减掉它就是答案了. 求gcd != 1的n元组问题有一个很经典的解法：容斥原理. 枚举所有可能出现在$a_i$的质因子p,求gcd为p的倍数的四元组数量. 可以先求出有多少个数是p的倍数，再利用组合公式可以计算出来. 可能会有四元组同时被p和q计数，那么就要减掉gcd同时是p和q的倍数的四元组的数量. 以此类推，奇+偶-即可.容斥原理要分析清楚把状态空间分为哪几种集合，有哪些集合可能相交.找相交关系，不要找包含关系！

entry.title: poj2482 Stars in Your Window
entry.content: 英文题面Description Fleeting time does not blur my memory of you. Can it really be 4 years since I first saw you? I still remember, vividly, on the beautiful Zhuhai Campus, 4 years ago, from the moment I saw you smile, as you were walking out of the classroom and turned your head back, with the soft sunset glow shining on your rosy cheek, I knew, I knew that I was already drunk on you. Then, after several months’ observation and prying, your grace and your wisdom, your attitude to life and your aspiration for future were all strongly impressed on my memory. You were the glamorous and sunny girl whom I always dream of to share the rest of my life with. Alas, actually you were far beyond my wildest dreams and I had no idea about how to bridge that gulf between you and me. So I schemed nothing but to wait, to wait for an appropriate opportunity. Till now — the arrival of graduation, I realize I am such an idiot that one should create the opportunity and seize it instead of just waiting. These days, having parted with friends, roommates and classmates one after another, I still cannot believe the fact that after waving hands, these familiar faces will soon vanish from our life and become no more than a memory. I will move out from school tomorrow. And you are planning to fly far far away, to pursue your future and fulfill your dreams. Perhaps we will not meet each other any more if without fate and luck. So tonight, I was wandering around your dormitory building hoping to meet you there by chance. But contradictorily, your appearance must quicken my heartbeat and my clumsy tongue might be not able to belch out a word. I cannot remember how many times I have passed your dormitory building both in Zhuhai and Guangzhou, and each time aspired to see you appear in the balcony or your silhouette that cast on the window. I cannot remember how many times this idea comes to my mind: call her out to have dinner or at least a conversation. But each time, thinking of your excellence and my commonness, the predominance of timidity over courage drove me leave silently. Graduation, means the end of life in university, the end of these glorious, romantic years. Your lovely smile which is my original incentive to work hard and this unrequited love will be both sealed as a memory in the deep of my heart and my mind. Graduation, also means a start of new life, a footprint on the way to bright prospect. I truly hope you will be happy everyday abroad and everything goes well. Meanwhile, I will try to get out from puerility and become more sophisticated. To pursue my own love and happiness here in reality will be my ideal I never desert. Farewell, my princess! If someday, somewhere, we have a chance to gather, even as gray-haired man and woman, at that time, I hope we can be good friends to share this memory proudly to relight the youthful and joyful emotions. If this chance never comes, I wish I were the stars in the sky and twinkling in your window, to bless you far away, as friends, to accompany you every night, sharing the sweet dreams or going through the nightmares together. Here comes the problem: Assume the sky is a flat plane. All the stars lie on it with a location (x, y). for each star, there is a grade ranging from 1 to 100, representing its brightness, where 100 is the brightest and 1 is the weakest. The window is a rectangle whose edges are parallel to the x-axis or y-axis. Your task is to tell where I should put the window in order to maximize the sum of the brightness of the stars within the window. Note, the stars which are right on the edge of the window does not count. The window can be translated but rotation is not allowed.Input There are several test cases in the input. The first line of each case contains 3 integers: n, W, H, indicating the number of stars, the horizontal length and the vertical height of the rectangle-shaped window. Then n lines follow, with 3 integers each: x, y, c, telling the location (x, y) and the brightness of each star. No two stars are on the same point. There are at least 1 and at most 10000 stars in the sky. 1<=W，H<=1000000, 0<=x，y<2^31.Output For each test case, output the maximum brightness in a single line.Sample Input 3 5 41 2 32 3 26 3 13 5 41 2 32 3 25 3 1Sample Output 56Source POJ Contest,Author:kinfkong@ZSU 翻译每个星星都有亮度，用一个长为w,宽为h的矩形圈星星，要求圈的星星的亮度总和最大. 位于矩形边界上的星星不算. 分析  已经知道了矩形的长和宽，还需要知道什么就能确定一个矩形？ 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485868788899091929394959697#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 20010;ll n,w,h,cnt,a[maxn * 2],p,ans,maxx[maxn << 2],add[maxn << 2];struct node{ ll x,y3,y4,c;}e[maxn * 2];bool cmp(node a,node b){ if (a.x == b.x) return a.c > b.c; return a.x < b.x;}void pushup(ll o){ maxx[o] = max(maxx[o * 2],maxx[o * 2 + 1]);}void pushdown(ll o){ if (add[o]) { add[o * 2] += add[o]; add[o * 2 + 1] += add[o]; maxx[o * 2] += add[o]; maxx[o * 2 + 1] += add[o]; add[o] = 0; }}void update(ll o,ll l,ll r,ll x,ll y,ll v){ if (x <= l && r <= y) { add[o] += v; maxx[o] += v; return; } pushdown(o); ll mid = (l + r) >> 1; if (x <= mid) update(o * 2,l,mid,x,y,v); if (y > mid) update(o * 2 + 1,mid + 1,r,x,y,v); pushup(o);}int main(){ while (scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&w,&h) != EOF) { ans = 0; cnt = 0; memset(maxx,0,sizeof(maxx)); memset(add,0,sizeof(add)); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { ll x,y,c; scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&x,&y,&c); e[++cnt].c = c; e[cnt].x = x; e[cnt].y3 = y; e[cnt].y4 = y + h - 1; e[++cnt].c = -c; e[cnt].x = x + w - 1; e[cnt].y3 = y; e[cnt].y4 = y + h - 1; a[cnt - 1] = y; a[cnt] = y + h - 1; } sort(e + 1,e + 1 + cnt,cmp); sort(a + 1,a + 1 + cnt); p = unique(a + 1,a + 1 + cnt) - a - 1; for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) { ll x = lower_bound(a + 1,a + 1 + p,e[i].y3) - a; ll y = lower_bound(a + 1,a + 1 + p,e[i].y4) - a; update(1,1,p,x,y,e[i].c); ans = max(ans,maxx[1]); } printf("%lld\n",ans); } return 0;} 分析  知道了矩形的长和宽，只需要知道矩形的一个边角的坐标即可确定这个矩形的位置. 为了避免坐标出现负数的情况，我们选取右上角.  对于一个星星，矩形的右上角在一个固定的区域内就能够覆盖这颗星星.边界情况比较难处理. 如果边界上不能有星星，那么这个固定的区域对应的横坐标和纵坐标的取值就是开区间，坐标可能取到浮点数. 那么将所有的星星往左移x,下移y$(0 <x,y<1)$,那么矩形顶点的坐标就是整数了(否则我们可以改变x,y的大小，将矩形顶点的坐标调整为整数). 因此，矩形右上角能取到的区域的左下角的点为(x,y),右上角的点为(x + w - 1,y + h - 1).  对每一个星星求得这么一个矩形. 这些矩形都有权值(星星的亮度). 矩形重叠的部分的权值是重叠的这些矩形的权值和. 现在的任务就是求权值和最大的一个区域.做到这已经不难想到用扫描线去求了，线段树维护最大值即可. 总结  不要陷入思维的死胡同. 星星是产生贡献的，故从星星的角度去考虑，而不是考虑矩形应该放在哪.和hdu4864有异曲同工之妙.  若干矩形堆在一起求某个值是扫描线的应用.  矩形边界情况的处理.

entry.title: CH Round
entry.content: 中文题面描述在一片广袤无垠的原野上，散落着N块磁石。每个磁石的性质可以用一个五元组(x,y,m,p,r)描述，其中x,y表示其坐标，m是磁石的质量，p是磁力，r是吸引半径。若磁石A与磁石B的距离不大于磁石A的吸引半径，并且磁石B的质量不大于磁石A的磁力，那么A可以吸引B。小取酒带着一块自己的磁石L来到了这篇原野的(x0,y0)处，我们可以视为磁石L的坐标为(x0,y0)。小取酒手持磁石L并保持原地不动，所有可以被L吸引的磁石将会被吸引过来。在每个时刻，他可以选择更换任意一块自己已经获得的磁石（当然也可以是自己最初携带的L磁石）在(x0,y0)处吸引更多的磁石。小取酒想知道，他最多能获得多少块磁石呢？ 输入格式第一行五个整数x0,y0,pL,rL,N，表示小取酒所在的位置，磁石L磁力、吸引半径和原野上散落磁石的个数。接下来N行每行五个整数x,y,m,p,r，描述一块磁石的性质。 输出格式输出一个整数，表示最多可以获得的散落磁石个数（不包含最初携带的磁石L）。 样例输入0 0 5 10 55 4 7 11 5-7 1 4 7 80 2 13 5 62 -3 9 3 413 5 1 9 9样例输出3数据范围与约定对于30%的数据，1<=N<=1000。对于100%的数据，1<=N<=250000，-10^9<=x,y<=10^9，1<=m,p,r<=10^9。 提示  二维偏序问题怎么处理？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687#include <queue>#include <cmath>#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 250010;const ll inf = 1e18;ll n,x0,y00,pl,rl,pos[maxn],block,cnt,ans,L[maxn],R[maxn],tot,vis[maxn],weight[maxn];struct node{ ll x,y,p,r,m,dist;} e[maxn],b[maxn];bool cmp(node a,node b){ return a.m < b.m;}bool cmp2(node a,node b){ return a.dist < b.dist;}int main(){ queue <node> q; scanf("%lld%lld%lld%lld%lld",&x0,&y00,&pl,&rl,&n); block = sqrt(n); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld%lld%lld%lld%lld",&e[i].x,&e[i].y,&e[i].m,&e[i].p,&e[i].r); e[i].dist = (e[i].x - x0) * (e[i].x - x0) + (e[i].y - y00) * (e[i].y - y00); e[i].r = e[i].r * e[i].r; } node temp; temp.p = pl; temp.r = rl * rl; q.push(temp); sort(e + 1,e + 1 + n,cmp); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) pos[i] = (i - 1) / block + 1; cnt = pos[n]; for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) L[i] = R[i - 1] + 1,R[i] = min(n,i * block); for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) weight[i] = e[R[i]].m; for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) sort(e + L[i],e + 1 + R[i],cmp2); while (!q.empty()) { node u = q.front(); q.pop(); for (ll i = 1; i <= cnt; i++) { if (weight[i] > u.p) { for (int j = L[i]; j <= R[i]; j++) if (!vis[j] && e[j].m <= u.p && e[j].dist <= u.r) { vis[j] = 1; q.push(e[j]); ans++; } break; } while (L[i] <= R[i] && e[L[i]].dist <= u.r) { if (!vis[L[i]]) { ans++; q.push(e[L[i]]); vis[L[i]] = 1; } L[i]++; } } } printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  首先可以想到基本的算法框架：建立一个队列，每次取出队首磁石，将能吸到的磁石全部放到队列里，最后统计队列中的元素个数. 关键问题就是如何快速判断哪些磁石能够被吸引.  本题中，磁石吸引条件包含两个维度：质量≤磁力、距离≤吸引半径.这是一个二维偏序问题. 通常的解法是排序+树状数组，但是这只能统计数量，我们想要知道构成二维偏序的是具体的哪一对. 两种解法：1.分块. 2.平衡树. 先对一维进行排序，再对另一维操作.  这道题比较简单的方法是分块. 处理方法是整体排序+块内排序.先将所有的磁石按照质量从小到大排序. 再将每一块内部的磁石按照距离从小到大排序. 在排序之前要记录下每一块内的磁石的最大质量. 当每一块的最大质量被确定下来后，若当前队首磁石的磁力≥当前块内的最大质量，那么这一个块内的磁石的质量对答案就没有影响了，只需要考虑距离. 而块内是按照距离从小到大排序的，可以对每一个块维护一个单调指针,这些单调指针一共最多会移动n步. 可以直接把每一个块的左端点当作指针.  若当前队首磁石的磁力≤当前块内的最大质量，那么只能暴力统计了. 将符合要求的放进队列中. 注意：这一个块的单调指针不会变动，也不需要重新排序. 因为拿走一些元素不影响已经排好的顺序. 为了避免将已入队的元素重复入队，使用vis数组标记.. 套路  分块处理二维偏序问题，题目要求知道具体的值. 利用整体排序+块内排序的方法.

entry.title: poj2182 Lost Cows
entry.content: 英文题面Description N (2 <= N <= 8,000) cows have unique brands in the range 1..N. In a spectacular display of poor judgment, they visited the neighborhood ‘watering hole’ and drank a few too many beers before dinner. When it was time to line up for their evening meal, they did not line up in the required ascending numerical order of their brands. Regrettably, FJ does not have a way to sort them. Furthermore, he’s not very good at observing problems. Instead of writing down each cow’s brand, he determined a rather silly statistic: For each cow in line, he knows the number of cows that precede that cow in line that do, in fact, have smaller brands than that cow. Given this data, tell FJ the exact ordering of the cows.Input Line 1: A single integer, N Lines 2..N: These N-1 lines describe the number of cows that precede a given cow in line and have brands smaller than that cow. Of course, no cows precede the first cow in line, so she is not listed. Line 2 of the input describes the number of preceding cows whose brands are smaller than the cow in slot #2; line 3 describes the number of preceding cows whose brands are smaller than the cow in slot #3; and so on.Output Lines 1..N: Each of the N lines of output tells the brand of a cow in line. Line #1 of the output tells the brand of the first cow in line; line 2 tells the brand of the second cow; and so on.Sample Input 51210Sample Output 24531Source USACO 2003 U S Open Orange 翻译  n头奶牛，身高分别为1~n中的一个. 现在已知每头牛前面有多少头牛比它矮，求每头牛的身高. 提示  以何种顺序确定奶牛的身高？ 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 10010;int n,a[maxn],b[maxn],c[maxn];void add(int x){ while (x <= n) { c[x]++; x += x & (-x); }}int query(int x){ int res = 0; while (x) { res += c[x]; x -= x & (-x); } return res;}int find(int x){ int l = 1,r = n,ans = n; while (l <= r) { int mid = (l + r) >> 1; int t = query(mid); if (mid - t >= x) { ans = mid; r = mid - 1; } else l = mid + 1; } return ans;}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) { b[i] = find(a[i] + 1); add(b[i]); } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) printf("%d\n",b[i]); return 0;} 分析  最后一头奶牛的身高是知道的， 从后往前确定奶牛的身高,若倒数第i头奶牛前面有ai头奶牛的升高比其低，则说明其升高至少要是ai + 1,可能后面已经确定的奶牛的升高会占用1~ai+1中的若干个, 所以倒数第i头奶牛的升高是从小到大未被占用的第ai + 1个数. 利用二分+树状数组求解. (树状数组维护前缀和)

entry.title: bzoj3105 [cqoi2013]新Nim游戏
entry.content: 中文题面Description传统的Nim游戏是这样的：有一些火柴堆，每堆都有若干根火柴（不同堆的火柴数量可以不同）。两个游戏者轮流操作，每次可以选一个火柴堆拿走若干根火柴。可以只拿一根，也可以拿走整堆火柴，但不能同时从超过一堆火柴中拿。拿走最后一根火柴的游戏者胜利。本题的游戏稍微有些不同：在第一个回合中，第一个游戏者可以直接拿走若干个整堆的火柴。可以一堆都不拿，但不可以全部拿走。第二回合也一样，第二个游戏者也有这样一次机会。从第三个回合（又轮到第一个游戏者）开始，规则和Nim游戏一样。如果你先拿，怎样才能保证获胜？如果可以获胜的话，还要让第一回合拿的火柴总数尽量小。 Input第一行为整数k。即火柴堆数。第二行包含k个不超过109的正整数，即各堆的火柴个数。 Output 输出第一回合拿的火柴数目的最小值。如果不能保证取胜，输出-1。Sample Input6 5 5 6 6 5 5 Sample Output21HINTk<=100 提示  在普通的nim游戏中，先手必胜的条件是什么？ 代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;int n;ll a[110],b[60],ans,sum;bool cmp(ll x,ll y){ return x > y;}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); ans += a[i]; } sum = ans; sort(a + 1,a + 1 + n,cmp); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int t = a[i]; for (int j = 31; j >= 0; j--) { if (a[i] >> j & 1) { if (b[j]) a[i] ^= b[j]; else { b[j] = a[i]; break; } } } if (a[i]) ans -= t; } if (ans == sum) printf("-1\n"); else printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  尽量让先手取胜. 若第一轮操作后，存在若干堆石子，使得它们的数量的异或和为0，则先手必输. 因为后手可以取出其它的石子使得异或和变为0，则变成必输局面. 线性基中，无论取多少个数异或起来都不会等于0，故求出石子个数最多的线性基即可.按照石子个数从大到小排序，动态维护线性基即可.

entry.title: poj2947 Widget Factory
entry.content: 英文题面Description The widget factory produces several different kinds of widgets. Each widget is carefully built by a skilled widgeteer. The time required to build a widget depends on its type: the simple widgets need only 3 days, but the most complex ones may need as many as 9 days. The factory is currently in a state of complete chaos: recently, the factory has been bought by a new owner, and the new director has fired almost everyone. The new staff know almost nothing about building widgets, and it seems that no one remembers how many days are required to build each diofferent type of widget. This is very embarrassing when a client orders widgets and the factory cannot tell the client how many days are needed to produce the required goods. Fortunately, there are records that say for each widgeteer the date when he started working at the factory, the date when he was fired and what types of widgets he built. The problem is that the record does not say the exact date of starting and leaving the job, only the day of the week. Nevertheless, even this information might be helpful in certain cases: for example, if a widgeteer started working on a Tuesday, built a Type 41 widget, and was fired on a Friday,then we know that it takes 4 days to build a Type 41 widget. Your task is to figure out from these records (if possible) the number of days that are required to build the different types of widgets.Input The input contains several blocks of test cases. Each case begins with a line containing two integers: the number 1 ≤ n ≤ 300 of the different types, and the number 1 ≤ m ≤ 300 of the records. This line is followed by a description of the m records. Each record is described by two lines. The first line contains the total number 1 ≤ k ≤ 10000 of widgets built by this widgeteer, followed by the day of week when he/she started working and the day of the week he/she was fired. The days of the week are given bythe strings MON',TUE’, WED',THU’, FRI',SAT’ and `SUN’. The second line contains k integers separated by spaces. These numbers are between 1 and n , and they describe the diofferent types of widgets that the widgeteer built. For example, the following two lines mean that the widgeteer started working on a Wednesday, built a Type 13 widget, a Type 18 widget, a Type 1 widget, again a Type 13 widget,and was fired on a Sunday. 4 WED SUN13 18 1 13 Note that the widgeteers work 7 days a week, and they were working on every day between their first and last day at the factory (if you like weekends and holidays, then do not become a widgeteer!). The input is terminated by a test case with n = m = 0 .Output For each test case, you have to output a single line containing n integers separated by spaces: the number of days required to build the different types of widgets. There should be no space before the first number or after the last number, and there should be exactly one space between two numbers. If there is more than one possible solution for the problem, then write Multiple solutions.' (without the quotes). If you are sure that there is no solution consistent with the input, then writeInconsistent data.’(without the quotes).Sample Input 2 32 MON THU1 23 MON FRI1 1 23 MON SUN1 2 210 21 MON TUE31 MON WED30 0Sample Output 8 3Inconsistent data.Hint Huge input file, ‘scanf’ recommended to avoid TLE.Source Central Europe 2005 翻译解一个模线性方程组. 代码#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int mod = 7;int n,m,a[310][310],ans[310],flag;int zhuan(char *s){ if (s[0] == 'M') return 1; if (s[0] == 'T' && s[1] == 'U') return 2; if (s[0] == 'W') return 3; if (s[0] == 'T' && s[1] == 'H') return 4; if (s[0] == 'F') return 5; if (s[0] == 'S' && s[1] == 'A') return 6; if (s[0] == 'S' && s[1] == 'U') return 7;}int gcd(int a,int b){ if (!b) return a; return gcd(b,a % b);}int lcm(int x,int y){ return x / gcd(x,y) * y;}int exgcd(int a,int b,int &x,int &y){ if (!b) { x = 1; y = 0; return a; } int temp = exgcd(b,a % b,x,y); int t = x; x = y; y = t - (a / b) * y; return temp;}void guess(){ int row,col; for (row = 1,col = 1; row <= m && col <= n; row++,col++) { int i; for (i = row; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][col]) break; if (i == m + 1) { row--; continue; } if (i != row) for (int j = 1; j <= n + 1; j++) swap(a[row][j],a[i][j]); for (i = row + 1; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][col]) { int LCM = lcm(a[i][col],a[row][col]); int t1 = LCM / a[i][col],t2 = LCM / a[row][col]; for (int j = col; j <= n + 1; j++) a[i][j] = ((a[i][j] * t1 - t2 * a[row][j]) % mod + mod) % mod; } } for (int i = row; i <= m; i++) if (a[i][n + 1]) { flag = -1; return; } if (row <= n) { flag = -2; return; } for (int i = m; i >= 1; i--) { int temp = 0; for (int j = i + 1; j <= n; j++) temp = (temp + a[i][j] * ans[j] % mod) % mod; temp = ((a[i][n + 1] - temp) % mod + mod) % mod; int A = a[i][i],B = mod; int x,y; int d = exgcd(A,B,x,y); x *= (temp / d); x %= mod; x = (x % (mod / d) + (mod / d)) % (mod / d); ans[i] = x; if (ans[i] < 3) ans[i] += 7; }}int main(){ while (scanf("%d%d",&n,&m) != EOF && (n || m)) { memset(a,0,sizeof(a)); memset(ans,0,sizeof(ans)); for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) { int num; scanf("%d",&num); char ch[5]; scanf("%s",ch); int st = zhuan(ch); scanf("%s",ch); int ed = zhuan(ch); a[i][n + 1] = ((ed - st + 1) % mod + mod) % mod; for (int j = 1; j <= num; j++) { int x; scanf("%d",&x); a[i][x] = (a[i][x] + 1) % mod; } } flag = 0; guess(); if (flag == -2) { puts("Multiple solutions."); continue; } if (flag == -1) { puts("Inconsistent data."); continue; } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { if (i != n) printf("%d ",ans[i]); else printf("%d",ans[i]); } printf("\n"); } return 0;} 分析  解方程组一般都是用高斯消元解. 在模意义下高斯消元其实和在一般情况下高斯消元是差不多的。区别就是多一个取模运算，要考虑负数的情况. 在消元完后判断解的情况. 最后还原. 还原实际上就是在解一个模线性方程，利用扩展欧几里得算法求一组等于gcd的特解，然后求出最小正整数通解即可.  这道题使我又掌握了一种新的高斯消元的模板. 以前写过3类模板：  1.一定有解且仅有一组解的方程组.直接消就好了.  2.贪心+高斯消元，不改变方程的位置,类似线性基的插入操作.  3.不一定有且仅有一组解的xor方程组. 每次找到最大的那个数，找到其最高位，将其它的这一位为1的数与之异或即可.  现在不是xor方程组，而且解的情况可能不唯一，于是换上一种新的模板：记录当前扫到了哪一行，扫到了哪一列. 不管扫到哪一列，一定要将当前行给消掉。为了保证方程组的系数都是整数，乘到最小公倍数来消元.

entry.title: Hdu5015 233 Matrix
entry.content: 英文题面Problem DescriptionIn our daily life we often use 233 to express our feelings. Actually, we may say 2333, 23333, or 233333 … in the same meaning. And here is the question: Suppose we have a matrix called 233 matrix. In the first line, it would be 233, 2333, 23333… (it means a0,1 = 233,a0,2 = 2333,a0,3 = 23333…) Besides, in 233 matrix, we got $a_{i,j} = a_{i-1,j} +a_{i,j-1}$( i,j ≠ 0). Now you have known a1,0,a2,0,…,an,0, could you tell me an,m in the 233 matrix? InputThere are multiple test cases. Please process till EOF. For each case, the first line contains two postive integers n,m(n ≤ 10,m ≤ 109). The second line contains n integers, a1,0,a2,0,…,an,0(0 ≤ ai,0 < 231). OutputFor each case, output an,m mod 10000007. Sample Input1 112 20 03 723 47 16 Sample Output234279972937 翻译求矩阵的第n行第m列的数. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const int mod = 10000007;int n,m;ll sum[30];struct node{ ll p[30][30]; void clear() { memset(p,0,sizeof(p)); }} a,zhuan,res,zhuan2;node operator * (node a,node b){ node c; c.clear(); for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) for (int k = 0; k <= n; k++) c.p[i][j] = (c.p[i][j] + a.p[i][k] * b.p[k][j] % mod) % mod; return c;}void init(){ zhuan.clear(); for (int i = 0; i <= 11; i++) for (int j = 0; j <= 11; j++) { if (i == 0) { zhuan.p[i][j] = 1; continue; } if (i == 1 && j == 0) { zhuan.p[i][j] = 0; continue; } if (i == 1) { zhuan.p[i][j] = 10; continue; } if (i <= j) zhuan.p[i][j] = 1; else zhuan.p[i][j] = 0; }}void qpow(int b){ res.clear(); for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) res.p[i][i] = 1; zhuan2 = zhuan; while (b) { if (b & 1) res = res * zhuan2; zhuan2 = zhuan2 * zhuan2; b >>= 1; } a = a * res;}int main(){ init(); while (scanf("%d%d",&n,&m) != EOF) { memset(sum,0,sizeof(sum)); a.clear(); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a.p[0][i + 1]); a.p[0][i + 1] %= mod; } if (m == 0) { printf("%lld\n",a.p[0][n + 1]); continue; } for (int i = 2; i <= n + 1; i++) sum[i] = (sum[i - 1] + a.p[0][i]) % mod; a.p[0][1] = 233; a.p[0][0] = 3; for (int i = 2; i <= n + 1; i++) a.p[0][i] = (sum[i] + 233) % mod; n++; qpow(m - 1); printf("%lld\n",a.p[0][n]); } return 0;} 分析  一开始想着是找规律. 找着找着觉得太复杂，应该有其它简便的方法. 注意到m很大，而n很小. 题目所给的公式又是一个递推公式，很自然地想到了矩阵快速幂.(程序实现和矩阵有点不一样，我是把矩阵的行列给交换了). 坑点  1.矩阵的下标为0！处理下标要格外注意.  2.注意m=0的情况，直接输出.

entry.title: poj3233 Matrix Power Series
entry.content: 英文题面Description Given a n × n matrix A and a positive integer k, find the sum $S = A + A^2 + A^3 + … + A^k.$ Input The input contains exactly one test case. The first line of input contains three positive integers n (n ≤ 30), k (k ≤ 109) and m (m < 104). Then follow n lines each containing n nonnegative integers below 32,768, giving A’s elements in row-major order. Output Output the elements of S modulo m in the same way as A is given. Sample Input 2 2 40 11 1Sample Output 1 22 3Source POJ Monthly—2007.06.03, Huang, Jinsong 翻译求一个矩阵的等比数列和. 分析  求等比数列可以利用公式，也可以分治. 在本题中采用分治的方式. 一些问题需要注意：  1.尽量减少不必要的取模.  2.能不用long long就尽量不用long long.  3.读入了数据后要取模.  有了这3个优化，程序就能在规定时间内跑完啦. 如果取模只涉及到加减运算，那么就可以将取模操作变成减法操作. 用long long会非常耗费时间.  求等比数列时要对n分奇偶性讨论. 数学老师CKM曾在课堂上讲过：对于要奇偶分类讨论的题，先求出偶数的情况，那么奇数的情况就能通过-1从偶数的情况上推导过来. 正好可以应用在本题上.

entry.title: bzoj2818 Gcd
entry.content: 中文题面Description给定整数N，求1<=x,y<=N且Gcd(x,y)为素数的数对(x,y)有多少对. Input一个整数N Output如题 Sample Input4 Sample Output4HINThint 对于样例(2,2),(2,4),(3,3),(4,2) 1<=N<=10^7 Source湖北省队互测 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;const ll maxn = 10000010;int n,prime[maxn],tot,vis[maxn],phi[maxn];ll sum[maxn],ans;void init(){ phi[1] = 1; for (ll i = 2; i <= n; i++) { if (!vis[i]) { prime[++tot] = i; phi[i] = i - 1; } for (ll j = 1; j <= tot; j++) { ll t = prime[j] * i; if (t > n) break; vis[t] = 1; if (i % prime[j] == 0) { phi[t] = phi[i] * prime[j]; break; } phi[t] = phi[i] * (prime[j] - 1); } } for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + phi[i];}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); init(); for (ll i = 1; i <= tot; i++) ans += sum[n / prime[i]] * 2 - 1; printf("%lld\n",ans); return 0;} 分析  很经典的转化. 将$gcd(x,y) == p$转化成$gcd(x / p,y / p) == 1$.因为n的范围比较小，所以可以预处理出n以内所有的质数，枚举每个质数p,求$2*φ(n / p) - 1$的和，即是答案.  当n比较大的时候就要用莫比乌斯反演来做，具体不再说明，详情可见博客园.

entry.title: poj2311 Cutting Game
entry.content: 英文题面Description Urej loves to play various types of dull games. He usually asks other people to play with him. He says that playing those games can show his extraordinary wit. Recently Urej takes a great interest in a new game, and Erif Nezorf becomes the victim. To get away from suffering playing such a dull game, Erif Nezorf requests your help. The game uses a rectangular paper that consists of W*H grids. Two players cut the paper into two pieces of rectangular sections in turn. In each turn the player can cut either horizontally or vertically, keeping every grids unbroken. After N turns the paper will be broken into N+1 pieces, and in the later turn the players can choose any piece to cut. If one player cuts out a piece of paper with a single grid, he wins the game. If these two people are both quite clear, you should write a problem to tell whether the one who cut first can win or not.Input The input contains multiple test cases. Each test case contains only two integers W and H (2 <= W, H <= 200) in one line, which are the width and height of the original paper.Output For each test case, only one line should be printed.
