} if (pos == 2) { temp = calc(dep - 1,90,leftt); temp.y += jie2[dep - 1]; } if (pos == 3) temp = calc(dep - 1,90,leftt); if (pos == 4) { temp = calc(dep - 1,0,leftt); temp.x += jie2[dep - 1]; } } if (p == 180) { if (pos == 1) { temp = calc(dep - 1,90,leftt); temp.x += jie2[dep - 1]; temp.y += jie2[dep - 1]; } if (pos == 2) { temp = calc(dep - 1,180,leftt); temp.x += jie2[dep - 1]; } if (pos == 3) temp = calc(dep - 1,180,leftt); if (pos == 4) { temp = calc(dep - 1,270,leftt); temp.y += jie2[dep - 1]; } } if (p == 270) { if (pos == 1) temp = calc(dep - 1,0,leftt); if (pos == 2) { temp = calc(dep - 1,270,leftt); temp.x += jie2[dep - 1]; } if (pos == 3) { temp = calc(dep - 1,270,leftt); temp.x += jie2[dep - 1]; temp.y += jie2[dep - 1]; } if (pos == 4) { temp = calc(dep - 1,180,leftt); temp.y += jie2[dep - 1]; } } return temp;}int main(){ jie2[0] = jie4[0] = 1; for (ll i = 1; i <= 15; i++) jie2[i] = jie2[i - 1] * 2,jie4[i] = jie4[i - 1] * 4; scanf("%lld",&T); while (T--) { scanf("%lld%lld%lld",&n,&h,&o); node temp1 = calc(n,0,h); node temp2 = calc(n,0,o); double len = sqrt((temp1.x - temp2.x) * (temp1.x - temp2.x) + (temp1.y - temp2.y) * (temp1.y - temp2.y)) * 10; printf("%lld\n",(ll)(len + 0.5)); } return 0;}

entry.title: poj2288 Islands and Bridges
entry.content: 英文题面Description Given a map of islands and bridges that connect these islands, a Hamilton path, as we all know, is a path along the bridges such that it visits each island exactly once. On our map, there is also a positive integer value associated with each island. We call a Hamilton path the best triangular Hamilton path if it maximizes the value described below. Suppose there are n islands. The value of a Hamilton path C1C2…Cn is calculated as the sum of three parts. Let Vi be the value for the island Ci. As the first part, we sum over all the Vi values for each island in the path. For the second part, for each edge CiCi+1 in the path, we add the product ViVi+1. And for the third part, whenever three consecutive islands CiCi+1Ci+2 in the path forms a triangle in the map, i.e. there is a bridge between Ci and Ci+2, we add the product ViVi+1*Vi+2. Most likely but not necessarily, the best triangular Hamilton path you are going to find contains many triangles. It is quite possible that there might be more than one best triangular Hamilton paths; your second task is to find the number of such paths. Input The input file starts with a number q (q<=20) on the first line, which is the number of test cases. Each test case starts with a line with two integers n and m, which are the number of islands and the number of bridges in the map, respectively. The next line contains n positive integers, the i-th number being the Vi value of island i. Each value is no more than 100. The following m lines are in the form x y, which indicates there is a (two way) bridge between island x and island y. Islands are numbered from 1 to n. You may assume there will be no more than 13 islands.Output For each test case, output a line with two numbers, separated by a space. The first number is the maximum value of a best triangular Hamilton path; the second number should be the number of different best triangular Hamilton paths. If the test case does not contain a Hamilton path, the output must be `0 0’. Note: A path may be written down in the reversed order. We still think it is the same path.Sample Input 23 32 2 21 22 33 14 61 2 3 41 21 31 42 32 43 4Sample Output 22 369 1SourceShanghai 2004 题目大意求包含n个点的哈密顿路径，对于路径上每一个点，它对路径的贡献为vi,每一对相邻的点（路径上）,贡献为ai aj, 两两相邻的三个点，贡献为ai aj * ak,求权值最大的包含n个点的哈密顿路径，以及有多少条这样的路径. 分析   n的数据范围这么小，很显然可以用状压dp解决.   令$f(i,j,k)$表示状态为i,上一次选的点为j,当前选的点为k的最大权值，$g(i,j,k)$则表示相应的方案数. 为何要这么设计状态？第一维是因为状压dp状态的必要性，第二、三维是因为需要知道当前要从哪个点出发（用来判是否连通以计算权值）.转移什么的都挺好想的. 枚举在i中的两个点j,k和不在i中的一个点l,用$f(i,j,k)$来更新$f(i | (1 << l),k,l)$,至于如何求方案数，那就是固定的套路啦. 如果最大值更新了，那么方案数直接边，如果更新的最大值等于原来的最大值，方案数直接累加即可.  几个坑点： 转移的时候一定要判断状态的合法性，即$f(i,j,k)$不能为-1. 有可能只有一个点. 我一开始以为最后所有的点的权值都会被累加进入答案，于是对这一部分单独进行的处理. 事实上会出现没有哈密顿路径的情况，如果单独处理会输出错误的答案（将所有点的权值和给输出了）.123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;typedef long long ll;ll Q,n,m,a[21],f[(1 << 14)][15][15],g[(1 << 14)][15][15],b[21][21],sum,maxn,ans;void solve(){ memset(f,-1,sizeof(f)); memset(g,0,sizeof(g)); for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (ll j = 1; j <= n; j++) if (b[i][j]) { ll temp = (1 << (i - 1)) | (1 << (j - 1)); f[temp][i][j] = a[i] * a[j]; g[temp][i][j] = 1; } for (ll i = 0; i <= maxn; i++) for (ll j = 1; j <= n; j++) if ((1 << (j - 1)) & i) for (ll k = 1; k <= n; k++) if (((1 << (k - 1)) & i) && b[j][k] && f[i][j][k] != -1) for (ll l = 1; l <= n; l++) if (!((1 << (l - 1)) & i) && b[k][l] && l != j) { //cout << i << " " << j << " " << k << " " << l << endl; ll temp = f[i][j][k] + a[k] * a[l]; if (b[j][l]) temp += a[k] * a[l] * a[j]; if (temp > f[i | (1 << (l - 1))][k][l]) { f[i | (1 << (l - 1))][k][l] = temp; g[i | (1 << (l - 1))][k][l] = g[i][j][k]; } else if (temp == f[i | (1 << (l - 1))][k][l]) g[i | (1 << (l - 1))][k][l] += g[i][j][k]; } ll maxx = 0; ans = 0; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) for (ll j = 1; j <= n; j++) if (b[i][j]) { if (f[maxn][i][j] > maxx) { maxx = f[maxn][i][j]; ans = g[maxn][i][j]; } else if (f[maxn][i][j] == maxx) ans += g[maxn][i][j]; } if (maxx == 0) cout << 0 << " " << 0 << endl; else printf("%lld %lld\n",maxx + sum,ans / 2);}int main(){ scanf("%lld",&Q); while (Q--) { sum = 0; memset(b,0,sizeof(b)); scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&m); maxn = (1 << n) - 1; for (ll i = 1; i <= n; i++) { scanf("%lld",&a[i]); sum += a[i]; } if (n == 1) { cout << a[1] << " " << 1 << endl; continue; } for (ll i = 1; i <= m; i++) { ll x,y; scanf("%lld%lld",&x,&y); b[x][y] = b[y][x] = 1; } solve(); } return 0;}

entry.title: bzoj2508 数学推导(偏导数)
entry.content:
题目大意：求一个点使得它到平面上所有直线距离平方和最小。你需要实现以下3种操作： 平面上加入一条直线； 删除一条已加入的直线； 求一个点到平面上所有直线距离平方和最小，你需要输出这个最小值。输入格式：第1行包含一个整数N，表示了操作数目。接下来N行操作属于下列3种格式之一：格式1: 0 x1 y1 x2 y2 。插入直线操作，插入一条过(x1, y1), (x2, y2)的直线，保证两点不重合，坐标为实数（最多两位小数）并且绝对值不超过100。格式2: 1 k 。删除直线操作，删除第i次插入操作所插入的直线，保证已经被删除的直线不会再被删除（即任意2次操作k值均不同），并且k不大于之前插入操作的次数。格式3: 2 。查询操作，查询所要求的最小值。输出格式：输出行数等于查询操作的次数，每行输出每次查询操作所要求的最小值，保留两位小数.样例输入：100 0.0 0.0 1.0 0.020 0 1 1 120 0 2 1 221 221 32样例输出：0.000.502.002.000.00分析：(参考自claris的博客)先把题目要求的式子给列出来，利用点到直线的距离公式.这实际上就是要求二元函数$f(x,y)$的最小值.可以利用偏导数等于0来用$ai,bi,ci$分别表示$x,y$,但是用这种方法解到一半就会崩溃,其实不必解出$x,y$,只需要用$x$表示出$y$,再带入到原式子中求最值即可.具体推导过程如下：其实利用$y$的偏导数等于$0$也可以求出$y$的表达式.发现$y$是一次函数的形式，将那一大坨式子换元，能够起化简式子的作用.最后就是带入了:$x$取对称轴时，二次函数取最小值.（仅仅是这样吗？）在初三学抛物线时经常会在这里出错，要特判$U = 0$的情况！$U = 0$其实就是求一次函数的最值，答案是$W$.最后维护一大坨前缀和就可以了.几个坑点：1.查询的时候可能没有直线,输出$0$即可.2.$A、B$的分母可能为0，那么$A、B$也为0.3.最后的答案绝对值如果＜eps,直接输出$0.00$.4.注意插入直线两个点横坐标相等的情况.总结：1.初中学过的数学公式要记全！比如点到直线的距离公式、抛物线的对称轴等等.2.发现可以用公式表示出答案后一定要写下完整的公式！我一开始没有考虑到有$Σ$所以推偏导发现$x,y$解不出来.3.每一步数学推导都要写在草稿纸上，一旦发现可以套模型（一次函数、二次函数），果断换元化简式子！4.如果题目给直线的方式是给定两个点，一定要注意两个点横坐标相等的情况!5.小技巧：如果最后的答案有可能<eps,那么输出0即可.最后是我丑陋的代码：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108#include <cstdio>#include <cmath>#include <cstring>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 120010;const double eps = 1e-8;int n,cnt,tot;double weihu[20],a[maxn],b[maxn],c[maxn];bool check(double x){ return fabs(x) < eps;}int main(){ scanf("%d",&n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int opt; scanf("%d",&opt); if (opt == 0) { double X1,Y1,X2,Y2,aa,bb,cc,dd; scanf("%lf%lf%lf%lf",&X1,&Y1,&X2,&Y2); if (check(X1-X2)) aa = 1.0,bb = 0.0,cc = -X1; else { aa = (Y2 - Y1) / (X2 - X1); bb = -1; cc = Y1 - aa * X1; } a[++tot] = aa; b[tot] = bb; c[tot] = cc; dd = aa*aa + bb*bb; weihu[1] += aa * bb / dd; weihu[2] += bb * cc / dd; weihu[3] += bb * bb / dd; weihu[4] += dd; weihu[5] += aa*aa / dd; weihu[6] += aa*bb / dd; weihu[7] += bb*bb / dd; weihu[8] += bb / dd; weihu[9] += aa / dd; weihu[10] += aa * cc / dd; weihu[11] += cc * bb / dd; weihu[12] += cc * cc / dd; cnt++; } if (opt == 1) { int x; scanf("%d",&x); double aa = a[x],bb = b[x],cc = c[x],dd; dd = aa*aa + bb*bb; weihu[1] -= aa * bb / dd; weihu[2] -= bb * cc / dd; weihu[3] -= bb * bb / dd; weihu[4] -= dd; weihu[5] -= aa*aa / dd; weihu[6] -= aa*bb / dd; weihu[7] -= bb*bb / dd; weihu[8] -= bb / dd; weihu[9] -= aa / dd; weihu[10] -= aa * cc / dd; weihu[11] -= cc * bb / dd; weihu[12] -= cc * cc / dd; cnt--; } if (opt == 2) { if (cnt == 0) printf("0.00
"); else { double A,B; if (check(weihu[3])) A = B = 0.0; else { A = -weihu[1] / weihu[3]; B = -weihu[2] / weihu[3]; } double U = weihu[5] + 2 * weihu[6] * A + weihu[3] * A * A; double V = 2 * (weihu[6] * B + weihu[10] + weihu[7] * A * B + weihu[11] * A); double P = 2 * B * weihu[11] + weihu[12] + B * B * weihu[7]; if (check(U)) printf("%.2lf
",P); else { double X = -V / (2 * U); double ans = X * X * U + X * V + P; if (check(ans)) ans = 0.0; printf("%.2lf
",ans); } } } } return 0;}

entry.title: bzoj4073 斜率优化+贪心
entry.content: 题目大意：给定d种食物，食物分两个类型：离散食物和连续食物离散食物只能按份供应，每种食物有一个质量w连续食物可以食用任意质量每种食物有一个初始美味值t和一个美味值衰减系数△t对于一种离散食物，如果你吃了N份，那么获得的美味值为∑Ni=1(t−(i−1)△t)对于一种连续食物，如果你吃的质量为X，那么获得的美味值为∫$X_0$(t−x△t)dx现在你必须吃总质量为W的食物，求最多获得的美味值(可以为负)，无解输出”impossible”d≤250,W≤ $10^4$ ,0≤t,△t≤ $10^4$ 分析：  很显然离散食物和连续食物是可以分开处理的.令离散食物消耗的质量为w1,那么连续食物消耗的质量就是w - w1.题目比较友好的一点是离散食物的质量为整数,而且总的质量很小,所以可以处理出两个数组:f1[i]表示离散食物吃质量为i能获得的最大美味值，f2[i]表示连续食物吃质量为i能获得的最大美味值.下面的任务就是如何分别求出f1和f2的值. 考虑它们的实质. f1实际上就是多重背包问题. 依次将每一种物品插入到背包中.    直接做是O( $n^3$ )的,一个常见的优化是单调队列优化. 但是式子中不仅有j还有$f_j$,这样单调队列维护的东西就不唯一，不满足其作为维护的信息的条件.我们的目的是要将这个式子的复杂度变成O( $n$ )的.从O( $n^2$ )变成O( $n$ )有一种常见的转换方法：斜率优化！    为什么能看出它能斜率优化呢？因为它有两元 $i$ 和 $j$ ,并且还受到复杂度的限制. 需要注意的是这里的斜率优化的复杂度并不是严格O( $n$ )的，因为我们要根据余数来分类转移.（类似于单调队列优化）.    连续型的食物要怎么处理呢？我们要处理出 $f2[i]$ ,而每种食物吃的质量又是不确定的（浮点数），所以每种食物该怎么吃要有一个下界（吃多少就停止?）因为每种食物的质量都是无限的，并且如果吃第 $i$ 种食物和吃第 $j$ 种食物质量相同，显然美味度越高越划算（每种食物的质量是等价的），贪心一下即可. 每次吃美味度最大的,直到其和美味度第二高的相同.那么可以将这两种食物合并，看作并联电路，合并后的食物的美味度的衰减系数为：    这道题特别容易写错，当初对拍了一下午才找出一组错误数据……一定要考虑不吃离散型食物的情况！最大美味度可能是负数， $f1[i]$ 和 $f2[i]$ 要初始化为 $-inf!$#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>#include <iomanip>#include <iostream>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;const int maxn = 1010;const double inf = 1e30,eps = 1e-7;int n,m,q[2500010],top;double f[2500010],g[2500010],ans[2500010],anss;bool flag[2500010];struct node{ double t,dt;} e[maxn];double K(double i,double dt){ return i * dt;}double B(int i,double t,double dt,int p){ return f[p] - t * i - dt * i / 2 - dt * i * i / 2;}double y(int i,int j,double t,double dt,int p){ return K(i,dt) * j + B(i,t,dt,p);}bool check(int y1,int y2,int y3,double t,double dt,int p,int w){ double temp1 = (K(y1,dt) - K(y3,dt)) * (B(y2,t,dt,p + y2 * w) - B(y1,t,dt,p + y1 * w)); double temp2 = (K(y1,dt) - K(y2,dt)) * (B(y3,t,dt,p + y3 * w) - B(y1,t,dt,p + y1 * w)); return temp1 >= temp2;}void update(int w,double t,double dt){ for (int i = 0; i < w; i++) { int l = 0,r = 0; for (int j = 0; j * w + i <= m; j++) { while(l < r && y(q[l],j,t,dt,q[l] * w + i) <= y(q[l + 1],j,t,dt,q[l + 1] * w + i)) l++; g[j * w + i] = y(q[l],j,t,dt,q[l] * w + i) + j * t + j * dt / 2 - j * j * dt / 2; //cout << j * w + i << endl; while(l < r && check(j,q[r - 1],q[r],t,dt,i,w)) r--; q[++r] = j; } } for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) f[i] = max(f[i],g[i]); for (int i = w; i <= m; i++) flag[i] |= flag[i - w];}bool cmp(node a,node b){ if (a.t == b.t) return a.dt < b.dt; return a.t < b.t;}int main(){ scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); flag[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) f[i] = -1000000000000000000; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { char ch[10]; scanf("%s",ch); if (ch[0] == 'D') { int w,t,dt; scanf("%d%d%d",&w,&t,&dt); update(w,t,dt); } else { int t,dt; scanf("%d%d",&t,&dt); node temp; temp.t = t; temp.dt = dt; e[++top] = temp; } } if (!top) { if (!flag[m]) cout << "impossible" << endl; else printf("%.9lf\n",f[m]); } else { for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) if (!flag[i]) f[i] = -inf; sort(e + 1,e + top + 1,cmp); for (int i = 1; i <= top >> 1; i++) swap(e[i],e[top - i + 1]); double l = 0.0,r = 0.0,dt = inf,sum = 0; int j = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= top; i++) { dt = 1.0 / (1.0 / dt + 1.0 / e[i].dt); l = r; if (i == top || dt < eps) r = m + 1; else r = l + (e[i].t - e[i + 1].t) / dt; while(j <= r + eps && j <= m) { ans[j] = sum + (j - l) * (e[i].t * 2 - dt * (j - l)) / 2; j++; } sum += (r - l) * (e[i].t * 2 - (r - l) * dt) / 2; if (dt < eps) break; } anss = -inf; int cur = 0; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) if (flag[i]) { if (f[i] + ans[m - i] > anss) cur = i; anss = max(f[i] + ans[m - i],anss); } printf("%.9lf\n",anss); } return 0;}
